changes.title: 内存/dreaming: 添加 a grounded REM backfill lane 使用 historical `rem-harness --路径`, diary commit/reset flows, cleaner durable-fact extraction, 和 live short-term promotion integration so old daily notes can replay 进入 Dreams 和 durable 内存 不适用 a second 内存 stack. Thanks @mbelinky.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/dreaming: add a grounded REM backfill lane with historical `rem-harness --path`, diary commit/reset flows, cleaner durable-fact extraction, and live short-term promotion integration so old daily notes can replay into Dreams and durable memory without a second memory stack. Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.title: Control 界面/dreaming: 添加 a structured diary view 使用 timeline navigation, backfill/reset controls, traceable dreaming summaries, 和 a grounded Scene lane 使用 promotion hints plus a safe clear-grounded action 为了 staged backfill signals. (#63395) Thanks @mbelinky.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/dreaming: add a structured diary view with timeline navigation, backfill/reset controls, traceable dreaming summaries, and a grounded Scene lane with promotion hints plus a safe clear-grounded action for staged backfill signals. (#63395) Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.title: QA/lab: 添加 character-vibes evaluation reports 使用 模型 selection 和 parallel runs so live QA can compare candidate behavior faster.
changes.rawTitle: QA/lab: add character-vibes evaluation reports with model selection and parallel runs so live QA can compare candidate behavior faster.

changes.title: 插件/provider-认证: let provider manifests declare `providerAuthAliases` so provider variants can share env vars, 认证 profiles, 配置-backed 认证, 和 API-密钥 onboarding choices 不适用 core-specific wiring.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/provider-auth: let provider manifests declare `providerAuthAliases` so provider variants can share env vars, auth profiles, config-backed auth, and API-key onboarding choices without core-specific wiring.

changes.title: iOS: pin release versioning to an explicit CalVer 在 `apps/ios/version.json`, keep TestFlight iteration 在 the same short version until maintainers intentionally promote the next 网关 version, 和 添加 the documented `pnpm ios:version:pin -- --从-网关` workflow 为了 release trains. (#63001) Thanks @ngutman.
changes.rawTitle: iOS: pin release versioning to an explicit CalVer in `apps/ios/version.json`, keep TestFlight iteration on the same short version until maintainers intentionally promote the next gateway version, and add the documented `pnpm ios:version:pin -- --from-gateway` workflow for release trains. (#63001) Thanks @ngutman.

changes.title: 浏览器/安全: re-run blocked-destination safety checks 之后 interaction-driven main-frame navigations 从 click, evaluate, hook-triggered click, 和 batched action flows, so 浏览器 interactions cannot bypass the SSRF quarantine 当 they land 在 forbidden URLs. (#63226) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/security: re-run blocked-destination safety checks after interaction-driven main-frame navigations from click, evaluate, hook-triggered click, and batched action flows, so browser interactions cannot bypass the SSRF quarantine when they land on forbidden URLs. (#63226) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: 安全/dotenv: block runtime-control env vars plus 浏览器-control override 和 skip-server env vars 从 untrusted workspace `.env` files, 和 reject unsafe URL-style 浏览器 control override specifiers 之前 lazy loading. (#62660, #62663) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Security/dotenv: block runtime-control env vars plus browser-control override and skip-server env vars from untrusted workspace `.env` files, and reject unsafe URL-style browser control override specifiers before lazy loading. (#62660, #62663) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: 网关/node exec events: mark remote node `exec.started`, `exec.finished`, 和 `exec.denied` summaries as untrusted system events 和 sanitize node-provided 命令/output/reason text 之前 enqueueing them, so remote node output cannot inject trusted `System:` content 进入 later turns. (#62659) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/node exec events: mark remote node `exec.started`, `exec.finished`, and `exec.denied` summaries as untrusted system events and sanitize node-provided command/output/reason text before enqueueing them, so remote node output cannot inject trusted `System:` content into later turns. (#62659) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: 插件/onboarding 认证 choices: 防止 untrusted workspace 插件 从 colliding 使用 bundled provider 认证-choice ids 期间 non-interactive onboarding, so bundled provider setup keeps operator secrets out 的 untrusted workspace 插件 handlers unless those 插件 are explicitly trusted. (#62368) Thanks @pgondhi987.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/onboarding auth choices: prevent untrusted workspace plugins from colliding with bundled provider auth-choice ids during non-interactive onboarding, so bundled provider setup keeps operator secrets out of untrusted workspace plugin handlers unless those plugins are explicitly trusted. (#62368) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.title: 安全/dependency audit: force `basic-ftp` to `5.2.1` 为了 the CRLF 命令-injection 修复 和 bump Hono plus `@hono/node-server` 在 production resolution paths.
changes.rawTitle: Security/dependency audit: force `basic-ftp` to `5.2.1` for the CRLF command-injection fix and bump Hono plus `@hono/node-server` in production resolution paths.

changes.title: Android/pairing: clear stale setup-code 认证 在 new QR scans, bootstrap operator 和 node sessions 从 fresh pairing, prefer stored device tokens 之后 bootstrap handoff, 和 pause pairing auto-重试 while the app is backgrounded so scan-once Android pairing recovers reliably 重新. (#63199) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Android/pairing: clear stale setup-code auth on new QR scans, bootstrap operator and node sessions from fresh pairing, prefer stored device tokens after bootstrap handoff, and pause pairing auto-retry while the app is backgrounded so scan-once Android pairing recovers reliably again. (#63199) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: Matrix/网关: wait 为了 Matrix sync readiness 之前 marking startup successful, keep Matrix background handler failures contained, 和 route fatal Matrix sync stops through channel-level restart handling 而不是 crashing the whole 网关. (#62779) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/gateway: wait for Matrix sync readiness before marking startup successful, keep Matrix background handler failures contained, and route fatal Matrix sync stops through channel-level restart handling instead of crashing the whole gateway. (#62779) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Slack/media: 保留 bearer 认证 across same-origin `files.Slack.com` redirects while still stripping it 在 cross-origin Slack CDN hops, so `url_private_download` image attachments load 重新. (#62960) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/media: preserve bearer auth across same-origin `files.slack.com` redirects while still stripping it on cross-origin Slack CDN hops, so `url_private_download` image attachments load again. (#62960) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Reply/诊断工具: use the active runtime snapshot 为了 queued reply runs, 解决 reply-run SecretRefs 之前 preflight helpers touch 配置, surface 网关 OAuth认证 reauth failures to users, 和 make `openclaw 诊断工具` call out exact reauth commands. (#62693, #63217) Thanks @mbelinky.
changes.rawTitle: Reply/doctor: use the active runtime snapshot for queued reply runs, resolve reply-run SecretRefs before preflight helpers touch config, surface gateway OAuth reauth failures to users, and make `openclaw doctor` call out exact reauth commands. (#62693, #63217) Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.title: Control 界面: guard stale session-history reloads 期间 fast session switches so the selected session 和 rendered transcript stay 在 sync. (#62975) Thanks @scoootscooob.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI: guard stale session-history reloads during fast session switches so the selected session and rendered transcript stay in sync. (#62975) Thanks @scoootscooob.

changes.title: 网关/chat: suppress exact 和 streamed `ANNOUNCE_SKIP` / `REPLY_SKIP` control replies across live chat updates 和 history sanitization so internal Agent-to-Agent control tokens no longer leak 进入 user-facing 网关 chat surfaces. (#51739) Thanks @Pinghuachiu.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/chat: suppress exact and streamed `ANNOUNCE_SKIP` / `REPLY_SKIP` control replies across live chat updates and history sanitization so internal agent-to-agent control tokens no longer leak into user-facing gateway chat surfaces. (#51739) Thanks @Pinghuachiu.

changes.title: Auto-reply/NO_REPLY: strip glued leading `NO_REPLY` tokens 之前 reply normalization 和 ACP-visible streaming so silent sentinel text no longer leaks 进入 user-visible replies while preserving substantive `NO_REPLY ...` text. Thanks @frankekn.
changes.rawTitle: Auto-reply/NO_REPLY: strip glued leading `NO_REPLY` tokens before reply normalization and ACP-visible streaming so silent sentinel text no longer leaks into user-visible replies while preserving substantive `NO_REPLY ...` text. Thanks @frankekn.

changes.title: Sessions/routing: 保留 established external routes 在 inter-session announce traffic so `sessions_send` follow-ups do not steal delivery 从 Telegram, Discord, 或 other external channels. (#58013) Thanks @duqaXxX.
changes.rawTitle: Sessions/routing: preserve established external routes on inter-session announce traffic so `sessions_send` follow-ups do not steal delivery from Telegram, Discord, or other external channels. (#58013) Thanks @duqaXxX.

changes.title: 网关/sessions: clear auto-fallback-pinned 模型 overrides 在 `/reset` 和 `/new` while still preserving explicit user 模型 selections, including legacy sessions created 之前 override-source tracking existed. (#63155) Thanks @frankekn.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/sessions: clear auto-fallback-pinned model overrides on `/reset` and `/new` while still preserving explicit user model selections, including legacy sessions created before override-source tracking existed. (#63155) Thanks @frankekn.

changes.title: Slack/ACP: treat Slack ACP block replies as visible delivered output so OpenClaw stops re-sending the final fallback text 之后 Slack already rendered the reply. (#62858) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/ACP: treat Slack ACP block replies as visible delivered output so OpenClaw stops re-sending the final fallback text after Slack already rendered the reply. (#62858) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Slack/partial streaming: 密钥 turn-local dedupe 通过 dispatch kind 和 keep the final fallback reply 路径 active 当 preview finalization fails so stale preview text cannot suppress the actual final answer. (#62859) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/partial streaming: key turn-local dedupe by dispatch kind and keep the final fallback reply path active when preview finalization fails so stale preview text cannot suppress the actual final answer. (#62859) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Matrix/诊断工具: migrate legacy `channels.matrix.dm.policy: "trusted"` configs back to compatible DM policies 期间 `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复`, preserving explicit `allowFrom` boundaries as `allowlist` 和 defaulting empty legacy configs to `pairing`. (#62942) Thanks @lukeboyett.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/doctor: migrate legacy `channels.matrix.dm.policy: "trusted"` configs back to compatible DM policies during `openclaw doctor --fix`, preserving explicit `allowFrom` boundaries as `allowlist` and defaulting empty legacy configs to `pairing`. (#62942) Thanks @lukeboyett.

changes.title: npm packaging: mirror bundled channel runtime deps, stage Nostr runtime deps, derive required root mirrors 从 manifests 和 built chunks, 和 test packed release tarballs 不适用 repo `node_modules` so fresh installs fail fast 在 missing 插件 deps 而不是 crashing at runtime. (#63065) Thanks @scoootscooob.
changes.rawTitle: npm packaging: mirror bundled channel runtime deps, stage Nostr runtime deps, derive required root mirrors from manifests and built chunks, and test packed release tarballs without repo `node_modules` so fresh installs fail fast on missing plugin deps instead of crashing at runtime. (#63065) Thanks @scoootscooob.

changes.title: QA/live 认证: fail fast 当 live QA scenarios hit classified 认证 或 runtime failure replies, including raw scenario wait paths, 和 sanitize missing-密钥 guidance so 网关 认证 problems surface as actionable errors 而不是 timeouts. (#63333) Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: QA/live auth: fail fast when live QA scenarios hit classified auth or runtime failure replies, including raw scenario wait paths, and sanitize missing-key guidance so gateway auth problems surface as actionable errors instead of timeouts. (#63333) Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: Providers/OpenAI: default missing reasoning effort to `high` 在 OpenAI Responses, WebSocket, 和 compatible completions transports, while still honoring explicit per-run reasoning levels.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI: default missing reasoning effort to `high` on OpenAI Responses, WebSocket, and compatible completions transports, while still honoring explicit per-run reasoning levels.

changes.title: Providers/Ollama: 允许 Ollama 模型 using the native `API: "ollama"` 路径 to optionally display thinking output 当 `/think` is set to a non-off level. (#62712) Thanks @hoyyeva.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Ollama: allow Ollama models using the native `api: "ollama"` path to optionally display thinking output when `/think` is set to a non-off level. (#62712) Thanks @hoyyeva.

changes.title: Codex CLI: pass OpenClaw's system prompt through Codex's `model_instructions_file` 配置 override so fresh Codex CLI sessions receive the same prompt guidance as Claude CLI sessions.
changes.rawTitle: Codex CLI: pass OpenClaw's system prompt through Codex's `model_instructions_file` config override so fresh Codex CLI sessions receive the same prompt guidance as Claude CLI sessions.

changes.title: 认证/profiles: persist explicit 认证-profile upserts directly 和 skip external CLI sync 为了 local writes so profile changes are saved 不适用 stale external credential state.
changes.rawTitle: Auth/profiles: persist explicit auth-profile upserts directly and skip external CLI sync for local writes so profile changes are saved without stale external credential state.

changes.title: Agent/timeouts: make the LLM idle 超时 inherit `Agent.defaults.timeoutSeconds` 当 configured, 禁用 the unconfigured idle watchdog 为了 cron runs, 和 point idle-超时 errors at `Agent.defaults.llm.idleTimeoutSeconds`. Thanks @drvoss.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/timeouts: make the LLM idle timeout inherit `agents.defaults.timeoutSeconds` when configured, disable the unconfigured idle watchdog for cron runs, and point idle-timeout errors at `agents.defaults.llm.idleTimeoutSeconds`. Thanks @drvoss.

changes.title: Agent/failover: classify Z.ai vendor code `1311` as billing 和 `1113` as 认证, including long wrapped `1311` payloads, so these errors 停止 falling through to generic failover handling. (#49552) Thanks @1bcMax.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/failover: classify Z.ai vendor code `1311` as billing and `1113` as auth, including long wrapped `1311` payloads, so these errors stop falling through to generic failover handling. (#49552) Thanks @1bcMax.

changes.title: QQBot/media-tags: 支持 HTML entity-encoded angle brackets (`<`/`>`), URL slashes 在 attributes, 和 self-closing media tags so upstream `<qqimg>` payloads are 正确地 parsed 和 normalized. (#60493) Thanks @ylc0919.
changes.rawTitle: QQBot/media-tags: support HTML entity-encoded angle brackets (`<`/`>`), URL slashes in attributes, and self-closing media tags so upstream `<qqimg>` payloads are correctly parsed and normalized. (#60493) Thanks @ylc0919.

changes.title: 内存/dreaming: harden grounded backfill inputs, diary writes, status payloads, 和 diary action classification 通过 preserving source-day labels, rejecting missing 或 symlinked targets cleanly, normalizing diary headings 在 网关 backfills, 和 tightening claim splitting plus diary source metadata. Thanks @mbelinky.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/dreaming: harden grounded backfill inputs, diary writes, status payloads, and diary action classification by preserving source-day labels, rejecting missing or symlinked targets cleanly, normalizing diary headings in gateway backfills, and tightening claim splitting plus diary source metadata. Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.title: 内存/dreaming: accept embedded heartbeat trigger tokens so light 和 REM dreaming still run 当 runtime wrappers include extra heartbeat text.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/dreaming: accept embedded heartbeat trigger tokens so light and REM dreaming still run when runtime wrappers include extra heartbeat text.

changes.title: Android/manual connect: 允许 blank port input only 为了 TLS manual 网关 endpoints so standard HTTPS Tailscale hosts default to `443` 不适用 静默地 changing cleartext manual connects. (#63134) Thanks @Tyler-RNG.
changes.rawTitle: Android/manual connect: allow blank port input only for TLS manual gateway endpoints so standard HTTPS Tailscale hosts default to `443` without silently changing cleartext manual connects. (#63134) Thanks @Tyler-RNG.

changes.title: Windows/更新: 添加 heap headroom to Windows `pnpm build` steps 期间 dev updates so 更新 preflight builds 停止 failing 在 low default Node 内存.
changes.rawTitle: Windows/update: add heap headroom to Windows `pnpm build` steps during dev updates so update preflight builds stop failing on low default Node memory.

changes.title: 插件 SDK: export the channel 插件 base 和 web-search 配置 contract through the public package so 插件 can use them 不适用 private imports.
changes.rawTitle: Plugin SDK: export the channel plugin base and web-search config contract through the public package so plugins can use them without private imports.

changes.title: 插件/contracts: keep test-only helpers out 的 production contract barrels, load shared contract harnesses through bundled test surfaces, 和 harden guardrails so indirect re-exports 和 canonical `*.test.ts` files stay blocked. (#63311) Thanks @altaywtf.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/contracts: keep test-only helpers out of production contract barrels, load shared contract harnesses through bundled test surfaces, and harden guardrails so indirect re-exports and canonical `*.test.ts` files stay blocked. (#63311) Thanks @altaywtf.

changes.title: Control 界面/模型: 保留 provider-qualified refs 为了 OpenRouter catalog 模型 whose ids already contain slashes so picker selections submit allowlist-compatible 模型 refs 而不是 dropping the `OpenRouter/` prefix. (#63416) Thanks @sallyom.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/models: preserve provider-qualified refs for OpenRouter catalog models whose ids already contain slashes so picker selections submit allowlist-compatible model refs instead of dropping the `openrouter/` prefix. (#63416) Thanks @sallyom.

changes.rawTitle: Plugin SDK/command auth: split command status builders onto the lightweight `openclaw/plugin-sdk/command-status` subpath while preserving deprecated `command-auth` compatibility exports, so auth-only plugin imports no longer pull status/context warmup into CLI onboarding paths. items.title: 插件/onboarding 认证 choices: 防止 untrusted workspace 插件 从 colliding 使用 bundled provider 认证-choice ids 期间 non-interactive onboarding, so bundled provider setup keeps operator secrets out 的 untrusted workspace 插件 handlers unless those 插件 are explicitly trusted. (#62368) Thanks @pgondhi987.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/onboarding auth choices: prevent untrusted workspace plugins from colliding with bundled provider auth-choice ids during non-interactive onboarding, so bundled provider setup keeps operator secrets out of untrusted workspace plugin handlers unless those plugins are explicitly trusted. (#62368) Thanks @pgondhi987.

items.title: 网关/chat: suppress exact 和 streamed `ANNOUNCE_SKIP` / `REPLY_SKIP` control replies across live chat updates 和 history sanitization so internal Agent-to-Agent control tokens no longer leak 进入 user-facing 网关 chat surfaces. (#51739) Thanks @Pinghuachiu.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/chat: suppress exact and streamed `ANNOUNCE_SKIP` / `REPLY_SKIP` control replies across live chat updates and history sanitization so internal agent-to-agent control tokens no longer leak into user-facing gateway chat surfaces. (#51739) Thanks @Pinghuachiu.

items.title: 网关/sessions: clear auto-fallback-pinned 模型 overrides 在 `/reset` 和 `/new` while still preserving explicit user 模型 selections, including legacy sessions created 之前 override-source tracking existed. (#63155) Thanks @frankekn.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/sessions: clear auto-fallback-pinned model overrides on `/reset` and `/new` while still preserving explicit user model selections, including legacy sessions created before override-source tracking existed. (#63155) Thanks @frankekn.

items.title: Providers/OpenAI: default missing reasoning effort to `high` 在 OpenAI Responses, WebSocket, 和 compatible completions transports, while still honoring explicit per-run reasoning levels.
items.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI: default missing reasoning effort to `high` on OpenAI Responses, WebSocket, and compatible completions transports, while still honoring explicit per-run reasoning levels.

items.title: 认证/profiles: persist explicit 认证-profile upserts directly 和 skip external CLI sync 为了 local writes so profile changes are saved 不适用 stale external credential state.
items.rawTitle: Auth/profiles: persist explicit auth-profile upserts directly and skip external CLI sync for local writes so profile changes are saved without stale external credential state.

items.title: 浏览器/安全: re-run blocked-destination safety checks 之后 interaction-driven main-frame navigations 从 click, evaluate, hook-triggered click, 和 batched action flows, so 浏览器 interactions cannot bypass the SSRF quarantine 当 they land 在 forbidden URLs. (#63226) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
items.rawTitle: Browser/security: re-run blocked-destination safety checks after interaction-driven main-frame navigations from click, evaluate, hook-triggered click, and batched action flows, so browser interactions cannot bypass the SSRF quarantine when they land on forbidden URLs. (#63226) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

items.title: 安全/dotenv: block runtime-control env vars plus 浏览器-control override 和 skip-server env vars 从 untrusted workspace `.env` files, 和 reject unsafe URL-style 浏览器 control override specifiers 之前 lazy loading. (#62660, #62663) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
items.rawTitle: Security/dotenv: block runtime-control env vars plus browser-control override and skip-server env vars from untrusted workspace `.env` files, and reject unsafe URL-style browser control override specifiers before lazy loading. (#62660, #62663) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

items.title: 网关/node exec events: mark remote node `exec.started`, `exec.finished`, 和 `exec.denied` summaries as untrusted system events 和 sanitize node-provided 命令/output/reason text 之前 enqueueing them, so remote node output cannot inject trusted `System:` content 进入 later turns. (#62659) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/node exec events: mark remote node `exec.started`, `exec.finished`, and `exec.denied` summaries as untrusted system events and sanitize node-provided command/output/reason text before enqueueing them, so remote node output cannot inject trusted `System:` content into later turns. (#62659) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

items.title: 安全/dependency audit: force `basic-ftp` to `5.2.1` 为了 the CRLF 命令-injection 修复 和 bump Hono plus `@hono/node-server` 在 production resolution paths.
items.rawTitle: Security/dependency audit: force `basic-ftp` to `5.2.1` for the CRLF command-injection fix and bump Hono plus `@hono/node-server` in production resolution paths.

items.title: 内存/dreaming: harden grounded backfill inputs, diary writes, status payloads, 和 diary action classification 通过 preserving source-day labels, rejecting missing 或 symlinked targets cleanly, normalizing diary headings 在 网关 backfills, 和 tightening claim splitting plus diary source metadata. Thanks @mbelinky.
items.rawTitle: Memory/dreaming: harden grounded backfill inputs, diary writes, status payloads, and diary action classification by preserving source-day labels, rejecting missing or symlinked targets cleanly, normalizing diary headings in gateway backfills, and tightening claim splitting plus diary source metadata. Thanks @mbelinky.

items.title: Android/manual connect: 允许 blank port input only 为了 TLS manual 网关 endpoints so standard HTTPS Tailscale hosts default to `443` 不适用 静默地 changing cleartext manual connects. (#63134) Thanks @Tyler-RNG.
items.rawTitle: Android/manual connect: allow blank port input only for TLS manual gateway endpoints so standard HTTPS Tailscale hosts default to `443` without silently changing cleartext manual connects. (#63134) Thanks @Tyler-RNG.

items.title: Control 界面: guard stale session-history reloads 期间 fast session switches so the selected session 和 rendered transcript stay 在 sync. (#62975) Thanks @scoootscooob.
items.rawTitle: Control UI: guard stale session-history reloads during fast session switches so the selected session and rendered transcript stay in sync. (#62975) Thanks @scoootscooob.

items.title: QA/live 认证: fail fast 当 live QA scenarios hit classified 认证 或 runtime failure replies, including raw scenario wait paths, 和 sanitize missing-密钥 guidance so 网关 认证 problems surface as actionable errors 而不是 timeouts. (#63333) Thanks @shakkernerd.
items.rawTitle: QA/live auth: fail fast when live QA scenarios hit classified auth or runtime failure replies, including raw scenario wait paths, and sanitize missing-key guidance so gateway auth problems surface as actionable errors instead of timeouts. (#63333) Thanks @shakkernerd.

items.title: Agent/timeouts: make the LLM idle 超时 inherit `Agent.defaults.timeoutSeconds` 当 configured, 禁用 the unconfigured idle watchdog 为了 cron runs, 和 point idle-超时 errors at `Agent.defaults.llm.idleTimeoutSeconds`. Thanks @drvoss.
items.rawTitle: Agents/timeouts: make the LLM idle timeout inherit `agents.defaults.timeoutSeconds` when configured, disable the unconfigured idle watchdog for cron runs, and point idle-timeout errors at `agents.defaults.llm.idleTimeoutSeconds`. Thanks @drvoss.

items.title: Agent/failover: classify Z.ai vendor code `1311` as billing 和 `1113` as 认证, including long wrapped `1311` payloads, so these errors 停止 falling through to generic failover handling. (#49552) Thanks @1bcMax.
items.rawTitle: Agents/failover: classify Z.ai vendor code `1311` as billing and `1113` as auth, including long wrapped `1311` payloads, so these errors stop falling through to generic failover handling. (#49552) Thanks @1bcMax.

items.title: QQBot/media-tags: 支持 HTML entity-encoded angle brackets (`<`/`>`), URL slashes 在 attributes, 和 self-closing media tags so upstream `<qqimg>` payloads are 正确地 parsed 和 normalized. (#60493) Thanks @ylc0919.
items.rawTitle: QQBot/media-tags: support HTML entity-encoded angle brackets (`<`/`>`), URL slashes in attributes, and self-closing media tags so upstream `<qqimg>` payloads are correctly parsed and normalized. (#60493) Thanks @ylc0919.

items.title: 插件/contracts: keep test-only helpers out 的 production contract barrels, load shared contract harnesses through bundled test surfaces, 和 harden guardrails so indirect re-exports 和 canonical `*.test.ts` files stay blocked. (#63311) Thanks @altaywtf.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/contracts: keep test-only helpers out of production contract barrels, load shared contract harnesses through bundled test surfaces, and harden guardrails so indirect re-exports and canonical `*.test.ts` files stay blocked. (#63311) Thanks @altaywtf.

items.title: 插件 SDK/命令 认证: split 命令 status builders onto the lightweight `openclaw/插件-sdk/命令-status` subpath while preserving deprecated `命令-认证` compatibility exports, so 认证-only 插件 imports no longer pull status/context warmup 进入 CLI onboarding paths. (#63174) Thanks @hxy91819.
items.rawTitle: Plugin SDK/command auth: split command status builders onto the lightweight `openclaw/plugin-sdk/command-status` subpath while preserving deprecated `command-auth` compatibility exports, so auth-only plugin imports no longer pull status/context warmup into CLI onboarding paths. (#63174) Thanks @hxy91819.

changes.title: 内存/dreaming: 添加 a grounded REM backfill lane 使用 historical `rem-harness --路径`, diary commit/reset flows, cleaner durable-fact extraction, 和 live short-term promotion integration so old daily notes can replay 进入 Dreams 和 durable 内存 不适用 a second 内存 stack. Thanks @mbelinky.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/dreaming: add a grounded REM backfill lane with historical `rem-harness --path`, diary commit/reset flows, cleaner durable-fact extraction, and live short-term promotion integration so old daily notes can replay into Dreams and durable memory without a second memory stack. Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.title: Control 界面/dreaming: 添加 a structured diary view 使用 timeline navigation, backfill/reset controls, traceable dreaming summaries, 和 a grounded Scene lane 使用 promotion hints plus a safe clear-grounded action 为了 staged backfill signals. (#63395) Thanks @mbelinky.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/dreaming: add a structured diary view with timeline navigation, backfill/reset controls, traceable dreaming summaries, and a grounded Scene lane with promotion hints plus a safe clear-grounded action for staged backfill signals. (#63395) Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.title: QA/lab: 添加 character-vibes evaluation reports 使用 模型 selection 和 parallel runs so live QA can compare candidate behavior faster.
changes.rawTitle: QA/lab: add character-vibes evaluation reports with model selection and parallel runs so live QA can compare candidate behavior faster.

changes.title: Matrix/网关: wait 为了 Matrix sync readiness 之前 marking startup successful, keep Matrix background handler failures contained, 和 route fatal Matrix sync stops through channel-level restart handling 而不是 crashing the whole 网关. (#62779) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.rawTitle: iOS/Watch exec approvals: keep Apple Watch review and approval recovery working while the iPhone is locked or backgrounded, including reconnect recovery, pending approval persistence, notification cleanup, and APNs-backed watch refresh recovery. (#61757) Thanks @ngutman.

changes.rawTitle: Agents/context overflow: combine oversized and aggregate tool-result recovery in one pass and restore a total-context overflow backstop so recoverable sessions retry instead of failing early. (#61651) Thanks @Takhoffman.

changes.title: 认证/OpenAI Codex OAuth认证: reload fresh 在-disk credentials inside the locked refresh 路径 和 重试 once 之后 `refresh_token_reused` rotates only the stored refresh 令牌, so relogin/restart recovery stops getting stuck 在 stale cached 认证 state. Thanks @owen-ever.
changes.rawTitle: Auth/OpenAI Codex OAuth: reload fresh on-disk credentials inside the locked refresh path and retry once after `refresh_token_reused` rotates only the stored refresh token, so relogin/restart recovery stops getting stuck on stale cached auth state. Thanks @owen-ever.

changes.title: 认证/OpenAI Codex OAuth认证: keep native `/模型 ...@profile` selections 在 the target session 和 honor explicit user-locked 认证 profiles even 当 per-Agent 认证 order excludes them. (#62744) Thanks @jalehman.
changes.rawTitle: Auth/OpenAI Codex OAuth: keep native `/model ...@profile` selections on the target session and honor explicit user-locked auth profiles even when per-agent auth order excludes them. (#62744) Thanks @jalehman.

changes.title: Nodes/exec approvals: keep `host=node` POSIX transport shell wrappers (`/bin/sh -lc ...`) aligned 使用 inner-命令 allowlist analysis so allowlisted scripts 停止 prompting unnecessarily, while Windows `cmd.exe` wrapper runs stay approval-gated. (#62401) Thanks @ngutman.
changes.rawTitle: Nodes/exec approvals: keep `host=node` POSIX transport shell wrappers (`/bin/sh -lc ...`) aligned with inner-command allowlist analysis so allowlisted scripts stop prompting unnecessarily, while Windows `cmd.exe` wrapper runs stay approval-gated. (#62401) Thanks @ngutman.

changes.title: Nodes/exec approvals: keep Windows `cmd.exe /c` wrapper runs approval-gated even 当 `env` carriers, including env-assignment carriers, wrap the shell invocation. (#62439) Thanks @ngutman.
changes.rawTitle: Nodes/exec approvals: keep Windows `cmd.exe /c` wrapper runs approval-gated even when `env` carriers, including env-assignment carriers, wrap the shell invocation. (#62439) Thanks @ngutman.

changes.title: 网关 工具/exec 配置: block 模型-facing `网关 配置.apply` 和 `配置.patch` writes 从 changing exec approval paths such as `safeBins`, `safeBinProfiles`, `safeBinTrustedDirs`, 和 `strictInlineEval`, while still allowing unchanged structured values through. (#62001) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway tool/exec config: block model-facing `gateway config.apply` and `config.patch` writes from changing exec approval paths such as `safeBins`, `safeBinProfiles`, `safeBinTrustedDirs`, and `strictInlineEval`, while still allowing unchanged structured values through. (#62001) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: Host exec/env sanitization: block dangerous Java, Rust, Cargo, Git, Kubernetes, cloud credential, 配置-路径, 和 Helm env overrides so host-run tools cannot be redirected to attacker-chosen code, 配置, credentials, 或 repository state. (#59119, #62002, #62291) Thanks @eleqtrizit 和 contributors.
changes.rawTitle: Host exec/env sanitization: block dangerous Java, Rust, Cargo, Git, Kubernetes, cloud credential, config-path, and Helm env overrides so host-run tools cannot be redirected to attacker-chosen code, config, credentials, or repository state. (#59119, #62002, #62291) Thanks @eleqtrizit and contributors.

changes.title: Commands/allowlist: require owner authorization 为了 `/allowlist 添加` 和 `/allowlist 移除` 之前 channel resolution, so non-owner 但是 命令-authorized senders can no longer persistently rewrite allowlist policy state. (#62383) Thanks @pgondhi987.
changes.rawTitle: Commands/allowlist: require owner authorization for `/allowlist add` and `/allowlist remove` before channel resolution, so non-owner but command-authorized senders can no longer persistently rewrite allowlist policy state. (#62383) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.title: 飞书/docx uploads: honor `tools.fs.workspaceOnly` 为了 local `upload_file` 和 `upload_image` paths 通过 forwarding workspace-constrained `localRoots` 进入 the media loader, so docx uploads can no longer read host-local files outside the workspace 当 workspace-only mode is active. (#62369) Thanks @pgondhi987.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu/docx uploads: honor `tools.fs.workspaceOnly` for local `upload_file` and `upload_image` paths by forwarding workspace-constrained `localRoots` into the media loader, so docx uploads can no longer read host-local files outside the workspace when workspace-only mode is active. (#62369) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.title: Network/fetch guard: drop request bodies 和 body-describing headers 在 cross-origin `307` 和 `308` redirects 通过 default, so attacker-controlled redirect hops cannot receive secret-bearing POST payloads 从 SSRF-guarded fetch flows unless a caller explicitly opts 在. (#62357) Thanks @pgondhi987.
changes.rawTitle: Network/fetch guard: drop request bodies and body-describing headers on cross-origin `307` and `308` redirects by default, so attacker-controlled redirect hops cannot receive secret-bearing POST payloads from SSRF-guarded fetch flows unless a caller explicitly opts in. (#62357) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.title: 浏览器/SSRF: treat main-frame `document` redirect hops as navigations even 当 Playwright does not flag them as `isNavigationRequest()`, so strict private-network blocking still stops forbidden redirect pivots 之前 the 浏览器 reaches the internal target. (#62355) Thanks @pgondhi987.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/SSRF: treat main-frame `document` redirect hops as navigations even when Playwright does not flag them as `isNavigationRequest()`, so strict private-network blocking still stops forbidden redirect pivots before the browser reaches the internal target. (#62355) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.title: 浏览器/node invoke: block persistent 浏览器 profile create, reset, 和 delete mutations through `浏览器.代理` 在 both 网关-forwarded `node.invoke` 和 the node-host 代理 路径, even 当 no profile allowlist is configured. (#60489)
changes.rawTitle: Browser/node invoke: block persistent browser profile create, reset, and delete mutations through `browser.proxy` on both gateway-forwarded `node.invoke` and the node-host proxy path, even when no profile allowlist is configured. (#60489)

changes.title: 网关/node pairing: require a fresh pairing request 当 a previously paired node reconnects 使用 additional declared commands, 和 keep the live session pinned to the earlier approved 命令 set until the upgrade is approved. (#62658) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/node pairing: require a fresh pairing request when a previously paired node reconnects with additional declared commands, and keep the live session pinned to the earlier approved command set until the upgrade is approved. (#62658) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: 网关/认证: invalidate existing shared-令牌 和 password WebSocket sessions 当 the configured secret rotates, so stale authenticated sockets cannot stay attached 之后 令牌 或 password changes. (#62350) Thanks @pgondhi987.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/auth: invalidate existing shared-token and password WebSocket sessions when the configured secret rotates, so stale authenticated sockets cannot stay attached after token or password changes. (#62350) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.title: MS Teams/安全: validate file-consent upload URLs against HTTPS, Microsoft/SharePoint host allowlists, 和 private-IP DNS checks 之前 uploading attachments, blocking SSRF-style consent-upload abuse. (#23596)
changes.rawTitle: MS Teams/security: validate file-consent upload URLs against HTTPS, Microsoft/SharePoint host allowlists, and private-IP DNS checks before uploading attachments, blocking SSRF-style consent-upload abuse. (#23596)

changes.title: Media/base64 decode guards: enforce byte limits 之前 decoding missed base64-backed Teams, Signal, QQ Bot, 和 image-工具 payloads so oversized inbound media 和 data URLs no longer bypass pre-decode size checks. (#62007) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Media/base64 decode guards: enforce byte limits before decoding missed base64-backed Teams, Signal, QQ Bot, and image-tool payloads so oversized inbound media and data URLs no longer bypass pre-decode size checks. (#62007) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: Runtime event trust: mark background `notifyOnExit` summaries, ACP parent-stream relays, 和 wake-hook payloads as untrusted system events so lower-trust runtime output no longer re-enters later turns as trusted `System:` text. (#62003)

changes.rawTitle: Auto-reply/media: allow managed generated-media `MEDIA:` paths from normal reply text again while still blocking arbitrary host-local media and document paths, so generated media keep delivering without reopening host-path injection holes.

changes.title: Docker/插件: 停止 forcing bundled 插件 discovery to `/app/extensions` 在 runtime images so packaged installs use compiled `dist/extensions` artifacts 重新 和 Node 24 containers do not boot through source-only 插件 entry paths. 修复 #62044. (#62316) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Docker/plugins: stop forcing bundled plugin discovery to `/app/extensions` in runtime images so packaged installs use compiled `dist/extensions` artifacts again and Node 24 containers do not boot through source-only plugin entry paths. Fixes #62044. (#62316) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Providers/Ollama: honor the selected provider's `baseUrl` 期间 streaming so multi-Ollama setups 停止 routing every stream to the first configured Ollama endpoint. (#61678)
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Ollama: honor the selected provider's `baseUrl` during streaming so multi-Ollama setups stop routing every stream to the first configured Ollama endpoint. (#61678)

changes.title: Providers/Ollama: 停止 warning that Ollama could not be reached 当 discovery only sees empty default local stubs, while still keeping real explicit Ollama overrides loud 当 the endpoint is unreachable.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Ollama: stop warning that Ollama could not be reached when discovery only sees empty default local stubs, while still keeping real explicit Ollama overrides loud when the endpoint is unreachable.

changes.title: Providers/xAI: recognize `API.grok.x.ai` as an xAI-native endpoint 重新 和 keep legacy `x_search` 认证 resolution working so older xAI web-search configs continue to load. (#61377) Thanks @jjjojoj.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/xAI: recognize `api.grok.x.ai` as an xAI-native endpoint again and keep legacy `x_search` auth resolution working so older xAI web-search configs continue to load. (#61377) Thanks @jjjojoj.

changes.title: Providers/Mistral: send `reasoning_effort` 为了 `Mistral/Mistral-small-latest` (Mistral Small 4) 使用 thinking-level mapping, 和 mark the catalog entry as reasoning-capable so adjustable reasoning matches Mistral’s Chat Completions API. (#62162) Thanks @neeravmakwana.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Mistral: send `reasoning_effort` for `mistral/mistral-small-latest` (Mistral Small 4) with thinking-level mapping, and mark the catalog entry as reasoning-capable so adjustable reasoning matches Mistral’s Chat Completions API. (#62162) Thanks @neeravmakwana.

changes.title: OpenAI TTS/Groq: send `wav` to Groq-compatible speech endpoints, honor explicit `responseFormat` overrides 在 OpenAI-compatible paths, 和 only mark 语音-note output as 语音-compatible 当 the actual format is `opus`. (#62233) Thanks @neeravmakwana.
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI TTS/Groq: send `wav` to Groq-compatible speech endpoints, honor explicit `responseFormat` overrides on OpenAI-compatible paths, and only mark voice-note output as voice-compatible when the actual format is `opus`. (#62233) Thanks @neeravmakwana.

changes.title: Tools/web_fetch 和 web_search: 修复 `TypeError: fetch failed` caused 通过 undici 8.0 enabling HTTP/2 通过 default; pinned SSRF-guard dispatchers 现在 explicitly set `allowH2: false` to restore HTTP/1.1 behavior 和 keep the custom DNS-pinning lookup compatible. (#61738, #61777) Thanks @zozo123.
changes.rawTitle: Tools/web_fetch and web_search: fix `TypeError: fetch failed` caused by undici 8.0 enabling HTTP/2 by default; pinned SSRF-guard dispatchers now explicitly set `allowH2: false` to restore HTTP/1.1 behavior and keep the custom DNS-pinning lookup compatible. (#61738, #61777) Thanks @zozo123.

changes.title: Tools/web search/Exa: show Exa Search 在 onboarding 和 configure provider pickers 重新 通过 marking the bundled Exa provider as setup-visible. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Tools/web search/Exa: show Exa Search in onboarding and configure provider pickers again by marking the bundled Exa provider as setup-visible. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/vector recall: surface explicit warnings 当 `sqlite-vec` is unavailable 或 vector writes are degraded, 和 strip managed Light Sleep 和 REM blocks 之前 daily-note ingestion so 内存 indexing 和 dreaming 停止 reporting false-success 或 re-ingesting staged output. (#61720) Thanks @MonkeyLeeT.

changes.rawTitle: Memory/dreaming: make Dreams config reads and writes respect the selected memory slot plugin instead of always targeting `memory-core`. (#62275) Thanks @SnowSky1.

changes.rawTitle: QQ Bot/media: route gateway-side attachment and fallback downloads through guarded QQ/Tencent HTTPS fetches so QQ media handling no longer follows arbitrary remote hosts.

changes.rawTitle: Browser/remote CDP: retry the DevTools websocket once after remote browser restarts so healthy remote browser profiles do not fail availability checks during CDP warm-up. (#57397) Thanks @ThanhNguyxn07.

changes.title: Agent/subagents: honor `sessions_spawn(lightContext: true)` 为了 spawned subagent runs 通过 preserving lightweight bootstrap context through the 网关 和 embedded runner 而不是 静默地 falling back to full workspace bootstrap injection. (#62264) Thanks @theSamPadilla.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/subagents: honor `sessions_spawn(lightContext: true)` for spawned subagent runs by preserving lightweight bootstrap context through the gateway and embedded runner instead of silently falling back to full workspace bootstrap injection. (#62264) Thanks @theSamPadilla.

changes.title: Cron: load `jobId` 进入 `id` 当 the 在-disk store omits `id`, matching 诊断工具 migration 和 fixing `unknown cron job id` 为了 hand-edited `jobs.json`. (#62246) Thanks @neeravmakwana.
changes.rawTitle: Cron: load `jobId` into `id` when the on-disk store omits `id`, matching doctor migration and fixing `unknown cron job id` for hand-edited `jobs.json`. (#62246) Thanks @neeravmakwana.

changes.title: Agent/模型 fallback: classify minimal HTTP 404 API errors (为了 example `404 status code (no body)`) as `model_not_found` so assistant failures throw 进入 the fallback chain 而不是 stopping at the first fallback candidate. (#62119) Thanks @neeravmakwana.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/model fallback: classify minimal HTTP 404 API errors (for example `404 status code (no body)`) as `model_not_found` so assistant failures throw into the fallback chain instead of stopping at the first fallback candidate. (#62119) Thanks @neeravmakwana.

changes.title: BlueBubbles/network: respect explicit private-network opt-out 为了 loopback 和 private `serverUrl` values across account resolution, status probes, monitor startup, 和 attachment downloads, while keeping public-host attachment hostname pinning intact. (#59373) Thanks @jpreagan.
changes.rawTitle: BlueBubbles/network: respect explicit private-network opt-out for loopback and private `serverUrl` values across account resolution, status probes, monitor startup, and attachment downloads, while keeping public-host attachment hostname pinning intact. (#59373) Thanks @jpreagan.

changes.title: Agent/compaction: 停止 compaction-wait aborts 从 re-entering prompt failover 和 replaying completed 工具 turns. (#62600) Thanks @i-dentifier.

changes.rawTitle: Approvals/runtime: move native approval lifecycle assembly into shared core bootstrap/runtime seams driven by channel capabilities and runtime contexts, and remove the legacy bundled approval fallback wiring. (#62135) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.rawTitle: Security/fetch-guard: stop rejecting operator-configured proxy hostnames against the target-scoped hostname allowlist in SSRF-guarded fetches, restoring proxy-based media downloads for Telegram and other channels. (#62312) Thanks @ademczuk.

changes.title: Logging: make `logging.level` 和 `logging.consoleLevel` honor the documented severity threshold ordering 重新, 和 keep child loggers inheriting the parent `minLevel`. (#44646) Thanks @zhumengzhu.
changes.rawTitle: Logging: make `logging.level` and `logging.consoleLevel` honor the documented severity threshold ordering again, and keep child loggers inheriting the parent `minLevel`. (#44646) Thanks @zhumengzhu.

changes.rawTitle: Agents/sessions_send: pass `threadId` through announce delivery so cross-session notifications land in the correct Telegram forum topic instead of the group's general thread. (#62758) Thanks @jalehman.

changes.rawTitle: Daemon/systemd: keep sudo systemctl calls scoped to the invoking user when machine-scoped systemctl fails, while still avoiding machine fallback for permission-denied user bus errors. (#62337) Thanks @Aftabbs.

changes.title: Sandbox/SSH: reject hardlinked files 期间 cross-device rename fallback so EXDEV file copies 保留 the same pinned file-boundary checks as direct reads.
changes.rawTitle: Sandbox/SSH: reject hardlinked files during cross-device rename fallback so EXDEV file copies preserve the same pinned file-boundary checks as direct reads.

changes.title: Control 界面: keep 停止 visible 期间 工具-only execution, 保留 pending-send busy state, 和 clear stale ClawHub search results as soon as the query changes. (#54528, #59800, #60267) Thanks @chziyue 和 @frankekn.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI: keep Stop visible during tool-only execution, preserve pending-send busy state, and clear stale ClawHub search results as soon as the query changes. (#54528, #59800, #60267) Thanks @chziyue and @frankekn.

changes.title: Control 界面/avatar: honor `界面.assistant.avatar` 当 serving `/avatar/:agentId` so Appearance 界面 avatar paths 停止 falling back to initials placeholders. (#60778) Thanks @hannasdev.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/avatar: honor `ui.assistant.avatar` when serving `/avatar/:agentId` so Appearance UI avatar paths stop falling back to initials placeholders. (#60778) Thanks @hannasdev.

changes.title: Control 界面/cron: highlight the Cron refresh button while refresh is 在 flight so the page's loading state stays visible even 当 prior data remains 在 screen. (#60394) Thanks @coder-zhuzm.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/cron: highlight the Cron refresh button while refresh is in flight so the page's loading state stays visible even when prior data remains on screen. (#60394) Thanks @coder-zhuzm.

changes.title: Control 界面/Overview: 防止 网关 access 令牌/password visibility toggle buttons 从 overlapping their inputs at narrow widths. (#56924) Thanks @bbddbb1.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/Overview: prevent gateway access token/password visibility toggle buttons from overlapping their inputs at narrow widths. (#56924) Thanks @bbddbb1.

changes.title: Auto-reply: unify reply lifecycle ownership across preflight compaction, session rotation, CLI-backed runs, 和 网关 restart handling so `/停止` 和 same-session overlap checks target the right active turn 和 restart-interrupted turns return the restart notice 而不是 being 静默地 dropped. (#61267) Thanks @dutifulbob.
changes.rawTitle: Auto-reply: unify reply lifecycle ownership across preflight compaction, session rotation, CLI-backed runs, and gateway restart handling so `/stop` and same-session overlap checks target the right active turn and restart-interrupted turns return the restart notice instead of being silently dropped. (#61267) Thanks @dutifulbob.

changes.title: Reply delivery: 防止 duplicate block replies 在 `text_end` channels so providers that emit explicit text-end boundaries no longer double-send the same final message. (#61530)
changes.rawTitle: Reply delivery: prevent duplicate block replies on `text_end` channels so providers that emit explicit text-end boundaries no longer double-send the same final message. (#61530)

changes.title: 网关/startup: default `网关.mode` to `local` 当 unset, detect PID recycling 在 网关 lock files 在 Windows 和 macOS, 和 show startup progress so healthy restarts 停止 getting blocked 通过 stale locks. (#54801, #60085, #59843) Thanks @BradGroux 和 @TonyDerek-dot.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: default `gateway.mode` to `local` when unset, detect PID recycling in gateway lock files on Windows and macOS, and show startup progress so healthy restarts stop getting blocked by stale locks. (#54801, #60085, #59843) Thanks @BradGroux and @TonyDerek-dot.

changes.title: 网关/macOS: let launchd `KeepAlive` own 在-process 网关 restarts 重新, adding a short supervised-exit delay so rapid restarts 避免 launchd 崩溃-loop unloads while `openclaw 网关 restart` still reports real LaunchAgent errors synchronously.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/macOS: let launchd `KeepAlive` own in-process gateway restarts again, adding a short supervised-exit delay so rapid restarts avoid launchd crash-loop unloads while `openclaw gateway restart` still reports real LaunchAgent errors synchronously.

changes.title: 网关/macOS: re-bootstrap the LaunchAgent if `launchctl kickstart -k` unloads it 期间 restart so failed restarts do not leave the 网关 unmanaged until manual repair.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/macOS: re-bootstrap the LaunchAgent if `launchctl kickstart -k` unloads it during restart so failed restarts do not leave the gateway unmanaged until manual repair.

changes.title: 网关/macOS: recover installed-但是-unloaded LaunchAgents 期间 `openclaw 网关 start` 和 `restart`, while still preferring live unmanaged gateways 期间 restart recovery. (#43766) Thanks @HenryC-3.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/macOS: recover installed-but-unloaded LaunchAgents during `openclaw gateway start` and `restart`, while still preferring live unmanaged gateways during restart recovery. (#43766) Thanks @HenryC-3.

changes.title: 网关/Windows scheduled tasks: 保留 Task Scheduler settings 在 reinstall, fail loudly 当 `/Run` does not start, 和 report fast failed restarts accurately 而不是 pretending they timed out 之后 60 seconds. (#59335) Thanks @tmimmanuel.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/Windows scheduled tasks: preserve Task Scheduler settings on reinstall, fail loudly when `/Run` does not start, and report fast failed restarts accurately instead of pretending they timed out after 60 seconds. (#59335) Thanks @tmimmanuel.

changes.title: Windows/restart: fall back to the installed Startup-entry launcher 当 the scheduled task was never registered, so `/restart` can relaunch the 网关 在 Windows setups where `schtasks` install fell back 期间 onboarding. (#58943) Thanks @imechZhangLY.
changes.rawTitle: Windows/restart: fall back to the installed Startup-entry launcher when the scheduled task was never registered, so `/restart` can relaunch the gateway on Windows setups where `schtasks` install fell back during onboarding. (#58943) Thanks @imechZhangLY.

changes.title: Windows/restart: clean up stale 网关 listeners 之前 Windows self-restart 和 treat listener 和 argv probe failures as inconclusive, so scheduled-task relaunch no longer falls 进入 an `EADDRINUSE` 重试 loop. (#60480) Thanks @arifahmedjoy.
changes.rawTitle: Windows/restart: clean up stale gateway listeners before Windows self-restart and treat listener and argv probe failures as inconclusive, so scheduled-task relaunch no longer falls into an `EADDRINUSE` retry loop. (#60480) Thanks @arifahmedjoy.

changes.title: 更新/npm: prefer the npm binary that owns the installed global OpenClaw prefix so mixed Homebrew-plus-nvm setups 更新 the right install. (#60153) Thanks @jayeshp19.
changes.rawTitle: Update/npm: prefer the npm binary that owns the installed global OpenClaw prefix so mixed Homebrew-plus-nvm setups update the right install. (#60153) Thanks @jayeshp19.

changes.title: Agent/music 和 video generation: 添加 `tools.media.asyncCompletion.directSend` as an opt-在 direct-delivery 路径 为了 finished async media tasks, while keeping the legacy requester-session wake/模型-delivery flow as the default.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/music and video generation: add `tools.media.asyncCompletion.directSend` as an opt-in direct-delivery path for finished async media tasks, while keeping the legacy requester-session wake/model-delivery flow as the default.

changes.title: CLI/skills JSON: route `skills list --json`, `skills info --json`, 和 `skills check --json` output to stdout 而不是 stderr so machine-readable consumers receive JSON 在 the expected stream 重新. (#60914; 修复 #57599; landed 从 contributor PR #57611 通过 @Aftabbs) Thanks @Aftabbs.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/skills JSON: route `skills list --json`, `skills info --json`, and `skills check --json` output to stdout instead of stderr so machine-readable consumers receive JSON on the expected stream again. (#60914; fixes #57599; landed from contributor PR #57611 by @Aftabbs) Thanks @Aftabbs.

changes.title: CLI/Commander: 保留 Commander-computed exit codes 为了 argument 和 help-错误 paths, 和 cover the user-argv parse mode 在 the regression tests so invalid CLI invocations no longer report success 当 exits are intercepted. (#60923) Thanks @Linux2010.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/Commander: preserve Commander-computed exit codes for argument and help-error paths, and cover the user-argv parse mode in the regression tests so invalid CLI invocations no longer report success when exits are intercepted. (#60923) Thanks @Linux2010.

changes.title: Cron: replay interrupted recurring jobs 在 the first 网关 restart 而不是 waiting 为了 a second restart. (#60583) Thanks @joelnishanth.
changes.rawTitle: Cron: replay interrupted recurring jobs on the first gateway restart instead of waiting for a second restart. (#60583) Thanks @joelnishanth.

changes.title: Cron: send failure notifications through the job's primary delivery channel using the same session context as successful delivery 当 no explicit `failureDestination` is configured. (#60622) Thanks @artwalker.
changes.rawTitle: Cron: send failure notifications through the job's primary delivery channel using the same session context as successful delivery when no explicit `failureDestination` is configured. (#60622) Thanks @artwalker.

changes.title: Exec/remote skills: 停止 advertising `exec host=node` 当 the current exec policy cannot route to a node, 和 clarify blocked exec-host override errors 使用 both the requested host 和 allowed 配置 路径.
changes.rawTitle: Exec/remote skills: stop advertising `exec host=node` when the current exec policy cannot route to a node, and clarify blocked exec-host override errors with both the requested host and allowed config path.

changes.title: Agent/Claude CLI/安全: clear inherited Claude Code 配置-root 和 插件-root env overrides like `CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR` 和 `CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN_*`, so OpenClaw-launched Claude CLI runs cannot be 静默地 pointed at an alternate Claude 配置/插件 tree 使用 different hooks, 插件, 或 认证 context. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Claude CLI/security: clear inherited Claude Code config-root and plugin-root env overrides like `CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR` and `CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN_*`, so OpenClaw-launched Claude CLI runs cannot be silently pointed at an alternate Claude config/plugin tree with different hooks, plugins, or auth context. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/Claude CLI/安全: clear inherited Claude Code provider-routing 和 managed-认证 env overrides, 和 mark OpenClaw-launched Claude CLI runs as host-managed, so Claude CLI backdoor sessions cannot be 静默地 redirected to 代理, Bedrock, Vertex, Foundry, 或 parent-managed 令牌 contexts. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Claude CLI/security: clear inherited Claude Code provider-routing and managed-auth env overrides, and mark OpenClaw-launched Claude CLI runs as host-managed, so Claude CLI backdoor sessions cannot be silently redirected to proxy, Bedrock, Vertex, Foundry, or parent-managed token contexts. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/Claude CLI/安全: force host-managed Claude CLI backdoor runs to `--设置-sources user`, even under custom backend arg overrides, so repo-local `.claude` project/local settings, hooks, 和 插件 discovery do not 静默地 execute inside non-interactive OpenClaw sessions. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Claude CLI/security: force host-managed Claude CLI backdoor runs to `--setting-sources user`, even under custom backend arg overrides, so repo-local `.claude` project/local settings, hooks, and plugin discovery do not silently execute inside non-interactive OpenClaw sessions. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/Claude CLI: treat malformed bare `--permission-mode` backend overrides as missing 和 fail safe back to `bypassPermissions`, so custom `cliBackends.claude-CLI.args` 安全 配置 cannot accidentally consume the next flag as a bogus permission mode. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Claude CLI: treat malformed bare `--permission-mode` backend overrides as missing and fail safe back to `bypassPermissions`, so custom `cliBackends.claude-cli.args` security config cannot accidentally consume the next flag as a bogus permission mode. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/device pairing: require non-admin paired-device sessions to manage only their own device 为了 令牌 rotate/revoke 和 paired-device removal, blocking cross-device 令牌 theft inside pairing-scoped sessions. (#50627) Thanks @coygeek.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/device pairing: require non-admin paired-device sessions to manage only their own device for token rotate/revoke and paired-device removal, blocking cross-device token theft inside pairing-scoped sessions. (#50627) Thanks @coygeek.

changes.title: 网关/插件 routes: keep 网关-认证 插件 runtime routes 在 write-only fallback scopes unless a trusted-代理 caller explicitly declares narrower `x-openclaw-scopes`, so 插件 HTTP handlers no longer mint admin-level runtime scopes 在 missing 或 untrusted HTTP scope headers. (#59815) Thanks @pgondhi987.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/plugin routes: keep gateway-auth plugin runtime routes on write-only fallback scopes unless a trusted-proxy caller explicitly declares narrower `x-openclaw-scopes`, so plugin HTTP handlers no longer mint admin-level runtime scopes on missing or untrusted HTTP scope headers. (#59815) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.title: Build/types: 修复 the Node `createRequire(...)` helper typing so provider-runtime lazy loads compile cleanly 重新 和 `pnpm build` no longer fails 在 the Pi embedded provider 错误-pattern 路径.
changes.rawTitle: Build/types: fix the Node `createRequire(...)` helper typing so provider-runtime lazy loads compile cleanly again and `pnpm build` no longer fails in the Pi embedded provider error-pattern path.

changes.title: 网关/安全: scope loopback 浏览器-origin 认证 throttling 通过 normalized origin so one localhost Control 界面 tab cannot lock out a different localhost 浏览器 origin 之后 repeated 认证 failures.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/security: scope loopback browser-origin auth throttling by normalized origin so one localhost Control UI tab cannot lock out a different localhost browser origin after repeated auth failures.

changes.title: 网关/认证: serialize async shared-secret 认证 attempts per client so concurrent Tailscale-capable failures cannot overrun the intended 认证 rate-limit budget. Thanks @Telecaster2147.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/auth: serialize async shared-secret auth attempts per client so concurrent Tailscale-capable failures cannot overrun the intended auth rate-limit budget. Thanks @Telecaster2147.

changes.title: Device pairing/安全: keep non-operator device scope checks bound to the requested role prefix so bootstrap verification cannot redeem `operator.*` scopes through `node` 认证. (#57258) Thanks @jlapenna.
changes.rawTitle: Device pairing/security: keep non-operator device scope checks bound to the requested role prefix so bootstrap verification cannot redeem `operator.*` scopes through `node` auth. (#57258) Thanks @jlapenna.

changes.title: Device pairing: reject rotating device tokens 进入 roles that were never approved 期间 pairing, 和 keep reconnect role checks bounded to the paired device's approved role set. (#60462) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Device pairing: reject rotating device tokens into roles that were never approved during pairing, and keep reconnect role checks bounded to the paired device's approved role set. (#60462) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: 网关/device 认证: 复用 cached device-令牌 scopes only 为了 cached-令牌 reconnects, while keeping explicit `deviceToken` scope requests 和 empty-cache fallbacks intact so reconnects 保留 `operator.read` 不适用 破坏性变更 explicit 认证 flows. (#46032) Thanks @caicongyang.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/device auth: reuse cached device-token scopes only for cached-token reconnects, while keeping explicit `deviceToken` scope requests and empty-cache fallbacks intact so reconnects preserve `operator.read` without breaking explicit auth flows. (#46032) Thanks @caicongyang.

changes.title: Mobile pairing/安全: fail closed 为了 internal `/pair` setup-code issuance, cleanup, 和 approval paths 当 网关 pairing scopes are missing, 和 keep approval-time requested-scope enforcement 在 the internal 命令 路径. (#55996) Thanks @coygeek.
changes.rawTitle: Mobile pairing/security: fail closed for internal `/pair` setup-code issuance, cleanup, and approval paths when gateway pairing scopes are missing, and keep approval-time requested-scope enforcement on the internal command path. (#55996) Thanks @coygeek.

changes.title: Mobile pairing/bootstrap: keep QR bootstrap handoff tokens bounded to the mobile-safe contract so node handoff stays unscoped 和 operator handoff drops mixed `node.*`, `operator.admin`, 和 `operator.pairing` scopes.
changes.rawTitle: Mobile pairing/bootstrap: keep QR bootstrap handoff tokens bounded to the mobile-safe contract so node handoff stays unscoped and operator handoff drops mixed `node.*`, `operator.admin`, and `operator.pairing` scopes.

changes.title: Mobile pairing/Android: tighten secure endpoint handling so Tailscale 和 public remote setup reject cleartext endpoints, private LAN pairing still works, merged-role approvals mint both node 和 operator device tokens, 和 bootstrap tokens survive node auto-pair until operator approval finishes. (#60128, #60208, #60221) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Mobile pairing/Android: tighten secure endpoint handling so Tailscale and public remote setup reject cleartext endpoints, private LAN pairing still works, merged-role approvals mint both node and operator device tokens, and bootstrap tokens survive node auto-pair until operator approval finishes. (#60128, #60208, #60221) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: Android/canvas 安全: require exact normalized A2UI URL matches 之前 forwarding canvas bridge actions, rejecting query mismatches 和 descendant paths while still allowing fragment-only A2UI navigation.
changes.rawTitle: Android/canvas security: require exact normalized A2UI URL matches before forwarding canvas bridge actions, rejecting query mismatches and descendant paths while still allowing fragment-only A2UI navigation.

changes.title: Synology Chat/安全: default low-level HTTPS helper TLS verification to 在 so helper/API defaults match the shipped safe account default, 和 only explicit `allowInsecureSsl: true` opts out.
changes.rawTitle: Synology Chat/security: default low-level HTTPS helper TLS verification to on so helper/API defaults match the shipped safe account default, and only explicit `allowInsecureSsl: true` opts out.

changes.title: Synology Chat/安全: route Webhook 令牌 comparison through the shared constant-time secret helper 为了 consistency 使用 other bundled 插件.
changes.rawTitle: Synology Chat/security: route webhook token comparison through the shared constant-time secret helper for consistency with other bundled plugins.

changes.title: 插件/marketplace: block remote marketplace symlink escapes 不适用 破坏性变更 ordinary local marketplace install paths. (#60556) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/marketplace: block remote marketplace symlink escapes without breaking ordinary local marketplace install paths. (#60556) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: Telegram/local Bot API: honor `channels.Telegram.apiRoot` 为了 buffered media downloads, 添加 `channels.Telegram.network.dangerouslyAllowPrivateNetwork` 为了 trusted fake-IP setups, 和 require `channels.Telegram.trustedLocalFileRoots` 之前 reading absolute Bot API `file_path` values. (#59544, #60705) Thanks @SARAMALI15792 和 @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/local Bot API: honor `channels.telegram.apiRoot` for buffered media downloads, add `channels.telegram.network.dangerouslyAllowPrivateNetwork` for trusted fake-IP setups, and require `channels.telegram.trustedLocalFileRoots` before reading absolute Bot API `file_path` values. (#59544, #60705) Thanks @SARAMALI15792 and @obviyus.

changes.title: Outbound/sanitizer: strip leaked `<tool_call>`, `<function_calls>`, 和 模型 special tokens 从 shared user-visible assistant text, including truncated 工具-call streams, so internal scaffolding no longer bleeds 进入 replies across surfaces. (#60619) Thanks @oliviareid-svg.
changes.rawTitle: Outbound/sanitizer: strip leaked `<tool_call>`, `<function_calls>`, and model special tokens from shared user-visible assistant text, including truncated tool-call streams, so internal scaffolding no longer bleeds into replies across surfaces. (#60619) Thanks @oliviareid-svg.

changes.title: Agent/errors: surface an explicit disk-full message 当 local session 或 transcript writes fail 使用 `ENOSPC`/`disk full`, so those runs 停止 degrading 进入 opaque `NO_REPLY`-style failures. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/errors: surface an explicit disk-full message when local session or transcript writes fail with `ENOSPC`/`disk full`, so those runs stop degrading into opaque `NO_REPLY`-style failures. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Exec approvals: 移除 heuristic 命令-obfuscation gating 从 host exec so 网关 和 node runs rely 在 explicit policy, allowlist, 和 strict inline-eval rules only.
changes.rawTitle: Exec approvals: remove heuristic command-obfuscation gating from host exec so gateway and node runs rely on explicit policy, allowlist, and strict inline-eval rules only.

changes.title: Agent/工具 results: cap live 工具-result persistence 和 overflow-recovery truncation at 40k characters so oversized 工具 output stays bounded 不适用 discarding recent context entirely.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/tool results: cap live tool-result persistence and overflow-recovery truncation at 40k characters so oversized tool output stays bounded without discarding recent context entirely.

changes.title: Discord/video replies: split text-plus-video deliveries 进入 a text reply followed 通过 a media-only send, 和 let live provider 认证 checks honor manifest-declared API 密钥 env vars like `MODELSTUDIO_API_KEY`.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/video replies: split text-plus-video deliveries into a text reply followed by a media-only send, and let live provider auth checks honor manifest-declared API key env vars like `MODELSTUDIO_API_KEY`.

changes.title: 配置/All Settings: keep the raw 配置 view intact 当 sensitive fields are blank 而不是 corrupting 或 dropping the rendered snapshot. (#28214) Thanks @solodmd.
changes.rawTitle: Config/All Settings: keep the raw config view intact when sensitive fields are blank instead of corrupting or dropping the rendered snapshot. (#28214) Thanks @solodmd.

changes.title: 插件 SDK/facades: back-fill bundled 插件 facade sentinels 之前 插件-id tracking re-enters 配置 loading, so CLI/provider startup no longer crashes 使用 `shouldNormalizeGoogleProviderConfig is not a function` 或 other empty-facade reads 期间 bundled 插件 re-entry. Thanks @adam91holt.
changes.rawTitle: Plugin SDK/facades: back-fill bundled plugin facade sentinels before plugin-id tracking re-enters config loading, so CLI/provider startup no longer crashes with `shouldNormalizeGoogleProviderConfig is not a function` or other empty-facade reads during bundled plugin re-entry. Thanks @adam91holt.

changes.title: 插件/facades: back-fill facade sentinels 之前 tracked-插件 resolution re-enters 配置 loading, so facade exports stay defined 期间 circular provider normalization. (#61180) Thanks @adam91holt.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/facades: back-fill facade sentinels before tracked-plugin resolution re-enters config loading, so facade exports stay defined during circular provider normalization. (#61180) Thanks @adam91holt.

changes.title: QA lab: restore typed mock OpenAI 网关 配置 wiring so QA-lab 配置 helpers compile cleanly 重新 和 `pnpm check` / `pnpm build` stay green.
changes.rawTitle: QA lab: restore typed mock OpenAI gateway config wiring so QA-lab config helpers compile cleanly again and `pnpm check` / `pnpm build` stay green.

changes.title: Discord/image generation: include the real generated `MEDIA:` paths 在 工具 output 和 避免 duplicate plain-output media requeueing so Discord image replies 停止 pointing at missing local files.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/image generation: include the real generated `MEDIA:` paths in tool output and avoid duplicate plain-output media requeueing so Discord image replies stop pointing at missing local files.

changes.title: Slack: route live DM replies back to the concrete inbound DM channel while keeping persisted routing metadata user-scoped, so normal assistant replies 停止 disappearing 当 pairing 和 system messages still arrive. (#59030) Thanks @afurm.
changes.rawTitle: Slack: route live DM replies back to the concrete inbound DM channel while keeping persisted routing metadata user-scoped, so normal assistant replies stop disappearing when pairing and system messages still arrive. (#59030) Thanks @afurm.

changes.title: Discord/reply tags: strip leaked `[[reply_to_current]]` control tags 从 preview text 和 honor explicit reply-tag threading 期间 final delivery, so Discord replies stay attached to the triggering message 而不是 printing reply metadata 进入 chat.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/reply tags: strip leaked `[[reply_to_current]]` control tags from preview text and honor explicit reply-tag threading during final delivery, so Discord replies stay attached to the triggering message instead of printing reply metadata into chat.

changes.title: Telegram: 修复 current-模型 checks 在 the 模型 picker, HTML-format non-default `/模型` confirmations, explicit topic replies, persisted reaction ownership across restarts, caption-media placeholder 和 `file_id` preservation 在 download failure, 和 upgraded-install inbound image reads. (#60384, #60042, #59634, #59207, #59948, #59971) Thanks @sfuminya, @GitZhangChi, @dashhuang, @samzong, @v1p0r, 和 @neeravmakwana.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram: fix current-model checks in the model picker, HTML-format non-default `/model` confirmations, explicit topic replies, persisted reaction ownership across restarts, caption-media placeholder and `file_id` preservation on download failure, and upgraded-install inbound image reads. (#60384, #60042, #59634, #59207, #59948, #59971) Thanks @sfuminya, @GitZhangChi, @dashhuang, @samzong, @v1p0r, and @neeravmakwana.

changes.rawTitle: Telegram: restore DM voice-note preflight transcription so direct-message audio stops arriving as raw `<media:audio>` placeholders. (#61008) Thanks @manueltarouca.

changes.title: Telegram/reasoning: only create a Telegram reasoning preview lane 当 the session is explicitly `reasoning:stream`, so hidden `<think>` traces 从 streamed replies 停止 surfacing as chat previews 在 normal sessions. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/reasoning: only create a Telegram reasoning preview lane when the session is explicitly `reasoning:stream`, so hidden `<think>` traces from streamed replies stop surfacing as chat previews on normal sessions. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Telegram/native command menu: trim long menu descriptions before dropping commands so sub-100 command sets can still fit Telegram's payload budget and keep more `/` entries visible. (#61129) Thanks @neeravmakwana.

changes.title: 飞书/reasoning: only expose streamed reasoning previews 当 the session is explicitly `reasoning:stream`, so hidden reasoning traces do not surface 在 normal streaming sessions. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu/reasoning: only expose streamed reasoning previews when the session is explicitly `reasoning:stream`, so hidden reasoning traces do not surface on normal streaming sessions. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Discord: keep REST, Webhook, 和 monitor traffic 在 the configured 代理, 保留 component-only media sends, honor `@everyone` 和 `@here` mention gates, keep ACK reactions 在 the active account, 和 split 语音 connect/playback timeouts so auto-join is more reliable. (#57465, #60361, #60345) Thanks @geekhuashan.
changes.rawTitle: Discord: keep REST, webhook, and monitor traffic on the configured proxy, preserve component-only media sends, honor `@everyone` and `@here` mention gates, keep ACK reactions on the active account, and split voice connect/playback timeouts so auto-join is more reliable. (#57465, #60361, #60345) Thanks @geekhuashan.
