changes.title: Exec/runtime: treat `tools.exec.host=auto` as routing-only, keep implicit no-配置 exec 在 sandbox 当 available 或 网关 otherwise, 和 reject per-call host overrides that would bypass the configured sandbox 或 host target. (#58897) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Exec/runtime: treat `tools.exec.host=auto` as routing-only, keep implicit no-config exec on sandbox when available or gateway otherwise, and reject per-call host overrides that would bypass the configured sandbox or host target. (#58897) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Slack/mrkdwn formatting: 添加 built-在 Slack mrkdwn guidance 在 inbound context so Slack replies 停止 falling back to generic Markdown patterns that render poorly 在 Slack. (#59100) Thanks @jadewon.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/mrkdwn formatting: add built-in Slack mrkdwn guidance in inbound context so Slack replies stop falling back to generic Markdown patterns that render poorly in Slack. (#59100) Thanks @jadewon.

changes.title: WhatsApp/presence: send `unavailable` presence 在 connect 在 self-chat mode so personal-phone users 停止 losing all push notifications while the 网关 is running. (#59410) Thanks @mcaxtr.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp/presence: send `unavailable` presence on connect in self-chat mode so personal-phone users stop losing all push notifications while the gateway is running. (#59410) Thanks @mcaxtr.

changes.title: WhatsApp/media: 添加 HTML, XML, 和 CSS to the MIME map 和 fall back gracefully 为了 unknown media types 而不是 dropping the attachment. (#51562) Thanks @bobbyt74.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp/media: add HTML, XML, and CSS to the MIME map and fall back gracefully for unknown media types instead of dropping the attachment. (#51562) Thanks @bobbyt74.

changes.title: Matrix/onboarding: restore guided setup 在 `openclaw channels 添加` 和 `openclaw configure --section channels`, while keeping custom 插件 wizards 在 the shared `setupWizard` seam. (#59462) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/onboarding: restore guided setup in `openclaw channels add` and `openclaw configure --section channels`, while keeping custom plugin wizards on the shared `setupWizard` seam. (#59462) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Matrix/streaming: keep live partial previews 为了 the current assistant block while preserving completed block updates as separate messages 当 `channels.matrix.blockStreaming` is enabled. (#59384) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/streaming: keep live partial previews for the current assistant block while preserving completed block updates as separate messages when `channels.matrix.blockStreaming` is enabled. (#59384) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: 飞书/comment threads: harden document comment-thread delivery so whole-document comments fall back to `add_comment`, delayed reply lookups 重试 more reliably, 和 user-visible replies 避免 reasoning/planning spillover. (#59129) Thanks @wittam-01.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu/comment threads: harden document comment-thread delivery so whole-document comments fall back to `add_comment`, delayed reply lookups retry more reliably, and user-visible replies avoid reasoning/planning spillover. (#59129) Thanks @wittam-01.

changes.title: MS Teams/streaming: strip already-streamed text 从 fallback block delivery 当 replies exceed the 4000-character streaming limit so long responses 停止 duplicating content. (#59297) Thanks @bradgroux.
changes.rawTitle: MS Teams/streaming: strip already-streamed text from fallback block delivery when replies exceed the 4000-character streaming limit so long responses stop duplicating content. (#59297) Thanks @bradgroux.

changes.title: Slack/thread context: filter thread starter 和 history 通过 the effective conversation allowlist 不适用 dropping valid open-room, DM, 或 group DM context. (#58380) Thanks @jacobtomlinson.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/thread context: filter thread starter and history by the effective conversation allowlist without dropping valid open-room, DM, or group DM context. (#58380) Thanks @jacobtomlinson.

changes.title: Mattermost/probes: route status probes through the SSRF guard 和 honor `allowPrivateNetwork` so connectivity checks stay safe 为了 self-hosted Mattermost deployments. (#58529) Thanks @mappel-nv.
changes.rawTitle: Mattermost/probes: route status probes through the SSRF guard and honor `allowPrivateNetwork` so connectivity checks stay safe for self-hosted Mattermost deployments. (#58529) Thanks @mappel-nv.

changes.title: Zalo/Webhook replay: scope replay dedupe 密钥 通过 chat 和 sender so reused message IDs across different chats 或 senders no longer collide, 和 harden metadata reads 为了 partially missing payloads. (#58444)
changes.rawTitle: Zalo/webhook replay: scope replay dedupe key by chat and sender so reused message IDs across different chats or senders no longer collide, and harden metadata reads for partially missing payloads. (#58444)

changes.title: QQBot/structured payloads: restrict local file paths to QQ Bot-owned media storage, block traversal outside that root, reduce 路径 leakage 在 logs, 和 keep inline image data URLs working. (#58453) Thanks @jacobtomlinson.
changes.rawTitle: QQBot/structured payloads: restrict local file paths to QQ Bot-owned media storage, block traversal outside that root, reduce path leakage in logs, and keep inline image data URLs working. (#58453) Thanks @jacobtomlinson.

changes.title: Image generation/providers: route OpenAI, MiniMax, 和 fal image requests through the shared provider HTTP transport 路径 so custom base URLs, guarded private-network routing, 和 provider request defaults stay aligned 使用 the rest 的 provider HTTP. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Image generation/providers: route OpenAI, MiniMax, and fal image requests through the shared provider HTTP transport path so custom base URLs, guarded private-network routing, and provider request defaults stay aligned with the rest of provider HTTP. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Image generation/providers: 停止 inferring private-network access 从 configured OpenAI, MiniMax, 和 fal image base URLs, 和 cap shared HTTP 错误-body reads so hostile 或 misconfigured endpoints fail closed 不适用 relaxing SSRF policy 或 buffering unbounded 错误 payloads. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Image generation/providers: stop inferring private-network access from configured OpenAI, MiniMax, and fal image base URLs, and cap shared HTTP error-body reads so hostile or misconfigured endpoints fail closed without relaxing SSRF policy or buffering unbounded error payloads. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 浏览器/host inspection: keep static Chrome inspection helpers out 的 the activated 浏览器 runtime so `openclaw 诊断工具 浏览器` 和 related checks do not eagerly load the bundled 浏览器 插件. (#59471) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/host inspection: keep static Chrome inspection helpers out of the activated browser runtime so `openclaw doctor browser` and related checks do not eagerly load the bundled browser plugin. (#59471) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Browser/CDP: normalize trailing-dot localhost absolute-form hosts before loopback checks so remote CDP websocket URLs like `ws://localhost.:...` rewrite back to the configured remote host. (#59236) Thanks @mappel-nv.

changes.rawTitle: Podman/launch: remove noisy container output from `scripts/run-openclaw-podman.sh` and align the Podman install guidance with the quieter startup flow. (#59368) Thanks @sallyom.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/runtime: keep LINE reply directives and browser-backed cleanup/reset flows working even when those plugins are disabled while tightening bundled plugin activation guards. (#59412) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: ACP/网关 reconnects: keep ACP prompts alive across transient websocket drops while still failing boundedly 当 reconnect recovery does not complete. (#59473) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: ACP/gateway reconnects: keep ACP prompts alive across transient websocket drops while still failing boundedly when reconnect recovery does not complete. (#59473) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.rawTitle: ACP/gateway reconnects: reject stale pre-ack ACP prompts after reconnect grace expiry so callers fail cleanly instead of hanging indefinitely when the gateway never confirms the run.

changes.title: 网关/session kill: enforce HTTP operator scopes 在 session kill requests 和 gate authorization 之前 session lookup so unauthenticated callers cannot probe session existence. (#59128) Thanks @jacobtomlinson.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/session kill: enforce HTTP operator scopes on session kill requests and gate authorization before session lookup so unauthenticated callers cannot probe session existence. (#59128) Thanks @jacobtomlinson.

changes.title: MS Teams/logging: format non-`错误` failures 使用 the shared unknown-错误 helper so logs 停止 collapsing caught SDK 或 Axios objects 进入 `[object Object]`. (#59321) Thanks @bradgroux.
changes.rawTitle: MS Teams/logging: format non-`Error` failures with the shared unknown-error helper so logs stop collapsing caught SDK or Axios objects into `[object Object]`. (#59321) Thanks @bradgroux.

changes.title: Channels/setup: ignore untrusted workspace channel 插件 期间 setup resolution so a shadowing workspace 插件 cannot override built-在 channel setup/login flows unless explicitly trusted 在 配置. (#59158) Thanks @mappel-nv.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/setup: ignore untrusted workspace channel plugins during setup resolution so a shadowing workspace plugin cannot override built-in channel setup/login flows unless explicitly trusted in config. (#59158) Thanks @mappel-nv.

changes.title: Exec/Windows: restore allowlist enforcement 使用 quote-aware `argPattern` matching across 网关 和 node exec, 和 surface accurate dynamic pre-approved executable hints 在 the exec 工具 description. (#56285) Thanks @kpngr.
changes.rawTitle: Exec/Windows: restore allowlist enforcement with quote-aware `argPattern` matching across gateway and node exec, and surface accurate dynamic pre-approved executable hints in the exec tool description. (#56285) Thanks @kpngr.

changes.title: 网关: prune empty `node-pending-work` state entries 之后 explicit acknowledgments 和 natural expiry so the per-node state map no longer grows indefinitely. (#58179) Thanks @gavyngong.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway: prune empty `node-pending-work` state entries after explicit acknowledgments and natural expiry so the per-node state map no longer grows indefinitely. (#58179) Thanks @gavyngong.

changes.title: OpenShell/mirror: constrain `remoteWorkspaceDir` 和 `remoteAgentWorkspaceDir` to the managed `/sandbox` 和 `/Agent` roots, 和 keep mirror sync 从 overwriting 或 removing user-added shell roots 期间 配置 synchronization. (#58515) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: OpenShell/mirror: constrain `remoteWorkspaceDir` and `remoteAgentWorkspaceDir` to the managed `/sandbox` and `/agent` roots, and keep mirror sync from overwriting or removing user-added shell roots during config synchronization. (#58515) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: 插件/activation: 保留 explicit, auto-enabled, 和 default activation provenance plus reason metadata across CLI, 网关 bootstrap, 和 status surfaces so 插件 enablement state stays accurate 之后 auto-启用 resolution. (#59641) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/activation: preserve explicit, auto-enabled, and default activation provenance plus reason metadata across CLI, gateway bootstrap, and status surfaces so plugin enablement state stays accurate after auto-enable resolution. (#59641) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Exec/env: block additional host environment override pivots 为了 package roots, language runtimes, compiler include paths, 和 credential/配置 locations so request-scoped exec cannot redirect trusted toolchains 或 配置 lookups. (#59233) Thanks @drobison00.
changes.rawTitle: Exec/env: block additional host environment override pivots for package roots, language runtimes, compiler include paths, and credential/config locations so request-scoped exec cannot redirect trusted toolchains or config lookups. (#59233) Thanks @drobison00.

changes.title: Dotenv/workspace overrides: block workspace `.env` files 从 overriding `OPENCLAW_PINNED_PYTHON` 和 `OPENCLAW_PINNED_WRITE_PYTHON` so trusted helper interpreters cannot be redirected 通过 repo-local env injection. (#58473) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Dotenv/workspace overrides: block workspace `.env` files from overriding `OPENCLAW_PINNED_PYTHON` and `OPENCLAW_PINNED_WRITE_PYTHON` so trusted helper interpreters cannot be redirected by repo-local env injection. (#58473) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: 插件/install: accept JSON5 syntax 在 `openclaw.插件.json` 和 bundle `插件.json` manifests 期间 install/validation, so third-party 插件 使用 trailing commas, comments, 或 unquoted keys no longer fail to install. (#59084) Thanks @singleGanghood.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: accept JSON5 syntax in `openclaw.plugin.json` and bundle `plugin.json` manifests during install/validation, so third-party plugins with trailing commas, comments, or unquoted keys no longer fail to install. (#59084) Thanks @singleGanghood.

changes.title: Telegram/exec approvals: rewrite shared `/approve … 允许-always` callback payloads to `/approve … always` 之前 Telegram button rendering so 插件 approval IDs still fit Telegram's `callback_data` limit 和 keep the 允许 Always action visible. (#59217) Thanks @jameslcowan.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/exec approvals: rewrite shared `/approve … allow-always` callback payloads to `/approve … always` before Telegram button rendering so plugin approval IDs still fit Telegram's `callback_data` limit and keep the Allow Always action visible. (#59217) Thanks @jameslcowan.

changes.title: Cron/exec timeouts: surface timed-out `exec` 和 `bash` failures 在 isolated cron runs even 当 `verbose: off`, including custom session-target cron jobs, so scheduled runs 停止 failing 静默地. (#58247) Thanks @skainguyen1412.
changes.rawTitle: Cron/exec timeouts: surface timed-out `exec` and `bash` failures in isolated cron runs even when `verbose: off`, including custom session-target cron jobs, so scheduled runs stop failing silently. (#58247) Thanks @skainguyen1412.

changes.title: Telegram/exec approvals: fall back to the origin session 密钥 为了 async approval followups 和 keep resume-failure status delivery sanitized so Telegram followups still land 不适用 leaking raw exec metadata. (#59351) Thanks @seonang.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/exec approvals: fall back to the origin session key for async approval followups and keep resume-failure status delivery sanitized so Telegram followups still land without leaking raw exec metadata. (#59351) Thanks @seonang.

changes.title: Node-host/exec approvals: bind `pnpm dlx` invocations through the approval planner's mutable-script 路径 so the effective runtime 命令 is resolved 为了 approval 而不是 being left unbound. (#58374)
changes.rawTitle: Node-host/exec approvals: bind `pnpm dlx` invocations through the approval planner's mutable-script path so the effective runtime command is resolved for approval instead of being left unbound. (#58374)

changes.title: Exec/node hosts: 停止 forwarding the 网关 workspace cwd to remote node exec 当 no workdir was explicitly requested, so cross-platform node approvals fall back to the node default cwd 而不是 failing 使用 `SYSTEM_RUN_DENIED`. (#58977) Thanks @Starhappysh.
changes.rawTitle: Exec/node hosts: stop forwarding the gateway workspace cwd to remote node exec when no workdir was explicitly requested, so cross-platform node approvals fall back to the node default cwd instead of failing with `SYSTEM_RUN_DENIED`. (#58977) Thanks @Starhappysh.

changes.title: Exec approvals/channels: decouple initiating-surface approval availability 从 native delivery enablement so Telegram, Slack, 和 Discord still expose approvals 当 approvers exist 和 native target routing is configured separately. (#59776) Thanks @joelnishanth.
changes.rawTitle: Exec approvals/channels: decouple initiating-surface approval availability from native delivery enablement so Telegram, Slack, and Discord still expose approvals when approvers exist and native target routing is configured separately. (#59776) Thanks @joelnishanth.

changes.title: Tasks/网关: re-check the current task record 之前 maintenance marks runs lost 或 prunes them, so a task heartbeat 或 cleanup 更新 that lands 期间 a sweep no longer gets overwritten 通过 stale snapshot state.
changes.rawTitle: Tasks/gateway: re-check the current task record before maintenance marks runs lost or prunes them, so a task heartbeat or cleanup update that lands during a sweep no longer gets overwritten by stale snapshot state.

changes.title: Exec/approvals: honor `exec-approvals.json` 安全 defaults 当 inline 或 configured 工具 policy is unset, 和 keep Slack 和 Discord native approval handling aligned 使用 inferred approvers 和 real channel enablement so remote exec stops falling 进入 false approval timeouts 和 disabled states. Thanks @scoootscooob 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Exec/approvals: honor `exec-approvals.json` security defaults when inline or configured tool policy is unset, and keep Slack and Discord native approval handling aligned with inferred approvers and real channel enablement so remote exec stops falling into false approval timeouts and disabled states. Thanks @scoootscooob and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Exec/approvals: make `允许-always` persist as durable user-approved trust 而不是 behaving like `允许-once`, 复用 exact-命令 trust 在 shell-wrapper paths that cannot safely persist an executable allowlist entry, keep static allowlist entries 从 静默地 bypassing `ask:"always"`, 和 require explicit approval 当 Windows cannot build an allowlist execution plan 而不是 hard-dead-ending remote exec. Thanks @scoootscooob 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Exec/approvals: make `allow-always` persist as durable user-approved trust instead of behaving like `allow-once`, reuse exact-command trust on shell-wrapper paths that cannot safely persist an executable allowlist entry, keep static allowlist entries from silently bypassing `ask:"always"`, and require explicit approval when Windows cannot build an allowlist execution plan instead of hard-dead-ending remote exec. Thanks @scoootscooob and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Exec/cron: 解决 isolated cron no-route approval dead-ends 从 the effective host fallback policy 当 trusted automation is allowed, 和 make `openclaw 诊断工具` warn 当 `tools.exec` is broader than `~/.openclaw/exec-approvals.json` so stricter host-policy conflicts are explicit. Thanks @scoootscooob 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Exec/cron: resolve isolated cron no-route approval dead-ends from the effective host fallback policy when trusted automation is allowed, and make `openclaw doctor` warn when `tools.exec` is broader than `~/.openclaw/exec-approvals.json` so stricter host-policy conflicts are explicit. Thanks @scoootscooob and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Sessions/模型 switching: keep `/模型` changes queued behind busy runs 而不是 interrupting the active turn, 和 retarget queued followups so later work picks up the new 模型 as soon as the current turn finishes.
changes.rawTitle: Sessions/model switching: keep `/model` changes queued behind busy runs instead of interrupting the active turn, and retarget queued followups so later work picks up the new model as soon as the current turn finishes.

changes.title: 网关/HTTP: skip failing HTTP request stages so one broken facade no longer forces every HTTP endpoint to return 500. (#58746) Thanks @yelog
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/HTTP: skip failing HTTP request stages so one broken facade no longer forces every HTTP endpoint to return 500. (#58746) Thanks @yelog

changes.title: 网关/nodes: 停止 pinning live node commands to the approved node-pair record. Node pairing remains a trust/令牌 flow, while per-node `system.run` policy stays 在 that node's exec approvals 配置. 修复 #58824.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/nodes: stop pinning live node commands to the approved node-pair record. Node pairing remains a trust/token flow, while per-node `system.run` policy stays in that node's exec approvals config. Fixes #58824.

changes.title: WebChat/exec approvals: use native approval 界面 guidance 在 Agent system prompts 而不是 telling Agent to paste manual `/approve` commands 在 webchat sessions. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: WebChat/exec approvals: use native approval UI guidance in agent system prompts instead of telling agents to paste manual `/approve` commands in webchat sessions. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Web 界面/OpenResponses: 保留 rewritten stream snapshots 在 webchat 和 keep OpenResponses final streamed text aligned 当 模型 rewind earlier output. (#58641) Thanks @neeravmakwana
changes.rawTitle: Web UI/OpenResponses: preserve rewritten stream snapshots in webchat and keep OpenResponses final streamed text aligned when models rewind earlier output. (#58641) Thanks @neeravmakwana

changes.title: Discord/inbound media: pass Discord attachment 和 sticker downloads through the shared idle-超时 和 worker-abort 路径 so slow 或 stuck inbound media fetches 停止 hanging message processing. (#58593) Thanks @aquaright1
changes.rawTitle: Discord/inbound media: pass Discord attachment and sticker downloads through the shared idle-timeout and worker-abort path so slow or stuck inbound media fetches stop hanging message processing. (#58593) Thanks @aquaright1

changes.title: Telegram/retries: keep non-idempotent sends 在 the strict safe-send 路径, 重试 wrapped pre-connect failures, 和 保留 `429` / `retry_after` backoff 为了 safe delivery retries. (#51895) Thanks @chinar-amrutkar
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/retries: keep non-idempotent sends on the strict safe-send path, retry wrapped pre-connect failures, and preserve `429` / `retry_after` backoff for safe delivery retries. (#51895) Thanks @chinar-amrutkar

changes.title: Telegram/exec approvals: route topic-aware exec approval followups through Telegram-owned threading 和 approval-target parsing, so forum-topic approvals stay 在 the originating topic 而不是 falling back to the root chat. (#58783)
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/exec approvals: route topic-aware exec approval followups through Telegram-owned threading and approval-target parsing, so forum-topic approvals stay in the originating topic instead of falling back to the root chat. (#58783)

changes.title: Telegram/local Bot API: 保留 media MIME types 为了 absolute-路径 downloads so local audio files still trigger transcription 和 other MIME-based handling. (#54603) Thanks @jzakirov
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/local Bot API: preserve media MIME types for absolute-path downloads so local audio files still trigger transcription and other MIME-based handling. (#54603) Thanks @jzakirov

changes.rawTitle: Channels/WhatsApp: pass inbound message timestamp to model context so the AI can see when WhatsApp messages were sent. (#58590) Thanks @Maninae

changes.rawTitle: Channels/QQ Bot: keep `/bot-logs` export gated behind a truly explicit QQBot allowlist, rejecting wildcard and mixed wildcard entries while preserving the real framework command path. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Channels/插件: keep bundled channel 插件 loadable 从 legacy `channels.<id>` 配置 even under restrictive 插件 allowlists, 和 make `openclaw 诊断工具` warn only 在 real 插件 blockers 而不是 misleading setup guidance. (#58873) Thanks @obviyus
changes.rawTitle: Channels/plugins: keep bundled channel plugins loadable from legacy `channels.<id>` config even under restrictive plugin allowlists, and make `openclaw doctor` warn only on real plugin blockers instead of misleading setup guidance. (#58873) Thanks @obviyus

changes.title: 插件/bundled runtimes: restore externalized bundled 插件 runtime dependency staging across packed installs, Docker builds, 和 local runtime staging so bundled 插件 keep their declared runtime deps 之后 the 2026.3.31 externalization 更改. (#58782)
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/bundled runtimes: restore externalized bundled plugin runtime dependency staging across packed installs, Docker builds, and local runtime staging so bundled plugins keep their declared runtime deps after the 2026.3.31 externalization change. (#58782)

changes.title: LINE/runtime: 解决 the packaged runtime contract 从 the built `dist/插件/runtime` layout so LINE channels start 正确地 重新 之后 global npm installs 在 `2026.3.31`. (#58799) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: LINE/runtime: resolve the packaged runtime contract from the built `dist/plugins/runtime` layout so LINE channels start correctly again after global npm installs on `2026.3.31`. (#58799) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: MiniMax/插件: auto-启用 the bundled MiniMax 插件 为了 API-密钥 认证/配置 so MiniMax image generation 和 other 插件-owned capabilities load 不适用 manual 插件 allowlisting. (#57127) Thanks @tars90percent.
changes.rawTitle: MiniMax/plugins: auto-enable the bundled MiniMax plugin for API-key auth/config so MiniMax image generation and other plugin-owned capabilities load without manual plugin allowlisting. (#57127) Thanks @tars90percent.

changes.title: Ollama/模型 picker: show only Ollama 模型 之后 provider selection 在 the CLI picker. (#55290) Thanks @Luckymingxuan.
changes.rawTitle: Ollama/model picker: show only Ollama models after provider selection in the CLI picker. (#55290) Thanks @Luckymingxuan.

changes.title: CDP/profiles: prefer `cdpPort` over stale WebSocket URLs so 浏览器 automation reconnects cleanly. (#58499) Thanks @Mlightsnow.
changes.rawTitle: CDP/profiles: prefer `cdpPort` over stale WebSocket URLs so browser automation reconnects cleanly. (#58499) Thanks @Mlightsnow.

changes.title: Media/paths: 解决 relative `MEDIA` paths against the Agent workspace so local attachment references keep working. (#58624) Thanks @aquaright1.
changes.rawTitle: Media/paths: resolve relative `MEDIA` paths against the agent workspace so local attachment references keep working. (#58624) Thanks @aquaright1.

changes.title: 内存/session indexing: keep full reindexes 从 skipping session transcripts 当 sync is triggered 通过 `session-start` 或 `watch`, so restart-driven reindexes 保留 session 内存. (#39732) Thanks @upupc
changes.rawTitle: Memory/session indexing: keep full reindexes from skipping session transcripts when sync is triggered by `session-start` or `watch`, so restart-driven reindexes preserve session memory. (#39732) Thanks @upupc

changes.title: 内存/QMD: prefer `--mask` over `--glob` 当 creating QMD collections so default 内存 collections keep their intended patterns 和 停止 colliding 在 restart. (#58643) Thanks @GitZhangChi.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: prefer `--mask` over `--glob` when creating QMD collections so default memory collections keep their intended patterns and stop colliding on restart. (#58643) Thanks @GitZhangChi.

changes.title: Subagents/tasks: keep subagent completion 和 cleanup 从 crashing 当 task-registry writes fail, so a corrupt 或 missing task row no longer takes down the 网关 期间 lifecycle finalization. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Subagents/tasks: keep subagent completion and cleanup from crashing when task-registry writes fail, so a corrupt or missing task row no longer takes down the gateway during lifecycle finalization. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Sandbox/浏览器: compare 浏览器 runtime inspection against `Agent.defaults.sandbox.浏览器.image` so `openclaw sandbox list --浏览器` stops reporting healthy 浏览器 containers as image mismatches. (#58759) Thanks @sandpile.
changes.rawTitle: Sandbox/browser: compare browser runtime inspection against `agents.defaults.sandbox.browser.image` so `openclaw sandbox list --browser` stops reporting healthy browser containers as image mismatches. (#58759) Thanks @sandpile.

changes.title: 插件/install: forward `--dangerously-force-unsafe-install` through archive 和 npm-spec 插件 installs so the documented override reaches the 安全 scanner 在 those install paths. (#58879) Thanks @ryanlee-gemini.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: forward `--dangerously-force-unsafe-install` through archive and npm-spec plugin installs so the documented override reaches the security scanner on those install paths. (#58879) Thanks @ryanlee-gemini.

changes.title: Auto-reply/commands: strip inbound metadata 之前 slash 命令 detection so wrapped `/模型`, `/new`, 和 `/status` commands are recognized. (#58725) Thanks @Mlightsnow.
changes.rawTitle: Auto-reply/commands: strip inbound metadata before slash command detection so wrapped `/model`, `/new`, and `/status` commands are recognized. (#58725) Thanks @Mlightsnow.

changes.title: Agent/Anthropic: 保留 thinking blocks 和 signatures across replay, cache-control patching, 和 context pruning so compacted Anthropic sessions continue working 而不是 failing 在 later turns. (#58916) Thanks @obviyus
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Anthropic: preserve thinking blocks and signatures across replay, cache-control patching, and context pruning so compacted Anthropic sessions continue working instead of failing on later turns. (#58916) Thanks @obviyus

changes.title: Agent/failover: unify structured 和 raw provider 错误 classification so provider-specific `400`/`422` payloads no longer get forced 进入 generic format failures 之前 重试, billing, 或 compaction logic can inspect them. (#58856) Thanks @aaron-he-zhu.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/failover: unify structured and raw provider error classification so provider-specific `400`/`422` payloads no longer get forced into generic format failures before retry, billing, or compaction logic can inspect them. (#58856) Thanks @aaron-he-zhu.

changes.title: 认证 profiles/store: coerce misplaced SecretRef objects out 的 plaintext `密钥` 和 `令牌` fields 期间 store load so Agent 不适用 ACP runtime 停止 crashing 在 `.trim()` 之后 upgrade. (#58923) Thanks @openperf.
changes.rawTitle: Auth profiles/store: coerce misplaced SecretRef objects out of plaintext `key` and `token` fields during store load so agents without ACP runtime stop crashing on `.trim()` after upgrade. (#58923) Thanks @openperf.

changes.title: ACPX/runtime: repair `queue owner unavailable` session recovery 通过 replacing dead named sessions 和 resuming the backend session 当 ACPX exposes a stable session id, so the first ACP prompt no longer inherits a dead 处理. (#58669) Thanks @neeravmakwana
changes.rawTitle: ACPX/runtime: repair `queue owner unavailable` session recovery by replacing dead named sessions and resuming the backend session when ACPX exposes a stable session id, so the first ACP prompt no longer inherits a dead handle. (#58669) Thanks @neeravmakwana

changes.title: ACPX/runtime: 重试 dead-session queue-owner repair 不适用 `--resume-session` 当 the reported ACPX session id is stale, so recovery still creates a fresh named session 而不是 failing session init. Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: ACPX/runtime: retry dead-session queue-owner repair without `--resume-session` when the reported ACPX session id is stale, so recovery still creates a fresh named session instead of failing session init. Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: 认证/OpenAI Codex: persist 插件-refreshed OAuth认证 credentials to `认证-profiles.json` 之前 returning them, so rotated Codex refresh tokens survive restart 和 停止 falling 进入 `refresh_token_reused` loops. (#53082)
changes.rawTitle: Auth/OpenAI Codex: persist plugin-refreshed OAuth credentials to `auth-profiles.json` before returning them, so rotated Codex refresh tokens survive restart and stop falling into `refresh_token_reused` loops. (#53082)

changes.title: Discord/网关: hand reconnect ownership back to Carbon, keep runtime status aligned 使用 close/reconnect state, 和 force-停止 sockets that open 不适用 reaching READY so Discord monitors recover promptly 而不是 waiting 在 stale health timeouts. (#59019) Thanks @obviyus
changes.rawTitle: Discord/gateway: hand reconnect ownership back to Carbon, keep runtime status aligned with close/reconnect state, and force-stop sockets that open without reaching READY so Discord monitors recover promptly instead of waiting on stale health timeouts. (#59019) Thanks @obviyus

changes.rawTitle: Config/Telegram: migrate removed `channels.telegram.groupMentionsOnly` into `channels.telegram.groups["*"].requireMention` on load so legacy configs no longer crash at startup. (#55336) thanks @jameslcowan.

items.title: Discord/网关: hand reconnect ownership back to Carbon, keep runtime status aligned 使用 close/reconnect state, 和 force-停止 sockets that open 不适用 reaching READY so Discord monitors recover promptly 而不是 waiting 在 stale health timeouts. (#59019) Thanks @obviyus
items.rawTitle: Discord/gateway: hand reconnect ownership back to Carbon, keep runtime status aligned with close/reconnect state, and force-stop sockets that open without reaching READY so Discord monitors recover promptly instead of waiting on stale health timeouts. (#59019) Thanks @obviyus

items.title: 配置/Telegram: migrate removed `channels.Telegram.groupMentionsOnly` 进入 `channels.Telegram.groups["*"].requireMention` 在 load so legacy configs no longer 崩溃 at startup. (#55336) thanks @jameslcowan.
items.rawTitle: Config/Telegram: migrate removed `channels.telegram.groupMentionsOnly` into `channels.telegram.groups["*"].requireMention` on load so legacy configs no longer crash at startup. (#55336) thanks @jameslcowan.

items.title: 网关/webchat: make `chat.history` text truncation configurable 使用 `网关.webchat.chatHistoryMaxChars` 和 per-request `maxChars`, while preserving silent-reply filtering 和 existing default payload limits. (#58900)
items.rawTitle: Gateway/webchat: make `chat.history` text truncation configurable with `gateway.webchat.chatHistoryMaxChars` and per-request `maxChars`, while preserving silent-reply filtering and existing default payload limits. (#58900)

items.title: Tasks/网关: keep the task registry maintenance sweep 从 stalling the 网关 event loop under synchronous SQLite pressure, so upgraded gateways 停止 hanging about a minute 之后 startup. (#58670) Thanks @openperf
items.rawTitle: Tasks/gateway: keep the task registry maintenance sweep from stalling the gateway event loop under synchronous SQLite pressure, so upgraded gateways stop hanging about a minute after startup. (#58670) Thanks @openperf

items.title: Tasks/网关: re-check the current task record 之前 maintenance marks runs lost 或 prunes them, so a task heartbeat 或 cleanup 更新 that lands 期间 a sweep no longer gets overwritten 通过 stale snapshot state.
items.rawTitle: Tasks/gateway: re-check the current task record before maintenance marks runs lost or prunes them, so a task heartbeat or cleanup update that lands during a sweep no longer gets overwritten by stale snapshot state.

items.title: 网关/HTTP: skip failing HTTP request stages so one broken facade no longer forces every HTTP endpoint to return 500. (#58746) Thanks @yelog
items.rawTitle: Gateway/HTTP: skip failing HTTP request stages so one broken facade no longer forces every HTTP endpoint to return 500. (#58746) Thanks @yelog

items.title: Agent/failover: cap prompt-side 和 assistant-side same-provider 认证-profile retries 为了 rate-limit failures 之前 cross-provider 模型 fallback, 添加 the `认证.cooldowns.rateLimitedProfileRotations` knob, 和 document the new fallback behavior. (#58707) Thanks @Forgely3D
items.rawTitle: Agents/failover: cap prompt-side and assistant-side same-provider auth-profile retries for rate-limit failures before cross-provider model fallback, add the `auth.cooldowns.rateLimitedProfileRotations` knob, and document the new fallback behavior. (#58707) Thanks @Forgely3D

items.rawTitle: ZAI/models: add `glm-5.1` and `glm-5v-turbo` to the bundled Z.AI provider catalog. (#58793) Thanks @tomsun28

items.title: Agent/compaction: 解决 `Agent.defaults.compaction.模型` consistently 为了 manual `/compact` 和 other context-engine compaction paths, so engine-owned compaction uses the configured override 模型 across runtime entrypoints. (#56710) Thanks @oliviareid-svg
items.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: resolve `agents.defaults.compaction.model` consistently for manual `/compact` and other context-engine compaction paths, so engine-owned compaction uses the configured override model across runtime entrypoints. (#56710) Thanks @oliviareid-svg

items.title: 网关/reload: ignore startup 配置 writes 通过 persisted hash 在 the 配置 reloader so generated 认证 tokens 和 seeded Control 界面 origins do not trigger a restart loop, while real `网关.认证.*` edits still require restart. (#58678) Thanks @yelog
items.rawTitle: Gateway/reload: ignore startup config writes by persisted hash in the config reloader so generated auth tokens and seeded Control UI origins do not trigger a restart loop, while real `gateway.auth.*` edits still require restart. (#58678) Thanks @yelog

items.title: Sessions/模型 switching: keep `/模型` changes queued behind busy runs 而不是 interrupting the active turn, 和 retarget queued followups so later work picks up the new 模型 as soon as the current turn finishes.
items.rawTitle: Sessions/model switching: keep `/model` changes queued behind busy runs instead of interrupting the active turn, and retarget queued followups so later work picks up the new model as soon as the current turn finishes.

items.title: 网关/nodes: 停止 pinning live node commands to the approved node-pair record. Node pairing remains a trust/令牌 flow, while per-node `system.run` policy stays 在 that node's exec approvals 配置. 修复 #58824.

items.rawTitle: Auto-reply/commands: strip inbound metadata before slash command detection so wrapped `/model`, `/new`, and `/status` commands are recognized. (#58725) Thanks @Mlightsnow.

items.title: Agent/Anthropic: 保留 thinking blocks 和 signatures across replay, cache-control patching, 和 context pruning so compacted Anthropic sessions continue working 而不是 failing 在 later turns. (#58916) Thanks @obviyus
items.rawTitle: Agents/Anthropic: preserve thinking blocks and signatures across replay, cache-control patching, and context pruning so compacted Anthropic sessions continue working instead of failing on later turns. (#58916) Thanks @obviyus

items.title: 认证 profiles/store: coerce misplaced SecretRef objects out 的 plaintext `密钥` 和 `令牌` fields 期间 store load so Agent 不适用 ACP runtime 停止 crashing 在 `.trim()` 之后 upgrade. (#58923) Thanks @openperf.
items.rawTitle: Auth profiles/store: coerce misplaced SecretRef objects out of plaintext `key` and `token` fields during store load so agents without ACP runtime stop crashing on `.trim()` after upgrade. (#58923) Thanks @openperf.

items.title: Exec/approvals: make `允许-always` persist as durable user-approved trust 而不是 behaving like `允许-once`, 复用 exact-命令 trust 在 shell-wrapper paths that cannot safely persist an executable allowlist entry, keep static allowlist entries 从 静默地 bypassing `ask:"always"`, 和 require explicit approval 当 Windows cannot build an allowlist execution plan 而不是 hard-dead-ending remote exec. Thanks @scoootscooob 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Exec/approvals: make `allow-always` persist as durable user-approved trust instead of behaving like `allow-once`, reuse exact-command trust on shell-wrapper paths that cannot safely persist an executable allowlist entry, keep static allowlist entries from silently bypassing `ask:"always"`, and require explicit approval when Windows cannot build an allowlist execution plan instead of hard-dead-ending remote exec. Thanks @scoootscooob and @vincentkoc.

items.title: Exec/cron: 解决 isolated cron no-route approval dead-ends 从 the effective host fallback policy 当 trusted automation is allowed, 和 make `openclaw 诊断工具` warn 当 `tools.exec` is broader than `~/.openclaw/exec-approvals.json` so stricter host-policy conflicts are explicit. Thanks @scoootscooob 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Exec/cron: resolve isolated cron no-route approval dead-ends from the effective host fallback policy when trusted automation is allowed, and make `openclaw doctor` warn when `tools.exec` is broader than `~/.openclaw/exec-approvals.json` so stricter host-policy conflicts are explicit. Thanks @scoootscooob and @vincentkoc.

items.rawTitle: ACPX/runtime: repair `queue owner unavailable` session recovery by replacing dead named sessions and resuming the backend session when ACPX exposes a stable session id, so the first ACP prompt no longer inherits a dead handle. (#58669) Thanks @neeravmakwana

items.rawTitle: Sandbox/browser: compare browser runtime inspection against `agents.defaults.sandbox.browser.image` so `openclaw sandbox list --browser` stops reporting healthy browser containers as image mismatches. (#58759) Thanks @sandpile.

items.title: 内存/session indexing: keep full reindexes 从 skipping session transcripts 当 sync is triggered 通过 `session-start` 或 `watch`, so restart-driven reindexes 保留 session 内存. (#39732) Thanks @upupc
items.rawTitle: Memory/session indexing: keep full reindexes from skipping session transcripts when sync is triggered by `session-start` or `watch`, so restart-driven reindexes preserve session memory. (#39732) Thanks @upupc

items.title: 内存/QMD: prefer `--mask` over `--glob` 当 creating QMD collections so default 内存 collections keep their intended patterns 和 停止 colliding 在 restart. (#58643) Thanks @GitZhangChi.
items.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: prefer `--mask` over `--glob` when creating QMD collections so default memory collections keep their intended patterns and stop colliding on restart. (#58643) Thanks @GitZhangChi.

changes.title: Nodes/exec: 移除 the duplicated `nodes.run` shell wrapper 从 the CLI 和 Agent `nodes` 工具 so node shell execution always goes through `exec host=node`, keeping node-specific capabilities 在 `nodes invoke` 和 the dedicated media/location/notify actions.
changes.rawTitle: Nodes/exec: remove the duplicated `nodes.run` shell wrapper from the CLI and agent `nodes` tool so node shell execution always goes through `exec host=node`, keeping node-specific capabilities on `nodes invoke` and the dedicated media/location/notify actions.

changes.title: 插件 SDK: deprecate the legacy provider compat subpaths plus the older bundled provider setup 和 channel-runtime compatibility shims, emit migration warnings, 和 keep the current documented `openclaw/插件-sdk/*` entrypoints plus local `API.ts` / `runtime-API.ts` barrels as the forward 路径 ahead 的 a future major-release removal.
changes.rawTitle: Plugin SDK: deprecate the legacy provider compat subpaths plus the older bundled provider setup and channel-runtime compatibility shims, emit migration warnings, and keep the current documented `openclaw/plugin-sdk/*` entrypoints plus local `api.ts` / `runtime-api.ts` barrels as the forward path ahead of a future major-release removal.

changes.title: Skills/install 和 插件/install: built-在 dangerous-code `critical` findings 和 install-time scan failures 现在 fail closed 通过 default, so 插件 installs 和 网关-backed skill dependency installs that previously succeeded may 现在 require an explicit dangerous override such as `--dangerously-force-unsafe-install` to proceed.
changes.rawTitle: Skills/install and Plugins/install: built-in dangerous-code `critical` findings and install-time scan failures now fail closed by default, so plugin installs and gateway-backed skill dependency installs that previously succeeded may now require an explicit dangerous override such as `--dangerously-force-unsafe-install` to proceed.

changes.title: 网关/认证: `trusted-代理` 现在 rejects mixed shared-令牌 configs, 和 local-direct fallback requires the configured 令牌 而不是 implicitly authenticating same-host callers. Thanks @zhangning-Agent, @jacobtomlinson, 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/auth: `trusted-proxy` now rejects mixed shared-token configs, and local-direct fallback requires the configured token instead of implicitly authenticating same-host callers. Thanks @zhangning-agent, @jacobtomlinson, and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/node commands: node commands 现在 stay disabled until node pairing is approved, so device pairing alone is no longer enough to expose declared node commands. (#57777) Thanks @jacobtomlinson.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/node commands: node commands now stay disabled until node pairing is approved, so device pairing alone is no longer enough to expose declared node commands. (#57777) Thanks @jacobtomlinson.

changes.title: 网关/node events: node-originated runs 现在 stay 在 a reduced trusted surface, so notification-driven 或 node-triggered flows that previously relied 在 broader host/session 工具 access may need adjustment. (#57691) Thanks @jacobtomlinson.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/node events: node-originated runs now stay on a reduced trusted surface, so notification-driven or node-triggered flows that previously relied on broader host/session tool access may need adjustment. (#57691) Thanks @jacobtomlinson.

changes.title: ACP/插件: 添加 an explicit default-off ACPX 插件-tools MCP协议 bridge 配置, document the trust boundary, 和 harden the built-在 bridge packaging/logging 路径 so global installs 和 stdio MCP协议 sessions work reliably. (#56867) Thanks @joe2643.
changes.rawTitle: ACP/plugins: add an explicit default-off ACPX plugin-tools MCP bridge config, document the trust boundary, and harden the built-in bridge packaging/logging path so global installs and stdio MCP sessions work reliably. (#56867) Thanks @joe2643.

changes.title: Agent/LLM: 添加 a configurable idle-stream 超时 为了 embedded runner requests so stalled 模型 streams abort cleanly 而不是 hanging until the broader run 超时 fires. (#55072) Thanks @liuy.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/LLM: add a configurable idle-stream timeout for embedded runner requests so stalled model streams abort cleanly instead of hanging until the broader run timeout fires. (#55072) Thanks @liuy.

changes.title: Agent/MCP协议: materialize bundle MCP协议 tools 使用 provider-safe names (`serverName__toolName`), 支持 optional `streamable-http` transport selection plus per-server connection timeouts, 和 保留 real 工具 results 从 aborted/错误 turns unless truncation explicitly drops them. (#49505) Thanks @ziomancer.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/MCP: materialize bundle MCP tools with provider-safe names (`serverName__toolName`), support optional `streamable-http` transport selection plus per-server connection timeouts, and preserve real tool results from aborted/error turns unless truncation explicitly drops them. (#49505) Thanks @ziomancer.

changes.title: Android/notifications: 添加 notification-forwarding controls 使用 package filtering, quiet hours, rate limiting, 和 safer picker behavior 为了 forwarded notification events. (#40175) Thanks @nimbleenigma.
changes.rawTitle: Android/notifications: add notification-forwarding controls with package filtering, quiet hours, rate limiting, and safer picker behavior for forwarded notification events. (#40175) Thanks @nimbleenigma.

changes.title: Background tasks: turn tasks 进入 a real shared background-run control plane 而不是 ACP-only bookkeeping 通过 unifying ACP, subagent, cron, 和 background CLI execution under one SQLite-backed ledger, routing detached lifecycle updates through the executor seam, adding audit/maintenance/status visibility, tightening auto-cleanup 和 lost-run recovery, improving task awareness 在 internal status/工具 surfaces, 和 clarifying the split 之间 heartbeat/main-session automation 和 detached scheduled runs. Thanks @mbelinky 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Background tasks: turn tasks into a real shared background-run control plane instead of ACP-only bookkeeping by unifying ACP, subagent, cron, and background CLI execution under one SQLite-backed ledger, routing detached lifecycle updates through the executor seam, adding audit/maintenance/status visibility, tightening auto-cleanup and lost-run recovery, improving task awareness in internal status/tool surfaces, and clarifying the split between heartbeat/main-session automation and detached scheduled runs. Thanks @mbelinky and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Background tasks: 添加 the first linear task flow control surface 使用 `openclaw flows list|show|cancel`, keep manual multi-task flows separate 从 one-task auto-sync flows, 和 surface 诊断工具 recovery hints 为了 obviously orphaned 或 broken flow/task linkage. Thanks @mbelinky 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Background tasks: add the first linear task flow control surface with `openclaw flows list|show|cancel`, keep manual multi-task flows separate from one-task auto-sync flows, and surface doctor recovery hints for obviously orphaned or broken flow/task linkage. Thanks @mbelinky and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Channels/QQ Bot: 添加 QQ Bot as a bundled channel 插件 使用 multi-account setup, SecretRef-aware credentials, slash commands, reminders, 和 media send/receive 支持. (#52986) Thanks @sliverp.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/QQ Bot: add QQ Bot as a bundled channel plugin with multi-account setup, SecretRef-aware credentials, slash commands, reminders, and media send/receive support. (#52986) Thanks @sliverp.

changes.title: Diffs: skip unused viewer-versus-file SSR preload work so `diffs` view-only 和 file-only runs do less render work while keeping mode outputs aligned. (#57909) thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Diffs: skip unused viewer-versus-file SSR preload work so `diffs` view-only and file-only runs do less render work while keeping mode outputs aligned. (#57909) thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Tasks: 添加 a minimal SQLite-backed task flow registry plus task-to-flow linkage scaffolding, so orchestrated work can start gaining a first-class parent record 不适用 changing current task delivery behavior. Thanks @mbelinky 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Tasks: add a minimal SQLite-backed task flow registry plus task-to-flow linkage scaffolding, so orchestrated work can start gaining a first-class parent record without changing current task delivery behavior. Thanks @mbelinky and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Tasks: persist blocked state 在 one-task task flows 和 let the same flow reopen cleanly 在 重试, so blocked detached work can carry a parent-level reason 和 continue 不适用 fragmenting 进入 a new job. Thanks @mbelinky 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Tasks: persist blocked state on one-task task flows and let the same flow reopen cleanly on retry, so blocked detached work can carry a parent-level reason and continue without fragmenting into a new job. Thanks @mbelinky and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Tasks: route one-task ACP 和 subagent updates through a parent task-flow owner context, so detached work can emerge back through the intended parent thread/session 而不是 speaking only as a raw child task. Thanks @mbelinky 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Tasks: route one-task ACP and subagent updates through a parent task-flow owner context, so detached work can emerge back through the intended parent thread/session instead of speaking only as a raw child task. Thanks @mbelinky and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: LINE/outbound media: 添加 LINE image, video, 和 audio outbound sends 在 the LINE-specific delivery 路径, including explicit preview/tracking handling 为了 videos while keeping generic media sends 在 the existing image-only route. (#45826) Thanks @masatohoshino.
changes.rawTitle: LINE/outbound media: add LINE image, video, and audio outbound sends on the LINE-specific delivery path, including explicit preview/tracking handling for videos while keeping generic media sends on the existing image-only route. (#45826) Thanks @masatohoshino.

changes.title: Matrix/history: 添加 optional room history context 为了 Matrix group triggers via `channels.matrix.historyLimit`, 使用 per-Agent watermarks 和 重试-safe snapshots so failed trigger retries do not drift 进入 newer room messages. (#57022) thanks @chain710.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/history: add optional room history context for Matrix group triggers via `channels.matrix.historyLimit`, with per-agent watermarks and retry-safe snapshots so failed trigger retries do not drift into newer room messages. (#57022) thanks @chain710.

changes.title: Matrix/network: 添加 explicit `channels.matrix.代理` 配置 为了 routing Matrix traffic through an HTTP(S) 代理, including account-level overrides 和 matching probe/runtime behavior. (#56931) thanks @patrick-yingxi-pan.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/network: add explicit `channels.matrix.proxy` config for routing Matrix traffic through an HTTP(S) proxy, including account-level overrides and matching probe/runtime behavior. (#56931) thanks @patrick-yingxi-pan.

changes.title: Matrix/streaming: 添加 draft streaming so partial Matrix replies 更新 the same message 在 place 而不是 sending a new message 为了 each chunk. (#56387) Thanks @jrusz.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/streaming: add draft streaming so partial Matrix replies update the same message in place instead of sending a new message for each chunk. (#56387) Thanks @jrusz.

changes.rawTitle: Matrix/threads: add per-DM `threadReplies` overrides and keep thread session isolation aligned with the effective room or DM thread policy from the triggering message onward. (#57995) thanks @teconomix.

changes.title: MCP协议: 添加 remote HTTP/SSE server 支持 为了 `MCP协议.servers` URL configs, including 认证 headers 和 safer 配置 redaction 为了 MCP协议 credentials. (#50396) Thanks @dhananjai1729.
changes.rawTitle: MCP: add remote HTTP/SSE server support for `mcp.servers` URL configs, including auth headers and safer config redaction for MCP credentials. (#50396) Thanks @dhananjai1729.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: 添加 per-Agent `memorySearch.qmd.extraCollections` so Agent can opt 进入 cross-Agent session search 不适用 flattening every transcript collection 进入 one shared QMD namespace. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: add per-agent `memorySearch.qmd.extraCollections` so agents can opt into cross-agent session search without flattening every transcript collection into one shared QMD namespace. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Microsoft Teams/member info: add a Graph-backed member info action so Teams automations and tools can resolve channel member details directly from Microsoft Graph. (#57528) Thanks @sudie-codes.

changes.title: Nostr/inbound DMs: verify inbound event signatures 之前 pairing 或 sender-authorization side effects, so forged DM events no longer create pairing requests 或 trigger reply attempts. Thanks @smaeljaish771 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Nostr/inbound DMs: verify inbound event signatures before pairing or sender-authorization side effects, so forged DM events no longer create pairing requests or trigger reply attempts. Thanks @smaeljaish771 and @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: OpenAI/Responses: forward configured `text.verbosity` across Responses HTTP and WebSocket transports, surface it in `/status`, and keep per-agent verbosity precedence aligned with runtime behavior. (#47106) Thanks @merc1305 and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Pi/Codex: 添加 native Codex web search 支持 为了 embedded Pi runs, including 配置/docs/wizard coverage 和 managed-工具 suppression 当 native Codex search is active. (#46579) Thanks @Evizero.
changes.rawTitle: Pi/Codex: add native Codex web search support for embedded Pi runs, including config/docs/wizard coverage and managed-tool suppression when native Codex search is active. (#46579) Thanks @Evizero.

changes.rawTitle: Slack/exec approvals: add native Slack approval routing and approver authorization so exec approval prompts can stay in Slack instead of falling back to the Web UI or terminal. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: TTS: 添加 structured provider diagnostics 和 fallback attempt analytics. (#57954) Thanks @joshavant.
changes.rawTitle: TTS: Add structured provider diagnostics and fallback attempt analytics. (#57954) Thanks @joshavant.

changes.title: WhatsApp/reactions: Agent can 现在 react 使用 emoji 在 incoming WhatsApp messages, enabling more natural conversational interactions like acknowledging a photo 使用 ❤️ 而不是 typing a reply. Thanks @mcaxtr.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp/reactions: agents can now react with emoji on incoming WhatsApp messages, enabling more natural conversational interactions like acknowledging a photo with ❤️ instead of typing a reply. Thanks @mcaxtr.

changes.title: Agent/BTW: force `/btw` side questions to 禁用 provider reasoning so Anthropic adaptive-thinking sessions 停止 failing 使用 `No BTW response generated`. 修复 #55376. Thanks @Catteres 和 @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: CLI/onboarding: reset the remote gateway URL prompt to the safe loopback default after declining a discovered endpoint, so onboarding does not keep a previously rejected remote URL. (#57828)

changes.rawTitle: Agents/exec defaults: honor per-agent `tools.exec` defaults when no inline directive or session override is present, so configured exec host, security, ask, and node settings actually apply. (#57689)

changes.title: Sandbox/networking: sanitize SSH subprocess env vars through the shared sandbox policy 和 route marketplace archive downloads plus Ollama discovery, 认证, 和 pull requests through the guarded fetch 路径 so sandboxed execution 和 remote fetches follow the repo's trust boundaries. (#57848, #57850)
changes.rawTitle: Sandbox/networking: sanitize SSH subprocess env vars through the shared sandbox policy and route marketplace archive downloads plus Ollama discovery, auth, and pull requests through the guarded fetch path so sandboxed execution and remote fetches follow the repo's trust boundaries. changes.title: Slack: 停止 重试-driven duplicate replies 当 draft-finalization edits fail ambiguously, 和 log configured allowlisted users/channels 通过 readable name 而不是 raw IDs.
changes.rawTitle: Slack: stop retry-driven duplicate replies when draft-finalization edits fail ambiguously, and log configured allowlisted users/channels by readable name instead of raw IDs.

changes.title: Agent/OpenAI Responses: normalize raw bundled MCP协议 工具 schemas 在 the WebSocket/Responses 路径 so bare-object, object-ish, 和 top-level union MCP协议 tools no longer get rejected 通过 OpenAI 期间 工具 registration. (#58299) Thanks @yelog.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/OpenAI Responses: normalize raw bundled MCP tool schemas on the WebSocket/Responses path so bare-object, object-ish, and top-level union MCP tools no longer get rejected by OpenAI during tool registration. (#58299) Thanks @yelog.

changes.title: ACP/安全: replace ACP's dangerous-工具 name override 使用 semantic approval classes, so only narrow readonly reads/searches can auto-approve while indirect exec-capable 和 control-plane tools always require explicit prompt approval. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: ACP/security: replace ACP's dangerous-tool name override with semantic approval classes, so only narrow readonly reads/searches can auto-approve while indirect exec-capable and control-plane tools always require explicit prompt approval. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: ACP/sessions_spawn: register ACP child runs 为了 completion tracking 和 lifecycle cleanup, 和 make registration-failure cleanup explicitly best-effort so callers do not assume an already-started ACP turn was fully aborted. (#40885) Thanks @xaeon2026 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: ACP/sessions_spawn: register ACP child runs for completion tracking and lifecycle cleanup, and make registration-failure cleanup explicitly best-effort so callers do not assume an already-started ACP turn was fully aborted. (#40885) Thanks @xaeon2026 and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: ACP/tasks: mark cleanly exited ACP runs as blocked 当 they end 在 deterministic write 或 authorization blockers, 和 wake the parent session 使用 a follow-up 而不是 falsely reporting success.
changes.rawTitle: ACP/tasks: mark cleanly exited ACP runs as blocked when they end on deterministic write or authorization blockers, and wake the parent session with a follow-up instead of falsely reporting success.

changes.title: ACPX/runtime: derive the bundled ACPX expected version 从 the extension package metadata 而不是 hardcoding a separate literal, so 插件-local ACPX installs 停止 drifting out 的 health-check parity 之后 version bumps. (#49089) Thanks @jiejiesks 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: ACPX/runtime: derive the bundled ACPX expected version from the extension package metadata instead of hardcoding a separate literal, so plugin-local ACPX installs stop drifting out of health-check parity after version bumps. (#49089) Thanks @jiejiesks and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/Anthropic failover: treat Anthropic `api_error` payloads 使用 `An unexpected 错误 occurred while processing the response` as transient so 重试/fallback can engage 而不是 surfacing a terminal failure. (#57441) Thanks @zijiess 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Anthropic failover: treat Anthropic `api_error` payloads with `An unexpected error occurred while processing the response` as transient so retry/fallback can engage instead of surfacing a terminal failure. (#57441) Thanks @zijiess and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/compaction: keep late compaction-重试 completions 从 double-resolving finished compaction futures, so interrupted 或 timed-out compactions 停止 surfacing spurious second-completion races. (#57796) Thanks @joshavant.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: keep late compaction-retry completions from double-resolving finished compaction futures, so interrupted or timed-out compactions stop surfacing spurious second-completion races. (#57796) Thanks @joshavant.

changes.title: Agent/disabled providers: make disabled providers disappear 从 default 模型 selection 和 embedded provider fallback, while letting explicitly pinned disabled providers fail 使用 a clear 配置 错误 而不是 静默地 taking traffic. (#57735) Thanks @rileybrown-dev 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/disabled providers: make disabled providers disappear from default model selection and embedded provider fallback, while letting explicitly pinned disabled providers fail with a clear config error instead of silently taking traffic. (#57735) Thanks @rileybrown-dev and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/OAuth认证 output: force exec-host OAuth认证 output readers through the 网关 fs policy so embedded 网关 runs 停止 crashing 当 provider 认证 writes land outside the current sandbox workspace. (#58249) Thanks @joshavant.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/OAuth output: force exec-host OAuth output readers through the gateway fs policy so embedded gateway runs stop crashing when provider auth writes land outside the current sandbox workspace. (#58249) Thanks @joshavant.

changes.title: Agent/system prompt: 修复 `Agent.name` interpolation 在 the embedded runtime system prompt 和 make provider/模型 fallback text reflect the effective runtime selection 之后 start. (#57625) Thanks @StllrSvr 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/system prompt: fix `agent.name` interpolation in the embedded runtime system prompt and make provider/model fallback text reflect the effective runtime selection after start. (#57625) Thanks @StllrSvr and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Android/device info: read the app's version metadata 从 the package manager 而不是 hidden APIs so Android 15+ onboarding 和 device info no longer fail to compile 或 report placeholder values. (#58126) Thanks @L3ER0Y.
changes.rawTitle: Android/device info: read the app's version metadata from the package manager instead of hidden APIs so Android 15+ onboarding and device info no longer fail to compile or report placeholder values. (#58126) Thanks @L3ER0Y.

changes.title: Android/pairing: 停止 appending duplicate push receiver entries to `网关-service.conf` 在 repeated QR pairing 和 keep push registration bounded to the current successful pairing, so Android push delivery stays healthy across re-pair 和 令牌 rotation. (#58256) Thanks @surrealroad.

changes.title: App install smoke: pin the latest-release lookup to `latest`, cache the first stable install version across the rerun, 和 relax prerelease package assertions so the Parallels smoke lane can validate stable-to-main upgrades even 当 `beta` moves ahead 或 the guest starts 从 an older stable. (#58177) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: App install smoke: pin the latest-release lookup to `latest`, cache the first stable install version across the rerun, and relax prerelease package assertions so the Parallels smoke lane can validate stable-to-main upgrades even when `beta` moves ahead or the guest starts from an older stable. changes.title: 认证/profiles: keep the last successful 配置 load 在 内存 为了 the running process 和 refresh that snapshot 在 successful writes/reloads, so hot paths 停止 reparsing `openclaw.json` 之间 watcher-driven swaps.
changes.rawTitle: Auth/profiles: keep the last successful config load in memory for the running process and refresh that snapshot on successful writes/reloads, so hot paths stop reparsing `openclaw.json` between watcher-driven swaps.
