changes.title: Cron/isolated sessions: carry the full live-session provider, 模型, 和 认证-profile selection across 重试 restarts so cron jobs 使用 模型 overrides no longer fail 或 loop 在 mid-run 模型-switch requests. (#57972) Thanks @issaba1.
changes.rawTitle: Cron/isolated sessions: carry the full live-session provider, model, and auth-profile selection across retry restarts so cron jobs with model overrides no longer fail or loop on mid-run model-switch requests. (#57972) Thanks @issaba1.

changes.title: Diffs/配置: 保留 schema-shaped 插件 配置 parsing 从 `diffsPluginConfigSchema.safeParse()`, so direct callers keep `defaults` 和 `安全` sections 而不是 receiving flattened 工具 defaults. (#57904) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Diffs/config: preserve schema-shaped plugin config parsing from `diffsPluginConfigSchema.safeParse()`, so direct callers keep `defaults` and `security` sections instead of receiving flattened tool defaults. (#57904) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Diffs: fall back to plain text 当 `lang` hints are invalid 期间 diff render 和 viewer hydration, so bad 或 stale language values no longer break the diff viewer. (#57902) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Diffs: fall back to plain text when `lang` hints are invalid during diff render and viewer hydration, so bad or stale language values no longer break the diff viewer. (#57902) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Discord/语音: enforce the same guild channel 和 member allowlist checks 在 spoken 语音 ingress 之前 transcription, so joined 语音 channels no longer accept speech 从 users outside the configured Discord access policy. Thanks @cyjhhh 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/voice: enforce the same guild channel and member allowlist checks on spoken voice ingress before transcription, so joined voice channels no longer accept speech from users outside the configured Discord access policy. Thanks @cyjhhh and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Docker/setup: force BuildKit 为了 local image builds (including sandbox image builds) so `./docker-setup.sh` no longer fails 在 `RUN --mount=...` 当 hosts default to Docker's legacy builder. (#56681) Thanks @zhanghui-china.
changes.rawTitle: Docker/setup: force BuildKit for local image builds (including sandbox image builds) so `./docker-setup.sh` no longer fails on `RUN --mount=...` when hosts default to Docker's legacy builder. (#56681) Thanks @zhanghui-china.

changes.title: Docs/anchors: 修复 broken English docs links 和 make Mint anchor audits run against the English-source docs tree. (#57039) thanks @velvet-shark.
changes.rawTitle: Docs/anchors: fix broken English docs links and make Mint anchor audits run against the English-source docs tree. (#57039) thanks @velvet-shark.

changes.title: 诊断工具/插件: skip false Matrix legacy-helper warnings 当 no migration plans exist, 和 keep bundled `enabledByDefault` 插件 在 the 网关 startup set. (#57931) Thanks @dinakars777.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/plugins: skip false Matrix legacy-helper warnings when no migration plans exist, and keep bundled `enabledByDefault` plugins in the gateway startup set. (#57931) Thanks @dinakars777.

changes.title: Exec approvals/macOS: unwrap `arch` 和 `xcrun` 之前 deriving shell payloads 和 允许-always patterns, so wrapper approvals stay bound to the carried 命令 而不是 the outer carrier. Thanks @tdjackey 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Exec approvals/macOS: unwrap `arch` and `xcrun` before deriving shell payloads and allow-always patterns, so wrapper approvals stay bound to the carried command instead of the outer carrier. Thanks @tdjackey and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Exec approvals: unwrap `caffeinate` 和 `sandbox-exec` 之前 persisting 允许-always trust so later shell payload changes still require a fresh approval. Thanks @tdjackey 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Exec approvals: unwrap `caffeinate` and `sandbox-exec` before persisting allow-always trust so later shell payload changes still require a fresh approval. Thanks @tdjackey and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Exec/approvals: infer Discord 和 Telegram exec approvers 从 existing owner 配置 当 `execApprovals.approvers` is unset, extend the default approval window to 30 minutes, 和 clarify approval-unavailable guidance so approvals do not appear to 静默地 disappear.
changes.rawTitle: Exec/approvals: infer Discord and Telegram exec approvers from existing owner config when `execApprovals.approvers` is unset, extend the default approval window to 30 minutes, and clarify approval-unavailable guidance so approvals do not appear to silently disappear.

changes.title: Pi/TUI: flush message-boundary replies at `message_end` so turns 停止 looking stuck until the next nudge 当 the final reply was already ready. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Pi/TUI: flush message-boundary replies at `message_end` so turns stop looking stuck until the next nudge when the final reply was already ready. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Exec/approvals: keep `awk` 和 `sed` family binaries out 的 the low-risk `safeBins` fast 路径, 和 停止 诊断工具 profile scaffolding 从 treating them like ordinary custom filters. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Exec/approvals: keep `awk` and `sed` family binaries out of the low-risk `safeBins` fast path, and stop doctor profile scaffolding from treating them like ordinary custom filters. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Exec/env: block 代理, TLS, 和 Docker endpoint env overrides 在 host execution so request-scoped commands cannot 静默地 reroute outbound traffic 或 trust attacker-supplied certificate settings. Thanks @AntAISecurityLab.
changes.rawTitle: Exec/env: block proxy, TLS, and Docker endpoint env overrides in host execution so request-scoped commands cannot silently reroute outbound traffic or trust attacker-supplied certificate settings. Thanks @AntAISecurityLab.

changes.title: Exec/env: block Python package index override variables 从 request-scoped host exec environment sanitization so package fetches cannot be redirected through a caller-supplied index. Thanks @nexrin 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Exec/env: block Python package index override variables from request-scoped host exec environment sanitization so package fetches cannot be redirected through a caller-supplied index. Thanks @nexrin and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Exec/node: 停止 网关-side workdir fallback 从 rewriting explicit `host=node` cwd values to the 网关 filesystem, so remote node exec approval 和 runs keep using the intended node-local directory. (#50961) Thanks @openperf.
changes.rawTitle: Exec/node: stop gateway-side workdir fallback from rewriting explicit `host=node` cwd values to the gateway filesystem, so remote node exec approval and runs keep using the intended node-local directory. (#50961) Thanks @openperf.

changes.title: Exec/runtime: default implicit exec to `host=auto`, 解决 that target to sandbox only 当 a sandbox runtime exists, keep explicit `host=sandbox` fail-closed 不适用 sandbox, 和 show `/exec` effective host state 在 runtime status/docs.
changes.rawTitle: Exec/runtime: default implicit exec to `host=auto`, resolve that target to sandbox only when a sandbox runtime exists, keep explicit `host=sandbox` fail-closed without sandbox, and show `/exec` effective host state in runtime status/docs.

changes.title: Exec: fail closed 当 the implicit sandbox host has no sandbox runtime, 和 停止 denied async approval followups 从 reusing prior 命令 output 从 the same session. (#56800) Thanks @scoootscooob.
changes.rawTitle: Exec: fail closed when the implicit sandbox host has no sandbox runtime, and stop denied async approval followups from reusing prior command output from the same session. (#56800) Thanks @scoootscooob.

changes.title: 飞书/groups: keep quoted replies 和 topic bootstrap context aligned 使用 group sender allowlists so only allowlisted thread messages seed Agent context. Thanks @AntAISecurityLab 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu/groups: keep quoted replies and topic bootstrap context aligned with group sender allowlists so only allowlisted thread messages seed agent context. Thanks @AntAISecurityLab and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/attachments: offload large inbound images 不适用 leaking `media://` markers 进入 text-only runs, 保留 mixed attachment order 为了 模型 input/transcripts, 和 fail closed 当 模型 image capability cannot be resolved. (#55513) Thanks @Syysean.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/attachments: offload large inbound images without leaking `media://` markers into text-only runs, preserve mixed attachment order for model input/transcripts, and fail closed when model image capability cannot be resolved. (#55513) Thanks @Syysean.

changes.title: 网关/认证: keep shared-认证 rate limiting active 期间 WebSocket handshake attempts even 当 callers also send device-令牌 candidates, so bogus device-令牌 fields no longer suppress shared-secret brute-force tracking. Thanks @kexinoh 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/auth: keep shared-auth rate limiting active during WebSocket handshake attempts even when callers also send device-token candidates, so bogus device-token fields no longer suppress shared-secret brute-force tracking. Thanks @kexinoh and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/认证: reject mismatched 浏览器 `Origin` headers 在 trusted-代理 HTTP operator requests while keeping origin-less headless 代理 clients working. Thanks @AntAISecurityLab 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/auth: reject mismatched browser `Origin` headers on trusted-proxy HTTP operator requests while keeping origin-less headless proxy clients working. Thanks @AntAISecurityLab and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/device tokens: disconnect active device sessions 之后 令牌 rotation so newly rotated credentials revoke existing live connections immediately 而不是 waiting 为了 those sockets to close naturally. Thanks @zsxsoft 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/device tokens: disconnect active device sessions after token rotation so newly rotated credentials revoke existing live connections immediately instead of waiting for those sockets to close naturally. Thanks @zsxsoft and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/health: carry Webhook-vs-polling account mode 从 channel descriptors 进入 runtime snapshots so passive channels like LINE 和 BlueBubbles skip false stale-socket health failures. (#47488) Thanks @karesansui-u.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/health: carry webhook-vs-polling account mode from channel descriptors into runtime snapshots so passive channels like LINE and BlueBubbles skip false stale-socket health failures. (#47488) Thanks @karesansui-u.

changes.title: 网关/pairing: restore QR bootstrap onboarding handoff so fresh `/pair qr` iPhone setup can auto-approve the initial node pairing, receive a reusable node device 令牌, 和 停止 retrying 使用 spent bootstrap 认证. (#58382) Thanks @ngutman.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/pairing: restore QR bootstrap onboarding handoff so fresh `/pair qr` iPhone setup can auto-approve the initial node pairing, receive a reusable node device token, and stop retrying with spent bootstrap auth. (#58382) Thanks @ngutman.

changes.title: 网关/OpenAI compatibility: accept flat Responses API function 工具 definitions 在 `/v1/responses` 和 保留 `strict` 当 normalizing hosted tools 进入 the embedded runner, so spec-compliant clients like Codex no longer fail validation 或 静默地 lose strict 工具 enforcement. Thanks @malaiwah 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/OpenAI compatibility: accept flat Responses API function tool definitions on `/v1/responses` and preserve `strict` when normalizing hosted tools into the embedded runner, so spec-compliant clients like Codex no longer fail validation or silently lose strict tool enforcement. Thanks @malaiwah and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/OpenAI HTTP: restore default operator scopes 为了 bearer-authenticated requests that omit `x-openclaw-scopes`, so headless `/v1/chat/completions` 和 session-history callers work 重新 之后 the recent method-scope hardening. (#57596) Thanks @openperf.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/OpenAI HTTP: restore default operator scopes for bearer-authenticated requests that omit `x-openclaw-scopes`, so headless `/v1/chat/completions` and session-history callers work again after the recent method-scope hardening. (#57596) Thanks @openperf.

changes.title: 网关/插件: scope 插件-认证 HTTP route runtime clients to read-only access 和 keep 网关-authenticated 插件 routes 在 write scope, so 插件-owned Webhook handlers do not inherit write-capable runtime access 通过 default. Thanks @davidluzsilva 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/plugins: scope plugin-auth HTTP route runtime clients to read-only access and keep gateway-authenticated plugin routes on write scope, so plugin-owned webhook handlers do not inherit write-capable runtime access by default. Thanks @davidluzsilva and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/SecretRef: 解决 restart 令牌 drift checks 使用 merged service/runtime env sources 和 hard-fail unsupported mutable SecretRef plus OAuth认证-profile combinations so restart warnings 和 policy enforcement match runtime behavior. (#58141) Thanks @joshavant.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/SecretRef: resolve restart token drift checks with merged service/runtime env sources and hard-fail unsupported mutable SecretRef plus OAuth-profile combinations so restart warnings and policy enforcement match runtime behavior. (#58141) Thanks @joshavant.

changes.title: 网关/tools HTTP: tighten HTTP 工具-invoke authorization so owner-only tools stay off HTTP invoke paths. (#57773) Thanks @jacobtomlinson.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/tools HTTP: tighten HTTP tool-invoke authorization so owner-only tools stay off HTTP invoke paths. (#57773) Thanks @jacobtomlinson.

changes.title: Harden async approval followup delivery 在 webchat-only sessions (#57359) Thanks @joshavant.
changes.rawTitle: Harden async approval followup delivery in webchat-only sessions (#57359) Thanks @joshavant.

changes.title: Heartbeat/认证: 防止 exec-event heartbeat runs 从 inheriting owner-only 工具 access 从 the session delivery target, so node exec output stays 在 the non-owner 工具 surface even 当 the target session belongs to the owner. Thanks @AntAISecurityLab 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Heartbeat/auth: prevent exec-event heartbeat runs from inheriting owner-only tool access from the session delivery target, so node exec output stays on the non-owner tool surface even when the target session belongs to the owner. Thanks @AntAISecurityLab and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Hooks/配置: accept runtime channel 插件 ids 在 `hooks.mappings[].channel` (为了 example `飞书`) 而不是 rejecting non-core channels 期间 配置 validation. (#56226) Thanks @AiKrai001.
changes.rawTitle: Hooks/config: accept runtime channel plugin ids in `hooks.mappings[].channel` (for example `feishu`) instead of rejecting non-core channels during config validation. (#56226) Thanks @AiKrai001.

changes.title: Hooks/session routing: rebind hook-triggered `Agent:` session keys to the actual target Agent 之前 isolated dispatch so dedicated hook Agent keep their own session-scoped 工具 和 插件 identity. Thanks @kexinoh 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Hooks/session routing: rebind hook-triggered `agent:` session keys to the actual target agent before isolated dispatch so dedicated hook agents keep their own session-scoped tool and plugin identity. Thanks @kexinoh and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Host exec/env: block additional request-scoped env overrides that can redirect Docker endpoints, trust roots, compiler include paths, package resolution, 或 Python environment roots 期间 approved host runs. Thanks @tdjackey 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Host exec/env: block additional request-scoped env overrides that can redirect Docker endpoints, trust roots, compiler include paths, package resolution, or Python environment roots during approved host runs. Thanks @tdjackey and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Image generation/build: write stable runtime alias files 进入 `dist/` 和 route provider-认证 runtime lookups through those aliases so image-generation providers keep resolving 认证/runtime modules 之后 rebuilds 而不是 crashing 在 missing hashed chunk files.
changes.rawTitle: Image generation/build: write stable runtime alias files into `dist/` and route provider-auth runtime lookups through those aliases so image-generation providers keep resolving auth/runtime modules after rebuilds instead of crashing on missing hashed chunk files.

changes.title: iOS/Live Activities: mark the `ActivityKit` import 在 `LiveActivityManager.swift` as `@preconcurrency` so Xcode 26.4 / Swift 6 builds 停止 failing 在 strict concurrency checks. (#57180) Thanks @ngutman.
changes.rawTitle: iOS/Live Activities: mark the `ActivityKit` import in `LiveActivityManager.swift` as `@preconcurrency` so Xcode 26.4 / Swift 6 builds stop failing on strict concurrency checks. (#57180) Thanks @ngutman.

changes.title: LINE/ACP: 添加 current-conversation binding 和 inbound binding-routing parity so `/acp spawn ... --thread here`, configured ACP bindings, 和 active conversation-bound ACP sessions work 在 LINE like the other conversation channels.
changes.rawTitle: LINE/ACP: add current-conversation binding and inbound binding-routing parity so `/acp spawn ... --thread here`, configured ACP bindings, and active conversation-bound ACP sessions work on LINE like the other conversation channels.

changes.title: LINE/markdown: 保留 underscores inside Latin, Cyrillic, 和 CJK words 当 stripping markdown, while still removing standalone `_italic_` markers 在 the shared text-runtime 路径 used 通过 LINE 和 TTS. (#47465) Thanks @jackjin1997.
changes.rawTitle: LINE/markdown: preserve underscores inside Latin, Cyrillic, and CJK words when stripping markdown, while still removing standalone `_italic_` markers on the shared text-runtime path used by LINE and TTS. (#47465) Thanks @jackjin1997.

changes.title: Agent/failover: make overloaded same-provider 重试 count 和 重试 delay configurable via `认证.cooldowns`, default to one 重试 使用 no delay, 和 document the 模型-fallback behavior.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/failover: make overloaded same-provider retry count and retry delay configurable via `auth.cooldowns`, default to one retry with no delay, and document the model-fallback behavior.

items.title: Nodes/exec: 移除 the duplicated `nodes.run` shell wrapper 从 the CLI 和 Agent `nodes` 工具 so node shell execution always goes through `exec host=node`, keeping node-specific capabilities 在 `nodes invoke` 和 the dedicated media/location/notify actions.
items.rawTitle: Nodes/exec: remove the duplicated `nodes.run` shell wrapper from the CLI and agent `nodes` tool so node shell execution always goes through `exec host=node`, keeping node-specific capabilities on `nodes invoke` and the dedicated media/location/notify actions.

items.title: Skills/install 和 插件/install: built-在 dangerous-code `critical` findings 和 install-time scan failures 现在 fail closed 通过 default, so 插件 installs 和 网关-backed skill dependency installs that previously succeeded may 现在 require an explicit dangerous override such as `--dangerously-force-unsafe-install` to proceed.
items.rawTitle: Skills/install and Plugins/install: built-in dangerous-code `critical` findings and install-time scan failures now fail closed by default, so plugin installs and gateway-backed skill dependency installs that previously succeeded may now require an explicit dangerous override such as `--dangerously-force-unsafe-install` to proceed.

items.title: 网关/认证: `trusted-代理` 现在 rejects mixed shared-令牌 configs, 和 local-direct fallback requires the configured 令牌 而不是 implicitly authenticating same-host callers. Thanks @zhangning-Agent, @jacobtomlinson, 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/auth: `trusted-proxy` now rejects mixed shared-token configs, and local-direct fallback requires the configured token instead of implicitly authenticating same-host callers. Thanks @zhangning-agent, @jacobtomlinson, and @vincentkoc.

items.title: LINE/outbound media: 添加 LINE image, video, 和 audio outbound sends 在 the LINE-specific delivery 路径, including explicit preview/tracking handling 为了 videos while keeping generic media sends 在 the existing image-only route. (#45826) Thanks @masatohoshino.
items.rawTitle: LINE/outbound media: add LINE image, video, and audio outbound sends on the LINE-specific delivery path, including explicit preview/tracking handling for videos while keeping generic media sends on the existing image-only route. (#45826) Thanks @masatohoshino.

items.title: ACP/安全: replace ACP's dangerous-工具 name override 使用 semantic approval classes, so only narrow readonly reads/searches can auto-approve while indirect exec-capable 和 control-plane tools always require explicit prompt approval. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: ACP/security: replace ACP's dangerous-tool name override with semantic approval classes, so only narrow readonly reads/searches can auto-approve while indirect exec-capable and control-plane tools always require explicit prompt approval. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: ACP/sessions_spawn: register ACP child runs 为了 completion tracking 和 lifecycle cleanup, 和 make registration-failure cleanup explicitly best-effort so callers do not assume an already-started ACP turn was fully aborted. (#40885) Thanks @xaeon2026 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: ACP/sessions_spawn: register ACP child runs for completion tracking and lifecycle cleanup, and make registration-failure cleanup explicitly best-effort so callers do not assume an already-started ACP turn was fully aborted. (#40885) Thanks @xaeon2026 and @vincentkoc.

items.title: Agent/Anthropic failover: treat Anthropic `api_error` payloads 使用 `An unexpected 错误 occurred while processing the response` as transient so 重试/fallback can engage 而不是 surfacing a terminal failure. (#57441) Thanks @zijiess 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Agents/Anthropic failover: treat Anthropic `api_error` payloads with `An unexpected error occurred while processing the response` as transient so retry/fallback can engage instead of surfacing a terminal failure. (#57441) Thanks @zijiess and @vincentkoc.

items.title: Agent/compaction: keep late compaction-重试 completions 从 double-resolving finished compaction futures, so interrupted 或 timed-out compactions 停止 surfacing spurious second-completion races. (#57796) Thanks @joshavant.
items.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: keep late compaction-retry completions from double-resolving finished compaction futures, so interrupted or timed-out compactions stop surfacing spurious second-completion races. (#57796) Thanks @joshavant.

items.title: Agent/disabled providers: make disabled providers disappear 从 default 模型 selection 和 embedded provider fallback, while letting explicitly pinned disabled providers fail 使用 a clear 配置 错误 而不是 静默地 taking traffic. (#57735) Thanks @rileybrown-dev 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Agents/disabled providers: make disabled providers disappear from default model selection and embedded provider fallback, while letting explicitly pinned disabled providers fail with a clear config error instead of silently taking traffic. (#57735) Thanks @rileybrown-dev and @vincentkoc.

items.rawTitle: Exec/node: stop gateway-side workdir fallback from rewriting explicit `host=node` cwd values to the gateway filesystem, so remote node exec approval and runs keep using the intended node-local directory. (#50961) Thanks @openperf.

items.rawTitle: Exec: fail closed when the implicit sandbox host has no sandbox runtime, and stop denied async approval followups from reusing prior command output from the same session. (#56800) Thanks @scoootscooob.

items.title: Channels/QQ Bot: 添加 QQ Bot as a bundled channel 插件 使用 multi-account setup, SecretRef-aware credentials, slash commands, reminders, 和 media send/receive 支持. (#52986) Thanks @sliverp.
items.rawTitle: Channels/QQ Bot: add QQ Bot as a bundled channel plugin with multi-account setup, SecretRef-aware credentials, slash commands, reminders, and media send/receive support. (#52986) Thanks @sliverp.

items.rawTitle: Matrix/history: add optional room history context for Matrix group triggers via `channels.matrix.historyLimit`, with per-agent watermarks and retry-safe snapshots so failed trigger retries do not drift into newer room messages. (#57022) thanks @chain710.

items.rawTitle: Matrix/network: add explicit `channels.matrix.proxy` config for routing Matrix traffic through an HTTP(S) proxy, including account-level overrides and matching probe/runtime behavior. (#56931) thanks @patrick-yingxi-pan.

items.rawTitle: Matrix/streaming: add draft streaming so partial Matrix replies update the same message in place instead of sending a new message for each chunk. (#56387) Thanks @jrusz.

items.rawTitle: Microsoft Teams/member info: add a Graph-backed member info action so Teams automations and tools can resolve channel member details directly from Microsoft Graph. (#57528) Thanks @sudie-codes.

items.rawTitle: Slack/exec approvals: add native Slack approval routing and approver authorization so exec approval prompts can stay in Slack instead of falling back to the Web UI or terminal. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.rawTitle: WhatsApp/reactions: agents can now react with emoji on incoming WhatsApp messages, enabling more natural conversational interactions like acknowledging a photo with ❤️ instead of typing a reply. Thanks @mcaxtr.

items.title: Exec/env: block Python package index override variables 从 request-scoped host exec environment sanitization so package fetches cannot be redirected through a caller-supplied index. Thanks @nexrin 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Exec/env: block Python package index override variables from request-scoped host exec environment sanitization so package fetches cannot be redirected through a caller-supplied index. Thanks @nexrin and @vincentkoc.

items.title: ACPX/runtime: derive the bundled ACPX expected version 从 the extension package metadata 而不是 hardcoding a separate literal, so 插件-local ACPX installs 停止 drifting out 的 health-check parity 之后 version bumps. (#49089) Thanks @jiejiesks 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: ACPX/runtime: derive the bundled ACPX expected version from the extension package metadata instead of hardcoding a separate literal, so plugin-local ACPX installs stop drifting out of health-check parity after version bumps. (#49089) Thanks @jiejiesks and @vincentkoc.

items.title: App install smoke: pin the latest-release lookup to `latest`, cache the first stable install version across the rerun, 和 relax prerelease package assertions so the Parallels smoke lane can validate stable-to-main upgrades even 当 `beta` moves ahead 或 the guest starts 从 an older stable. (#58177) Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: App install smoke: pin the latest-release lookup to `latest`, cache the first stable install version across the rerun, and relax prerelease package assertions so the Parallels smoke lane can validate stable-to-main upgrades even when `beta` moves ahead or the guest starts from an older stable. (#58177) Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: Diffs/配置: 保留 schema-shaped 插件 配置 parsing 从 `diffsPluginConfigSchema.safeParse()`, so direct callers keep `defaults` 和 `安全` sections 而不是 receiving flattened 工具 defaults. (#57904) Thanks @gumadeiras.
items.rawTitle: Diffs/config: preserve schema-shaped plugin config parsing from `diffsPluginConfigSchema.safeParse()`, so direct callers keep `defaults` and `security` sections instead of receiving flattened tool defaults. (#57904) Thanks @gumadeiras.

items.title: 诊断工具/插件: skip false Matrix legacy-helper warnings 当 no migration plans exist, 和 keep bundled `enabledByDefault` 插件 在 the 网关 startup set. (#57931) Thanks @dinakars777.
items.rawTitle: Doctor/plugins: skip false Matrix legacy-helper warnings when no migration plans exist, and keep bundled `enabledByDefault` plugins in the gateway startup set. (#57931) Thanks @dinakars777.

items.title: 网关/插件: scope 插件-认证 HTTP route runtime clients to read-only access 和 keep 网关-authenticated 插件 routes 在 write scope, so 插件-owned Webhook handlers do not inherit write-capable runtime access 通过 default. Thanks @davidluzsilva 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/plugins: scope plugin-auth HTTP route runtime clients to read-only access and keep gateway-authenticated plugin routes on write scope, so plugin-owned webhook handlers do not inherit write-capable runtime access by default. Thanks @davidluzsilva and @vincentkoc.

items.title: Hooks/session routing: rebind hook-triggered `Agent:` session keys to the actual target Agent 之前 isolated dispatch so dedicated hook Agent keep their own session-scoped 工具 和 插件 identity. Thanks @kexinoh 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Hooks/session routing: rebind hook-triggered `agent:` session keys to the actual target agent before isolated dispatch so dedicated hook agents keep their own session-scoped tool and plugin identity. Thanks @kexinoh and @vincentkoc.

items.title: Docs/anchors: 修复 broken English docs links 和 make Mint anchor audits run against the English-source docs tree. (#57039) thanks @velvet-shark.
items.rawTitle: Docs/anchors: fix broken English docs links and make Mint anchor audits run against the English-source docs tree. (#57039) thanks @velvet-shark.

items.title: Exec approvals/macOS: unwrap `arch` 和 `xcrun` 之前 deriving shell payloads 和 允许-always patterns, so wrapper approvals stay bound to the carried 命令 而不是 the outer carrier. Thanks @tdjackey 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Exec approvals/macOS: unwrap `arch` and `xcrun` before deriving shell payloads and allow-always patterns, so wrapper approvals stay bound to the carried command instead of the outer carrier. Thanks @tdjackey and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Nodes/exec: 移除 the duplicated `nodes.run` shell wrapper 从 the CLI 和 Agent `nodes` 工具 so node shell execution always goes through `exec host=node`, keeping node-specific capabilities 在 `nodes invoke` 和 the dedicated media/location/notify actions.
changes.rawTitle: Nodes/exec: remove the duplicated `nodes.run` shell wrapper from the CLI and agent `nodes` tool so node shell execution always goes through `exec host=node`, keeping node-specific capabilities on `nodes invoke` and the dedicated media/location/notify actions.

changes.title: 插件 SDK: deprecate the legacy provider compat subpaths plus the older bundled provider setup 和 channel-runtime compatibility shims, emit migration warnings, 和 keep the current documented `openclaw/插件-sdk/*` entrypoints plus local `API.ts` / `runtime-API.ts` barrels as the forward 路径 ahead 的 a future major-release removal.
changes.rawTitle: Plugin SDK: deprecate the legacy provider compat subpaths plus the older bundled provider setup and channel-runtime compatibility shims, emit migration warnings, and keep the current documented `openclaw/plugin-sdk/*` entrypoints plus local `api.ts` / `runtime-api.ts` barrels as the forward path ahead of a future major-release removal.

changes.title: Skills/install 和 插件/install: built-在 dangerous-code `critical` findings 和 install-time scan failures 现在 fail closed 通过 default, so 插件 installs 和 网关-backed skill dependency installs that previously succeeded may 现在 require an explicit dangerous override such as `--dangerously-force-unsafe-install` to proceed.
changes.rawTitle: Skills/install and Plugins/install: built-in dangerous-code `critical` findings and install-time scan failures now fail closed by default, so plugin installs and gateway-backed skill dependency installs that previously succeeded may now require an explicit dangerous override such as `--dangerously-force-unsafe-install` to proceed.

changes.title: 网关/认证: `trusted-代理` 现在 rejects mixed shared-令牌 configs, 和 local-direct fallback requires the configured 令牌 而不是 implicitly authenticating same-host callers. Thanks @zhangning-Agent, @jacobtomlinson, 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/auth: `trusted-proxy` now rejects mixed shared-token configs, and local-direct fallback requires the configured token instead of implicitly authenticating same-host callers. Thanks @zhangning-agent, @jacobtomlinson, and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/node commands: node commands 现在 stay disabled until node pairing is approved, so device pairing alone is no longer enough to expose declared node commands. (#57777) Thanks @jacobtomlinson.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/node commands: node commands now stay disabled until node pairing is approved, so device pairing alone is no longer enough to expose declared node commands. (#57777) Thanks @jacobtomlinson.

changes.title: 网关/node events: node-originated runs 现在 stay 在 a reduced trusted surface, so notification-driven 或 node-triggered flows that previously relied 在 broader host/session 工具 access may need adjustment. (#57691) Thanks @jacobtomlinson.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/node events: node-originated runs now stay on a reduced trusted surface, so notification-driven or node-triggered flows that previously relied on broader host/session tool access may need adjustment. (#57691) Thanks @jacobtomlinson.

changes.title: ACP/插件: 添加 an explicit default-off ACPX 插件-tools MCP协议 bridge 配置, document the trust boundary, 和 harden the built-在 bridge packaging/logging 路径 so global installs 和 stdio MCP协议 sessions work reliably. (#56867) Thanks @joe2643.
changes.rawTitle: ACP/plugins: add an explicit default-off ACPX plugin-tools MCP bridge config, document the trust boundary, and harden the built-in bridge packaging/logging path so global installs and stdio MCP sessions work reliably. (#56867) Thanks @joe2643.

changes.title: Agent/LLM: 添加 a configurable idle-stream 超时 为了 embedded runner requests so stalled 模型 streams abort cleanly 而不是 hanging until the broader run 超时 fires. (#55072) Thanks @liuy.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/LLM: add a configurable idle-stream timeout for embedded runner requests so stalled model streams abort cleanly instead of hanging until the broader run timeout fires. (#55072) Thanks @liuy.

changes.title: Agent/MCP协议: materialize bundle MCP协议 tools 使用 provider-safe names (`serverName__toolName`), 支持 optional `streamable-http` transport selection plus per-server connection timeouts, 和 保留 real 工具 results 从 aborted/错误 turns unless truncation explicitly drops them. (#49505) Thanks @ziomancer.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/MCP: materialize bundle MCP tools with provider-safe names (`serverName__toolName`), support optional `streamable-http` transport selection plus per-server connection timeouts, and preserve real tool results from aborted/error turns unless truncation explicitly drops them. (#49505) Thanks @ziomancer.

changes.title: Android/notifications: 添加 notification-forwarding controls 使用 package filtering, quiet hours, rate limiting, 和 safer picker behavior 为了 forwarded notification events. (#40175) Thanks @nimbleenigma.
changes.rawTitle: Android/notifications: add notification-forwarding controls with package filtering, quiet hours, rate limiting, and safer picker behavior for forwarded notification events. (#40175) Thanks @nimbleenigma.

changes.title: Background tasks: turn tasks 进入 a real shared background-run control plane 而不是 ACP-only bookkeeping 通过 unifying ACP, subagent, cron, 和 background CLI execution under one SQLite-backed ledger, routing detached lifecycle updates through the executor seam, adding audit/maintenance/status visibility, tightening auto-cleanup 和 lost-run recovery, improving task awareness 在 internal status/工具 surfaces, 和 clarifying the split 之间 heartbeat/main-session automation 和 detached scheduled runs. Thanks @mbelinky 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Background tasks: turn tasks into a real shared background-run control plane instead of ACP-only bookkeeping by unifying ACP, subagent, cron, and background CLI execution under one SQLite-backed ledger, routing detached lifecycle updates through the executor seam, adding audit/maintenance/status visibility, tightening auto-cleanup and lost-run recovery, improving task awareness in internal status/tool surfaces, and clarifying the split between heartbeat/main-session automation and detached scheduled runs. Thanks @mbelinky and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Background tasks: 添加 the first linear task flow control surface 使用 `openclaw flows list|show|cancel`, keep manual multi-task flows separate 从 one-task auto-sync flows, 和 surface 诊断工具 recovery hints 为了 obviously orphaned 或 broken flow/task linkage. Thanks @mbelinky 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Background tasks: add the first linear task flow control surface with `openclaw flows list|show|cancel`, keep manual multi-task flows separate from one-task auto-sync flows, and surface doctor recovery hints for obviously orphaned or broken flow/task linkage. Thanks @mbelinky and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Channels/QQ Bot: 添加 QQ Bot as a bundled channel 插件 使用 multi-account setup, SecretRef-aware credentials, slash commands, reminders, 和 media send/receive 支持. (#52986) Thanks @sliverp.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/QQ Bot: add QQ Bot as a bundled channel plugin with multi-account setup, SecretRef-aware credentials, slash commands, reminders, and media send/receive support. (#52986) Thanks @sliverp.

changes.title: Diffs: skip unused viewer-versus-file SSR preload work so `diffs` view-only 和 file-only runs do less render work while keeping mode outputs aligned. (#57909) thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Diffs: skip unused viewer-versus-file SSR preload work so `diffs` view-only and file-only runs do less render work while keeping mode outputs aligned. (#57909) thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Tasks: 添加 a minimal SQLite-backed task flow registry plus task-to-flow linkage scaffolding, so orchestrated work can start gaining a first-class parent record 不适用 changing current task delivery behavior. Thanks @mbelinky 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Tasks: add a minimal SQLite-backed task flow registry plus task-to-flow linkage scaffolding, so orchestrated work can start gaining a first-class parent record without changing current task delivery behavior. Thanks @mbelinky and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Tasks: persist blocked state 在 one-task task flows 和 let the same flow reopen cleanly 在 重试, so blocked detached work can carry a parent-level reason 和 continue 不适用 fragmenting 进入 a new job. Thanks @mbelinky 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Tasks: persist blocked state on one-task task flows and let the same flow reopen cleanly on retry, so blocked detached work can carry a parent-level reason and continue without fragmenting into a new job. Thanks @mbelinky and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Tasks: route one-task ACP 和 subagent updates through a parent task-flow owner context, so detached work can emerge back through the intended parent thread/session 而不是 speaking only as a raw child task. Thanks @mbelinky 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Tasks: route one-task ACP and subagent updates through a parent task-flow owner context, so detached work can emerge back through the intended parent thread/session instead of speaking only as a raw child task. Thanks @mbelinky and @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: LINE/outbound media: add LINE image, video, and audio outbound sends on the LINE-specific delivery path, including explicit preview/tracking handling for videos while keeping generic media sends on the existing image-only route. (#45826) Thanks @masatohoshino.
