changes.title: Anthropic/OAuth认证: inject `/fast` `service_tier` hints 为了 direct `sk-ant-oat-*` requests so OAuth认证-authenticated Anthropic runs 停止 missing the same overload-routing Signal as API-密钥 traffic. 修复 #55758. Thanks @Cypherm 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Anthropic/OAuth: inject `/fast` `service_tier` hints for direct `sk-ant-oat-*` requests so OAuth-authenticated Anthropic runs stop missing the same overload-routing signal as API-key traffic. Fixes #55758. Thanks @Cypherm and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Anthropic/service tiers: 支持 explicit `serviceTier` 模型 params 为了 direct Anthropic requests 和 let them override `/fast` defaults 当 both are set. (#45453) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Anthropic/service tiers: support explicit `serviceTier` model params for direct Anthropic requests and let them override `/fast` defaults when both are set. (#45453) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Auto-reply/fast: accept `/fast status` 在 the directive-only 路径, align help/status text 使用 the documented `status|在|off` syntax, 和 keep current-state replies consistent across 命令 surfaces. 修复 #46095. Thanks @weissfl 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Auto-reply/fast: accept `/fast status` on the directive-only path, align help/status text with the documented `status|on|off` syntax, and keep current-state replies consistent across command surfaces. Fixes #46095. Thanks @weissfl and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Azure OpenAI/custom providers: use the `azure-OpenAI-responses` 路径 为了 Azure custom providers so Azure OpenAI endpoints stay 在 the correct Responses integration surface. (#50851) Thanks @kunalk16.
changes.rawTitle: Azure OpenAI/custom providers: use the `azure-openai-responses` path for Azure custom providers so Azure OpenAI endpoints stay on the correct Responses integration surface. (#50851) Thanks @kunalk16.

changes.title: BlueBubbles/iMessage: coalesce URL-only inbound messages 使用 their link-preview balloon 重新 so sharing a bare link no longer drops the URL 从 Agent context. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: BlueBubbles/iMessage: coalesce URL-only inbound messages with their link-preview balloon again so sharing a bare link no longer drops the URL from agent context. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 浏览器/插件: auto-启用 the bundled 浏览器 插件 当 浏览器 配置 或 浏览器 工具 policy already references it, 和 show a clearer CLI 错误 当 `插件.允许` excludes `浏览器`.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/plugins: auto-enable the bundled browser plugin when browser config or browser tool policy already references it, and show a clearer CLI error when `plugins.allow` excludes `browser`.

changes.title: CI/dev checks: default local `pnpm check` to a lower-内存 typecheck/lint 路径 while keeping CI 在 the normal parallel 路径, 和 harden Telegram test typing/literals around native TypeScript-Go tooling crashes.
changes.rawTitle: CI/dev checks: default local `pnpm check` to a lower-memory typecheck/lint path while keeping CI on the normal parallel path, and harden Telegram test typing/literals around native TypeScript-Go tooling crashes.

changes.title: Tasks: 添加 a small task-flow runtime substrate 为了 authoring layers 使用 persisted wait targets 和 output bags, plus bundled skills/Lobster examples 和 richer `flows show` / `诊断工具` recovery hints 为了 multi-task flow state. (#58336) Thanks @mbelinky 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Tasks: add a small task-flow runtime substrate for authoring layers with persisted wait targets and output bags, plus bundled skills/Lobster examples and richer `flows show` / `doctor` recovery hints for multi-task flow state. (#58336) Thanks @mbelinky and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 配置/legacy cleanup: 停止 probing obsolete alternate legacy 配置 names 和 service labels 期间 local 配置/service detection, while keeping the active `~/.openclaw/openclaw.json` 路径 canonical.
changes.rawTitle: Config/legacy cleanup: stop probing obsolete alternate legacy config names and service labels during local config/service detection, while keeping the active `~/.openclaw/openclaw.json` path canonical.

changes.title: 配置/runtime: pin the first successful 配置 load 在 内存 为了 the running process 和 refresh that snapshot 在 successful writes/reloads, so hot paths 停止 reparsing `openclaw.json` 之间 watcher-driven swaps.
changes.rawTitle: Config/runtime: pin the first successful config load in memory for the running process and refresh that snapshot on successful writes/reloads, so hot paths stop reparsing `openclaw.json` between watcher-driven swaps.

changes.title: 配置/SecretRef + Control 界面: harden SecretRef redaction round-trip restore, block unsafe raw fallback (force Form mode 当 raw is unavailable), 和 preflight submitted-配置 SecretRefs 之前 配置 write RPC persistence. (#58044) Thanks @joshavant.
changes.rawTitle: Config/SecretRef + Control UI: harden SecretRef redaction round-trip restore, block unsafe raw fallback (force Form mode when raw is unavailable), and preflight submitted-config SecretRefs before config write RPC persistence. (#58044) Thanks @joshavant.

changes.title: 配置/Telegram: migrate removed `channels.Telegram.groupMentionsOnly` 进入 `channels.Telegram.groups["*"].requireMention` 在 load so legacy configs no longer 崩溃 at startup. (#55336) thanks @jameslcowan.
changes.rawTitle: Config/Telegram: migrate removed `channels.telegram.groupMentionsOnly` into `channels.telegram.groups["*"].requireMention` on load so legacy configs no longer crash at startup. (#55336) thanks @jameslcowan.

changes.title: 配置/更新: 停止 `openclaw 诊断工具` write-backs 从 persisting 插件-injected channel defaults, so `openclaw 更新` no longer seeds 配置 keys that later break service refresh validation. (#56834) Thanks @openperf.
changes.rawTitle: Config/update: stop `openclaw doctor` write-backs from persisting plugin-injected channel defaults, so `openclaw update` no longer seeds config keys that later break service refresh validation. (#56834) Thanks @openperf.

changes.title: Control 界面/Agent: auto-load Agent workspace files 在 initial Files panel open, 和 populate overview 模型/workspace/fallbacks 从 effective runtime Agent metadata so defaulted 模型 no longer show as `Not set`. (#56637) Thanks @dxsx84.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/agents: auto-load agent workspace files on initial Files panel open, and populate overview model/workspace/fallbacks from effective runtime agent metadata so defaulted models no longer show as `Not set`. (#56637) Thanks @dxsx84.

changes.title: Control 界面/slash commands: make `/steer` 和 `/redirect` work 从 the chat 命令 palette 使用 visible pending state 为了 active-run `/steer`, correct redirected-run tracking, 和 a single canonical `/steer` entry 在 the 命令 menu. (#54625) Thanks @fuller-stack-dev.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/slash commands: make `/steer` and `/redirect` work from the chat command palette with visible pending state for active-run `/steer`, correct redirected-run tracking, and a single canonical `/steer` entry in the command menu. (#54625) Thanks @fuller-stack-dev.

changes.title: Cron/announce: 保留 all deliverable text payloads 为了 announce mode 而不是 collapsing to the last chunk, so multi-line cron reports deliver 在 full to Telegram forum topics.
changes.rawTitle: Cron/announce: preserve all deliverable text payloads for announce mode instead of collapsing to the last chunk, so multi-line cron reports deliver in full to Telegram forum topics.

changes.title: Cron/isolated sessions: carry the full live-session provider, 模型, 和 认证-profile selection across 重试 restarts so cron jobs 使用 模型 overrides no longer fail 或 loop 在 mid-run 模型-switch requests. (#57972) Thanks @issaba1.
changes.rawTitle: Cron/isolated sessions: carry the full live-session provider, model, and auth-profile selection across retry restarts so cron jobs with model overrides no longer fail or loop on mid-run model-switch requests. (#57972) Thanks @issaba1.

changes.title: Diffs/配置: 保留 schema-shaped 插件 配置 parsing 从 `diffsPluginConfigSchema.safeParse()`, so direct callers keep `defaults` 和 `安全` sections 而不是 receiving flattened 工具 defaults. (#57904) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Diffs/config: preserve schema-shaped plugin config parsing from `diffsPluginConfigSchema.safeParse()`, so direct callers keep `defaults` and `security` sections instead of receiving flattened tool defaults. (#57904) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Diffs: fall back to plain text 当 `lang` hints are invalid 期间 diff render 和 viewer hydration, so bad 或 stale language values no longer break the diff viewer. (#57902) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Diffs: fall back to plain text when `lang` hints are invalid during diff render and viewer hydration, so bad or stale language values no longer break the diff viewer. (#57902) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Discord/语音: enforce the same guild channel 和 member allowlist checks 在 spoken 语音 ingress 之前 transcription, so joined 语音 channels no longer accept speech 从 users outside the configured Discord access policy. Thanks @cyjhhh 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/voice: enforce the same guild channel and member allowlist checks on spoken voice ingress before transcription, so joined voice channels no longer accept speech from users outside the configured Discord access policy. Thanks @cyjhhh and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Docker/setup: force BuildKit 为了 local image builds (including sandbox image builds) so `./docker-setup.sh` no longer fails 在 `RUN --mount=...` 当 hosts default to Docker's legacy builder. (#56681) Thanks @zhanghui-china.
changes.rawTitle: Docker/setup: force BuildKit for local image builds (including sandbox image builds) so `./docker-setup.sh` no longer fails on `RUN --mount=...` when hosts default to Docker's legacy builder. (#56681) Thanks @zhanghui-china.

changes.title: Docs/anchors: 修复 broken English docs links 和 make Mint anchor audits run against the English-source docs tree. (#57039) thanks @velvet-shark.
changes.rawTitle: Docs/anchors: fix broken English docs links and make Mint anchor audits run against the English-source docs tree. (#57039) thanks @velvet-shark.

changes.title: 诊断工具/插件: skip false Matrix legacy-helper warnings 当 no migration plans exist, 和 keep bundled `enabledByDefault` 插件 在 the 网关 startup set. (#57931) Thanks @dinakars777.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/plugins: skip false Matrix legacy-helper warnings when no migration plans exist, and keep bundled `enabledByDefault` plugins in the gateway startup set. (#57931) Thanks @dinakars777.

changes.title: Exec approvals/macOS: unwrap `arch` 和 `xcrun` 之前 deriving shell payloads 和 允许-always patterns, so wrapper approvals stay bound to the carried 命令 而不是 the outer carrier. Thanks @tdjackey 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Exec approvals/macOS: unwrap `arch` and `xcrun` before deriving shell payloads and allow-always patterns, so wrapper approvals stay bound to the carried command instead of the outer carrier. Thanks @tdjackey and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Exec approvals: unwrap `caffeinate` 和 `sandbox-exec` 之前 persisting 允许-always trust so later shell payload changes still require a fresh approval. Thanks @tdjackey 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Exec approvals: unwrap `caffeinate` and `sandbox-exec` before persisting allow-always trust so later shell payload changes still require a fresh approval. Thanks @tdjackey and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Exec/approvals: infer Discord 和 Telegram exec approvers 从 existing owner 配置 当 `execApprovals.approvers` is unset, extend the default approval window to 30 minutes, 和 clarify approval-unavailable guidance so approvals do not appear to 静默地 disappear.
changes.rawTitle: Exec/approvals: infer Discord and Telegram exec approvers from existing owner config when `execApprovals.approvers` is unset, extend the default approval window to 30 minutes, and clarify approval-unavailable guidance so approvals do not appear to silently disappear.

changes.title: Exec/approvals: keep `awk` 和 `sed` family binaries out 的 the low-risk `safeBins` fast 路径, 和 停止 诊断工具 profile scaffolding 从 treating them like ordinary custom filters. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Exec/approvals: keep `awk` and `sed` family binaries out of the low-risk `safeBins` fast path, and stop doctor profile scaffolding from treating them like ordinary custom filters. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Exec/env: block 代理, TLS, 和 Docker endpoint env overrides 在 host execution so request-scoped commands cannot 静默地 reroute outbound traffic 或 trust attacker-supplied certificate settings. Thanks @AntAISecurityLab.
changes.rawTitle: Exec/env: block proxy, TLS, and Docker endpoint env overrides in host execution so request-scoped commands cannot silently reroute outbound traffic or trust attacker-supplied certificate settings. Thanks @AntAISecurityLab.

changes.title: Exec/env: block Python package index override variables 从 request-scoped host exec environment sanitization so package fetches cannot be redirected through a caller-supplied index. Thanks @nexrin 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Exec/env: block Python package index override variables from request-scoped host exec environment sanitization so package fetches cannot be redirected through a caller-supplied index. Thanks @nexrin and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Exec/node: 停止 网关-side workdir fallback 从 rewriting explicit `host=node` cwd values to the 网关 filesystem, so remote node exec approval 和 runs keep using the intended node-local directory. (#50961) Thanks @openperf.
changes.rawTitle: Exec/node: stop gateway-side workdir fallback from rewriting explicit `host=node` cwd values to the gateway filesystem, so remote node exec approval and runs keep using the intended node-local directory. (#50961) Thanks @openperf.

changes.title: Exec/runtime: default implicit exec to `host=auto`, 解决 that target to sandbox only 当 a sandbox runtime exists, keep explicit `host=sandbox` fail-closed 不适用 sandbox, 和 show `/exec` effective host state 在 runtime status/docs.
changes.rawTitle: Exec/runtime: default implicit exec to `host=auto`, resolve that target to sandbox only when a sandbox runtime exists, keep explicit `host=sandbox` fail-closed without sandbox, and show `/exec` effective host state in runtime status/docs.

changes.title: Exec: fail closed 当 the implicit sandbox host has no sandbox runtime, 和 停止 denied async approval followups 从 reusing prior 命令 output 从 the same session. (#56800) Thanks @scoootscooob.
changes.rawTitle: Exec: fail closed when the implicit sandbox host has no sandbox runtime, and stop denied async approval followups from reusing prior command output from the same session. (#56800) Thanks @scoootscooob.

changes.title: 飞书/groups: keep quoted replies 和 topic bootstrap context aligned 使用 group sender allowlists so only allowlisted thread messages seed Agent context. Thanks @AntAISecurityLab 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu/groups: keep quoted replies and topic bootstrap context aligned with group sender allowlists so only allowlisted thread messages seed agent context. Thanks @AntAISecurityLab and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/attachments: offload large inbound images 不适用 leaking `media://` markers 进入 text-only runs, 保留 mixed attachment order 为了 模型 input/transcripts, 和 fail closed 当 模型 image capability cannot be resolved. (#55513) Thanks @Syysean.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/attachments: offload large inbound images without leaking `media://` markers into text-only runs, preserve mixed attachment order for model input/transcripts, and fail closed when model image capability cannot be resolved. (#55513) Thanks @Syysean.

changes.title: 网关/认证: keep shared-认证 rate limiting active 期间 WebSocket handshake attempts even 当 callers also send device-令牌 candidates, so bogus device-令牌 fields no longer suppress shared-secret brute-force tracking. Thanks @kexinoh 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/auth: keep shared-auth rate limiting active during WebSocket handshake attempts even when callers also send device-token candidates, so bogus device-token fields no longer suppress shared-secret brute-force tracking. Thanks @kexinoh and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/认证: reject mismatched 浏览器 `Origin` headers 在 trusted-代理 HTTP operator requests while keeping origin-less headless 代理 clients working. Thanks @AntAISecurityLab 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/auth: reject mismatched browser `Origin` headers on trusted-proxy HTTP operator requests while keeping origin-less headless proxy clients working. Thanks @AntAISecurityLab and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/device tokens: disconnect active device sessions 之后 令牌 rotation so newly rotated credentials revoke existing live connections immediately 而不是 waiting 为了 those sockets to close naturally. Thanks @zsxsoft 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/device tokens: disconnect active device sessions after token rotation so newly rotated credentials revoke existing live connections immediately instead of waiting for those sockets to close naturally. Thanks @zsxsoft and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/health: carry Webhook-vs-polling account mode 从 channel descriptors 进入 runtime snapshots so passive channels like LINE 和 BlueBubbles skip false stale-socket health failures. (#47488) Thanks @karesansui-u.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/health: carry webhook-vs-polling account mode from channel descriptors into runtime snapshots so passive channels like LINE and BlueBubbles skip false stale-socket health failures. (#47488) Thanks @karesansui-u.

changes.title: 网关/pairing: restore QR bootstrap onboarding handoff so fresh `/pair qr` iPhone setup can auto-approve the initial node pairing, receive a reusable node device 令牌, 和 停止 retrying 使用 spent bootstrap 认证. (#58382) Thanks @ngutman.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/pairing: restore QR bootstrap onboarding handoff so fresh `/pair qr` iPhone setup can auto-approve the initial node pairing, receive a reusable node device token, and stop retrying with spent bootstrap auth. (#58382) Thanks @ngutman.

changes.title: 网关/OpenAI compatibility: accept flat Responses API function 工具 definitions 在 `/v1/responses` 和 保留 `strict` 当 normalizing hosted tools 进入 the embedded runner, so spec-compliant clients like Codex no longer fail validation 或 静默地 lose strict 工具 enforcement. Thanks @malaiwah 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/OpenAI compatibility: accept flat Responses API function tool definitions on `/v1/responses` and preserve `strict` when normalizing hosted tools into the embedded runner, so spec-compliant clients like Codex no longer fail validation or silently lose strict tool enforcement. Thanks @malaiwah and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/OpenAI HTTP: restore default operator scopes 为了 bearer-authenticated requests that omit `x-openclaw-scopes`, so headless `/v1/chat/completions` 和 session-history callers work 重新 之后 the recent method-scope hardening. (#57596) Thanks @openperf.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/OpenAI HTTP: restore default operator scopes for bearer-authenticated requests that omit `x-openclaw-scopes`, so headless `/v1/chat/completions` and session-history callers work again after the recent method-scope hardening. (#57596) Thanks @openperf.

changes.title: 网关/插件: scope 插件-认证 HTTP route runtime clients to read-only access 和 keep 网关-authenticated 插件 routes 在 write scope, so 插件-owned Webhook handlers do not inherit write-capable runtime access 通过 default. Thanks @davidluzsilva 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/plugins: scope plugin-auth HTTP route runtime clients to read-only access and keep gateway-authenticated plugin routes on write scope, so plugin-owned webhook handlers do not inherit write-capable runtime access by default. Thanks @davidluzsilva and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/SecretRef: 解决 restart 令牌 drift checks 使用 merged service/runtime env sources 和 hard-fail unsupported mutable SecretRef plus OAuth认证-profile combinations so restart warnings 和 policy enforcement match runtime behavior. (#58141) Thanks @joshavant.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/SecretRef: resolve restart token drift checks with merged service/runtime env sources and hard-fail unsupported mutable SecretRef plus OAuth-profile combinations so restart warnings and policy enforcement match runtime behavior. (#58141) Thanks @joshavant.

changes.title: 网关/tools HTTP: tighten HTTP 工具-invoke authorization so owner-only tools stay off HTTP invoke paths. (#57773) Thanks @jacobtomlinson.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/tools HTTP: tighten HTTP tool-invoke authorization so owner-only tools stay off HTTP invoke paths. (#57773) Thanks @jacobtomlinson.

changes.title: Harden async approval followup delivery 在 webchat-only sessions (#57359) Thanks @joshavant.
changes.rawTitle: Harden async approval followup delivery in webchat-only sessions (#57359) Thanks @joshavant.

changes.title: Heartbeat/认证: 防止 exec-event heartbeat runs 从 inheriting owner-only 工具 access 从 the session delivery target, so node exec output stays 在 the non-owner 工具 surface even 当 the target session belongs to the owner. Thanks @AntAISecurityLab 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Heartbeat/auth: prevent exec-event heartbeat runs from inheriting owner-only tool access from the session delivery target, so node exec output stays on the non-owner tool surface even when the target session belongs to the owner. Thanks @AntAISecurityLab and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Hooks/配置: accept runtime channel 插件 ids 在 `hooks.mappings[].channel` (为了 example `飞书`) 而不是 rejecting non-core channels 期间 配置 validation. (#56226) Thanks @AiKrai001.
changes.rawTitle: Hooks/config: accept runtime channel plugin ids in `hooks.mappings[].channel` (for example `feishu`) instead of rejecting non-core channels during config validation. (#56226) Thanks @AiKrai001.

changes.title: Hooks/session routing: rebind hook-triggered `Agent:` session keys to the actual target Agent 之前 isolated dispatch so dedicated hook Agent keep their own session-scoped 工具 和 插件 identity. Thanks @kexinoh 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Hooks/session routing: rebind hook-triggered `agent:` session keys to the actual target agent before isolated dispatch so dedicated hook agents keep their own session-scoped tool and plugin identity. Thanks @kexinoh and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Host exec/env: block additional request-scoped env overrides that can redirect Docker endpoints, trust roots, compiler include paths, package resolution, 或 Python environment roots 期间 approved host runs. Thanks @tdjackey 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Host exec/env: block additional request-scoped env overrides that can redirect Docker endpoints, trust roots, compiler include paths, package resolution, or Python environment roots during approved host runs. Thanks @tdjackey and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Image generation/build: write stable runtime alias files 进入 `dist/` 和 route provider-认证 runtime lookups through those aliases so image-generation providers keep resolving 认证/runtime modules 之后 rebuilds 而不是 crashing 在 missing hashed chunk files.
changes.rawTitle: Image generation/build: write stable runtime alias files into `dist/` and route provider-auth runtime lookups through those aliases so image-generation providers keep resolving auth/runtime modules after rebuilds instead of crashing on missing hashed chunk files.

changes.title: iOS/Live Activities: mark the `ActivityKit` import 在 `LiveActivityManager.swift` as `@preconcurrency` so Xcode 26.4 / Swift 6 builds 停止 failing 在 strict concurrency checks. (#57180) Thanks @ngutman.
changes.rawTitle: iOS/Live Activities: mark the `ActivityKit` import in `LiveActivityManager.swift` as `@preconcurrency` so Xcode 26.4 / Swift 6 builds stop failing on strict concurrency checks. (#57180) Thanks @ngutman.

changes.title: LINE/ACP: 添加 current-conversation binding 和 inbound binding-routing parity so `/acp spawn ... --thread here`, configured ACP bindings, 和 active conversation-bound ACP sessions work 在 LINE like the other conversation channels.
changes.rawTitle: LINE/ACP: add current-conversation binding and inbound binding-routing parity so `/acp spawn ... --thread here`, configured ACP bindings, and active conversation-bound ACP sessions work on LINE like the other conversation channels.

changes.title: LINE/markdown: 保留 underscores inside Latin, Cyrillic, 和 CJK words 当 stripping markdown, while still removing standalone `_italic_` markers 在 the shared text-runtime 路径 used 通过 LINE 和 TTS. (#47465) Thanks @jackjin1997.
changes.rawTitle: LINE/markdown: preserve underscores inside Latin, Cyrillic, and CJK words when stripping markdown, while still removing standalone `_italic_` markers on the shared text-runtime path used by LINE and TTS. (#47465) Thanks @jackjin1997.

changes.title: LINE/status: 停止 `openclaw status` 从 warning about missing credentials 当 sanitized LINE snapshots are already configured, while still surfacing whether the missing field is the 令牌 或 secret. (#45701) Thanks @tamaosamu.
changes.rawTitle: LINE/status: stop `openclaw status` from warning about missing credentials when sanitized LINE snapshots are already configured, while still surfacing whether the missing field is the token or secret. (#45701) Thanks @tamaosamu.

changes.title: macOS/local 网关: 停止 OpenClaw.app 从 killing healthy local 网关 listeners 之后 startup 通过 recognizing the current `openclaw-网关` process title 和 using the current `openclaw 网关` launch shape.
changes.rawTitle: macOS/local gateway: stop OpenClaw.app from killing healthy local gateway listeners after startup by recognizing the current `openclaw-gateway` process title and using the current `openclaw gateway` launch shape.

changes.title: macOS/wide-area discovery: switch 网关 discovery to Tailscale MagicDNS names so Mac clients recover more reliably across changing tailnet IPs. (#57833) Thanks @jacobtomlinson.
changes.rawTitle: macOS/wide-area discovery: switch gateway discovery to Tailscale MagicDNS names so Mac clients recover more reliably across changing tailnet IPs. (#57833) Thanks @jacobtomlinson.

changes.title: Matrix/CLI send: start one-off Matrix send clients 之前 outbound delivery so `openclaw message send --channel matrix` restores E2EE 在 encrypted rooms 而不是 sending plain events. (#57936) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/CLI send: start one-off Matrix send clients before outbound delivery so `openclaw message send --channel matrix` restores E2EE in encrypted rooms instead of sending plain events. (#57936) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Matrix/context: filter fetched room context 通过 sender allowlists so reply 和 thread context lookup no longer pulls non-allowlisted messages 进入 Agent context. (#58376) Thanks @jacobtomlinson.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/context: filter fetched room context by sender allowlists so reply and thread context lookup no longer pulls non-allowlisted messages into agent context. (#58376) Thanks @jacobtomlinson.

changes.title: Matrix/delivery recovery: treat Synapse `User not 在 room` replay failures as permanent 期间 startup recovery so poisoned queued messages move to `failed/` 而不是 崩溃-looping Matrix 之后 restart. (#57426) thanks @dlardo.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/delivery recovery: treat Synapse `User not in room` replay failures as permanent during startup recovery so poisoned queued messages move to `failed/` instead of crash-looping Matrix after restart. (#57426) thanks @dlardo.

changes.title: Matrix/direct rooms: recover fresh auto-joined 1:1 DMs 不适用 eagerly persisting invite-only `m.direct` mappings, while keeping named, aliased, 和 explicitly configured rooms 在 the room 路径. (#58024) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/direct rooms: recover fresh auto-joined 1:1 DMs without eagerly persisting invite-only `m.direct` mappings, while keeping named, aliased, and explicitly configured rooms on the room path. (#58024) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Matrix/direct rooms: 停止 trusting remote `is_direct`, honor explicit local `is_direct: false` 为了 discovered DM candidates, 和 避免 extra member-state lookups 为了 shared rooms so DM routing 和 repair stay aligned. (#57124) Thanks @w-sss.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/direct rooms: stop trusting remote `is_direct`, honor explicit local `is_direct: false` for discovered DM candidates, and avoid extra member-state lookups for shared rooms so DM routing and repair stay aligned. (#57124) Thanks @w-sss.

changes.title: Matrix/DM threads: keep strict unnamed fresh-invite rooms promotable even 当 Matrix omits the optional direct hint, 保留 repair-failed local DM promotions while still revalidating later room metadata, 和 keep both bound 和 thread-isolated Matrix sessions reporting the correct route policy. (#58099) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/DM threads: keep strict unnamed fresh-invite rooms promotable even when Matrix omits the optional direct hint, preserve repair-failed local DM promotions while still revalidating later room metadata, and keep both bound and thread-isolated Matrix sessions reporting the correct route policy. (#58099) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Matrix/插件 loading: ship 和 source-load the crypto bootstrap runtime sidecar 正确地 so current `main` stops warning about failed Matrix bootstrap loads 和 `matrix/index` 插件-id mismatches 在 every invocation. (#53298) thanks @keithce.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/plugin loading: ship and source-load the crypto bootstrap runtime sidecar correctly so current `main` stops warning about failed Matrix bootstrap loads and `matrix/index` plugin-id mismatches on every invocation. (#53298) thanks @keithce.

changes.title: Mattermost/websocket: detect stale Mattermost WebSocket sessions 之后 bot 禁用/启用 cycles so monitoring reconnects cleanly 而不是 静默地 staying stale. (#53604) Thanks @Qinsam.
changes.rawTitle: Mattermost/websocket: detect stale Mattermost WebSocket sessions after bot disable/enable cycles so monitoring reconnects cleanly instead of silently staying stale. (#53604) Thanks @Qinsam.

changes.title: Media/downloads: 停止 forwarding 认证 和 cookie headers across cross-origin redirects 期间 media saves, while preserving safe request headers 为了 same-origin redirect chains. Thanks @AntAISecurityLab 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Media/downloads: stop forwarding auth and cookie headers across cross-origin redirects during media saves, while preserving safe request headers for same-origin redirect chains. Thanks @AntAISecurityLab and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Media/images: reject oversized decoded image inputs 之前 metadata 和 resize backends run, so tiny compressed image bombs fail early 而不是 exhausting 网关 内存. (#58226) Thanks @AntAISecurityLab 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Media/images: reject oversized decoded image inputs before metadata and resize backends run, so tiny compressed image bombs fail early instead of exhausting gateway memory. (#58226) Thanks @AntAISecurityLab and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/诊断工具: probe QMD availability 从 the Agent workspace too, so `openclaw 诊断工具` no longer falsely reports relative `内存.qmd.命令` configs as broken while runtime search still works. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/doctor: probe QMD availability from the agent workspace too, so `openclaw doctor` no longer falsely reports relative `memory.qmd.command` configs as broken while runtime search still works. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/诊断工具: suppress the orphan transcript cleanup warning 当 QMD session indexing is enabled, so 诊断工具 no longer suggests deleting transcript history that QMD still uses 为了 recall. (#40584) Thanks @Gyarados4157 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/doctor: suppress the orphan transcript cleanup warning when QMD session indexing is enabled, so doctor no longer suggests deleting transcript history that QMD still uses for recall. (#40584) Thanks @Gyarados4157 and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/FTS: 添加 configurable trigram tokenization plus short-CJK substring fallback so 内存 search can find Chinese, Japanese, 和 Korean text 不适用 破坏性变更 mixed long-和-short queries. Thanks @carrotRakko.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/FTS: add configurable trigram tokenization plus short-CJK substring fallback so memory search can find Chinese, Japanese, and Korean text without breaking mixed long-and-short queries. Thanks @carrotRakko.

changes.title: 内存/FTS: keep provider-less keyword hits visible at the default 内存-search threshold, so FTS-only recall works 不适用 requiring `--min-score 0`. (#56473) Thanks @opriz.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/FTS: keep provider-less keyword hits visible at the default memory-search threshold, so FTS-only recall works without requiring `--min-score 0`. (#56473) Thanks @opriz.

changes.title: 内存/LanceDB: 解决 runtime dependency manifest lookup 从 the bundled `extensions/内存-lancedb` 路径 (including flattened dist chunks) so startup no longer fails 使用 a missing `@lancedb/lancedb` dependency 错误. (#56623) Thanks @LUKSOAgent.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/LanceDB: resolve runtime dependency manifest lookup from the bundled `extensions/memory-lancedb` path (including flattened dist chunks) so startup no longer fails with a missing `@lancedb/lancedb` dependency error. (#56623) Thanks @LUKSOAgent.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: 添加 `内存.qmd.searchTool` as an exact mcporter 工具 override, so custom QMD MCP协议 tools such as `hybrid_search` can be used 不适用 weakening the validated `searchMode` 配置 surface. (#27801) Thanks @keramblock.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: add `memory.qmd.searchTool` as an exact mcporter tool override, so custom QMD MCP tools such as `hybrid_search` can be used without weakening the validated `searchMode` config surface. (#27801) Thanks @keramblock.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: honor `内存.qmd.更新.embedInterval` even 当 regular QMD 更新 cadence is disabled 或 slower 通过 arming a dedicated embed-cadence maintenance timer, while avoiding redundant timers 当 regular updates are already frequent enough. (#37326) Thanks @barronlroth.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: honor `memory.qmd.update.embedInterval` even when regular QMD update cadence is disabled or slower by arming a dedicated embed-cadence maintenance timer, while avoiding redundant timers when regular updates are already frequent enough. (#37326) Thanks @barronlroth.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: include deduplicated default plus per-Agent `memorySearch.extraPaths` 当 building QMD custom collections, so shared 和 Agent-specific extra roots both get indexed consistently. (#57315) Thanks @Vitalcheffe 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: include deduplicated default plus per-agent `memorySearch.extraPaths` when building QMD custom collections, so shared and agent-specific extra roots both get indexed consistently. (#57315) Thanks @Vitalcheffe and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: keep `memory_search` session-hit paths roundtrip-safe 当 exported session markdown lives under the workspace `qmd/` directory, so `memory_get` can read the exact returned 路径 而不是 failing 在 the generic `qmd/sessions/...` alias. (#43519) Thanks @holgergruenhagen 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: keep `memory_search` session-hit paths roundtrip-safe when exported session markdown lives under the workspace `qmd/` directory, so `memory_get` can read the exact returned path instead of failing on the generic `qmd/sessions/...` alias. (#43519) Thanks @holgergruenhagen and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: keep `qmd embed` active 在 `search` mode too, so BM25-first setups still build a complete index 为了 later vector 和 hybrid retrieval. (#54509) Thanks @hnshah 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: keep `qmd embed` active in `search` mode too, so BM25-first setups still build a complete index for later vector and hybrid retrieval. (#54509) Thanks @hnshah and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: keep reset 和 deleted session transcripts 在 QMD session export so daily session resets do not 静默地 drop most historical recall 从 `memory_search`. (#30220) Thanks @pushkarsingh32.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: keep reset and deleted session transcripts in QMD session export so daily session resets do not silently drop most historical recall from `memory_search`. (#30220) Thanks @pushkarsingh32.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: pass a direct-session 密钥 在 `openclaw 内存 search` so CLI QMD searches no longer get denied as `session=<none>` under direct-only scope defaults. (#43517) Thanks @waynecc-at 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: pass a direct-session key on `openclaw memory search` so CLI QMD searches no longer get denied as `session=<none>` under direct-only scope defaults. (#43517) Thanks @waynecc-at and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: point `QMD_CONFIG_DIR` at the nested `xdg-配置/qmd` directory so per-Agent collection 配置 resolves 正确地. (#39078) Thanks @smart-tinker 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: point `QMD_CONFIG_DIR` at the nested `xdg-config/qmd` directory so per-agent collection config resolves correctly. (#39078) Thanks @smart-tinker and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: 保留 explicit `start_line` 和 `end_line` metadata 从 mcporter query results so `内存 search` hits keep the real snippet offsets 而不是 falling back to the snippet header. (#47960) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: preserve explicit `start_line` and `end_line` metadata from mcporter query results so `memory search` hits keep the real snippet offsets instead of falling back to the snippet header. (#47960) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: rebind collections 当 QMD reports a changed pattern 但是 omits 路径 metadata, so 配置 pattern changes 停止 being 静默地 ignored 在 restart. (#49897) Thanks @Madruru.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: rebind collections when QMD reports a changed pattern but omits path metadata, so config pattern changes stop being silently ignored on restart. (#49897) Thanks @Madruru.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: 解决 slugified `memory_search` file hints back to the indexed filesystem 路径 之前 returning search hits, so `memory_get` works 重新 为了 mixed-case 和 spaced paths. (#50313) Thanks @erra9x.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: resolve slugified `memory_search` file hints back to the indexed filesystem path before returning search hits, so `memory_get` works again for mixed-case and spaced paths. (#50313) Thanks @erra9x.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: send MCP协议 `query` collection filters as the upstream `collections` array 而不是 the legacy singular `collection` field, so mcporter-backed QMD 1.1+ searches still scope 正确地 之后 the unified `query` 工具 migration. (#54728) Thanks @armanddp 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: send MCP `query` collection filters as the upstream `collections` array instead of the legacy singular `collection` field, so mcporter-backed QMD 1.1+ searches still scope correctly after the unified `query` tool migration. (#54728) Thanks @armanddp and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: serialize cross-process `qmd embed` runs behind a shared lock 和 stagger periodic embed timers so multi-Agent QMD collections 停止 thundering-herding 在 startup 和 every maintenance interval. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: serialize cross-process `qmd embed` runs behind a shared lock and stagger periodic embed timers so multi-agent QMD collections stop thundering-herding on startup and every maintenance interval. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: 停止 rewriting Han/CJK BM25 queries 之前 `qmd search`, so OpenClaw search semantics match direct QMD results 为了 mixed 和 spaced Chinese queries. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: stop rewriting Han/CJK BM25 queries before `qmd search`, so OpenClaw search semantics match direct QMD results for mixed and spaced Chinese queries. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: surface degraded vector status 从 `qmd status` so `openclaw 内存 status --deep` warns 当 semantic search is unavailable because the index still has `0` vectors. 修复 #28169. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: surface degraded vector status from `qmd status` so `openclaw memory status --deep` warns when semantic search is unavailable because the index still has `0` vectors. Fixes #28169. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: treat null-byte collection corruption the same 当 QMD surfaces it as `ENOENT`, so managed-collection repair still rebuilds 和 retries 而不是 leaving QMD stuck 在 a broken 路径. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: treat null-byte collection corruption the same when QMD surfaces it as `ENOENT`, so managed-collection repair still rebuilds and retries instead of leaving QMD stuck on a broken path. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: warn explicitly 当 `内存.backend=qmd` is configured 但是 the `qmd` binary is missing, so 诊断工具 和 runtime fallback no longer fail as a silent builtin downgrade. (#50439) Thanks @Jimmy-xuzimo 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: warn explicitly when `memory.backend=qmd` is configured but the `qmd` binary is missing, so doctor and runtime fallback no longer fail as a silent builtin downgrade. (#50439) Thanks @Jimmy-xuzimo and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: weight CJK-heavy text 正确地 当 estimating chunk sizes, 保留 surrogate-pair characters 期间 fine splits, 和 keep long Latin lines 在 the old chunk boundaries so 内存 indexing produces better-sized chunks 为了 CJK notes. (#40271) Thanks @AaronLuo00.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: weight CJK-heavy text correctly when estimating chunk sizes, preserve surrogate-pair characters during fine splits, and keep long Latin lines on the old chunk boundaries so memory indexing produces better-sized chunks for CJK notes. (#40271) Thanks @AaronLuo00.

changes.title: 内存/session indexer: include `.jsonl.reset.*` 和 `.jsonl.deleted.*` transcripts 在 the 内存 host session scan while still excluding `.jsonl.bak.*` compaction backups 和 lock files, so 内存 search sees archived session history 不适用 duplicating stale snapshots. Thanks @hclsys 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/session indexer: include `.jsonl.reset.*` and `.jsonl.deleted.*` transcripts in the memory host session scan while still excluding `.jsonl.bak.*` compaction backups and lock files, so memory search sees archived session history without duplicating stale snapshots. Thanks @hclsys and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Microsoft Teams/threads: filter fetched thread history 通过 sender allowlists so thread context seeding no longer pulls messages 从 disallowed users. (#57723) Thanks @jacobtomlinson.
changes.rawTitle: Microsoft Teams/threads: filter fetched thread history by sender allowlists so thread context seeding no longer pulls messages from disallowed users. (#57723) Thanks @jacobtomlinson.

changes.title: OpenAI/Codex fast mode: map `/fast` to priority processing 在 native OpenAI 和 Codex Responses endpoints 而不是 rewriting reasoning settings, 和 document the exact endpoint 和 override behavior.
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI/Codex fast mode: map `/fast` to priority processing on native OpenAI and Codex Responses endpoints instead of rewriting reasoning settings, and document the exact endpoint and override behavior.

changes.title: Outbound media/local files: piggyback host-local `MEDIA:` reads 在 the configured fs policy 而不是 a separate media-root check, so generated files outside the workspace can send 当 `tools.fs.workspaceOnly=false` while plaintext-like host files stay blocked 通过 the outbound media allowlist.
changes.rawTitle: Outbound media/local files: piggyback host-local `MEDIA:` reads on the configured fs policy instead of a separate media-root check, so generated files outside the workspace can send when `tools.fs.workspaceOnly=false` while plaintext-like host files stay blocked by the outbound media allowlist.

changes.title: Pairing: enforce pending request limits per account 而不是 per shared channel queue, so one account's outstanding pairing challenges no longer block new pairing 在 other accounts. Thanks @smaeljaish771 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Pairing: enforce pending request limits per account instead of per shared channel queue, so one account's outstanding pairing challenges no longer block new pairing on other accounts. Thanks @smaeljaish771 and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/ClawHub: sanitize temporary archive filenames 为了 scoped package names 和 slash-containing skill slugs so `openclaw 插件 install @scope/name` no longer fails 使用 `ENOENT` 期间 archive download. (#56452) Thanks @soimy.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/ClawHub: sanitize temporary archive filenames for scoped package names and slash-containing skill slugs so `openclaw plugins install @scope/name` no longer fails with `ENOENT` during archive download. (#56452) Thanks @soimy.

changes.title: 插件/CLI: 添加 descriptor-backed lazy 插件 CLI registration so Matrix can keep its CLI module lazy-loaded 不适用 dropping `openclaw matrix ...` 从 parse-time 命令 registration. (#57165) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/CLI: add descriptor-backed lazy plugin CLI registration so Matrix can keep its CLI module lazy-loaded without dropping `openclaw matrix ...` from parse-time command registration. (#57165) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: 插件/CLI: collect root-help 插件 descriptors through a dedicated non-activating CLI metadata 路径 so enabled 插件 keep validated 配置 semantics 不适用 triggering runtime-only 插件 registration work, while preserving runtime CLI 命令 registration 为了 legacy channel 插件 that still wire commands 从 full registration. (#57294) thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/CLI: collect root-help plugin descriptors through a dedicated non-activating CLI metadata path so enabled plugins keep validated config semantics without triggering runtime-only plugin registration work, while preserving runtime CLI command registration for legacy channel plugins that still wire commands from full registration. (#57294) thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: 插件/facades: guard bundled 插件 facade loads 使用 a cache-first sentinel so circular re-entry stops crashing `xai`, `sglang`, 和 `vllm` 期间 网关 插件 startup. (#57508) Thanks @openperf.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/facades: guard bundled plugin facade loads with a cache-first sentinel so circular re-entry stops crashing `xai`, `sglang`, and `vllm` during gateway plugin startup. (#57508) Thanks @openperf.

changes.title: 插件/Matrix: mirror the Matrix crypto WASM runtime dependency 进入 the root packaged install 和 enforce root/插件 dependency parity so bundled Matrix E2EE crypto resolves 正确地 在 shipped builds. (#57163) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Matrix: mirror the Matrix crypto WASM runtime dependency into the root packaged install and enforce root/plugin dependency parity so bundled Matrix E2EE crypto resolves correctly in shipped builds. (#57163) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: 插件/startup: block workspace `.env` 从 overriding `OPENCLAW_BUNDLED_PLUGINS_DIR`, so bundled 插件 trust roots only come 从 inherited runtime env 或 package resolution 而不是 repo-local dotenv files. Thanks @nexrin 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/startup: block workspace `.env` from overriding `OPENCLAW_BUNDLED_PLUGINS_DIR`, so bundled plugin trust roots only come from inherited runtime env or package resolution instead of repo-local dotenv files. Thanks @nexrin and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Sandbox/浏览器: install `fonts-noto-cjk` 在 the sandbox 浏览器 image so screenshots render Chinese, Japanese, 和 Korean text 正确地 而不是 tofu boxes. 修复 #35597. Thanks @carrotRakko 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Sandbox/browser: install `fonts-noto-cjk` in the sandbox browser image so screenshots render Chinese, Japanese, and Korean text correctly instead of tofu boxes. Fixes #35597. Thanks @carrotRakko and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 安全/LINE: make Webhook signature validation run the timing-safe compare even 当 the supplied signature length is wrong, closing a small timing side-channel. (#55663) Thanks @gavyngong.
changes.rawTitle: Security/LINE: make webhook signature validation run the timing-safe compare even when the supplied signature length is wrong, closing a small timing side-channel. (#55663) Thanks @gavyngong.

changes.title: Sessions/飞书: 保留 conversation ids that legitimately embed `:topic:` 在 shared session helper parsing, while keeping Telegram topic session parsing intact. (#58100) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Sessions/Feishu: preserve conversation ids that legitimately embed `:topic:` in shared session helper parsing, while keeping Telegram topic session parsing intact. (#58100) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Slack/status reactions: 添加 a reaction lifecycle 为了 queued, thinking, 工具, done, 和 错误 phases 在 Slack monitors, 使用 safer cleanup so queued ack reactions stay correct across silent runs, pre-reply failures, 和 delayed transitions. (#56430) Thanks @hsiaoa.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/status reactions: add a reaction lifecycle for queued, thinking, tool, done, and error phases in Slack monitors, with safer cleanup so queued ack reactions stay correct across silent runs, pre-reply failures, and delayed transitions. (#56430) Thanks @hsiaoa.

changes.title: Status/node-only hosts: teach `openclaw status` to 处理 node-only hosts 在 current `main` 不适用 the old mixed 网关 assumptions. (#56718) Thanks @ImLukeF.
changes.rawTitle: Status/node-only hosts: teach `openclaw status` to handle node-only hosts on current `main` without the old mixed gateway assumptions. (#56718) Thanks @ImLukeF.

changes.title: Status: 修复 cache hit rate exceeding 100% 通过 deriving denominator 从 prompt-side 令牌 fields 而不是 potentially undersized totalTokens. 修复 #26643.
changes.rawTitle: Status: fix cache hit rate exceeding 100% by deriving denominator from prompt-side token fields instead of potentially undersized totalTokens. Fixes #26643.

changes.title: Telegram/audio: transcode Telegram 语音-note `.ogg` attachments 之前 the local `whisper-CLI` auto fallback runs, 和 keep mention-preflight transcription enabled 在 auto mode 当 `tools.media.audio` is unset.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/audio: transcode Telegram voice-note `.ogg` attachments before the local `whisper-cli` auto fallback runs, and keep mention-preflight transcription enabled in auto mode when `tools.media.audio` is unset.

changes.title: Telegram/forum topics: restore reply routing to the active topic 和 keep ACP `sessions_spawn(..., thread=true, mode="session")` bound to that same topic 而不是 falling back to root chat 或 losing follow-up routing. (#56060) Thanks @one27001.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/forum topics: restore reply routing to the active topic and keep ACP `sessions_spawn(..., thread=true, mode="session")` bound to that same topic instead of falling back to root chat or losing follow-up routing. (#56060) Thanks @one27001.

changes.title: Telegram/media: 允许 RFC 2544 benchmark-range Telegram CDN resolutions 期间 media downloads, so 语音 messages, PDFs, 和 other attachments no longer fail 使用 `Failed to download media`. (#57624) Thanks @MoerAI.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/media: allow RFC 2544 benchmark-range Telegram CDN resolutions during media downloads, so voice messages, PDFs, and other attachments no longer fail with `Failed to download media`. (#57624) Thanks @MoerAI.

changes.title: Telegram/native commands: prefix native 命令 menu callback payloads 和 保留 `CommandSource: "native"` 当 Telegram replays them through callback queries, so `/fast` 和 other native 命令 menus keep working even 当 text-命令 routing is disabled. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/native commands: prefix native command menu callback payloads and preserve `CommandSource: "native"` when Telegram replays them through callback queries, so `/fast` and other native command menus keep working even when text-command routing is disabled. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Telegram/polling: keep the watchdog 从 aborting long-running reply delivery 通过 treating recent non-polling API activity as bounded liveness 而不是 a hard stall. (#56343) Thanks @openperf.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/polling: keep the watchdog from aborting long-running reply delivery by treating recent non-polling API activity as bounded liveness instead of a hard stall. (#56343) Thanks @openperf.

changes.title: Tools/web_fetch: 添加 an explicit trusted env-代理 路径 为了 代理-only installs while keeping strict SSRF fetches 在 the pinned direct 路径, so trusted 代理 routing does not weaken strict destination binding. (#50650) Thanks @kkav004.
changes.rawTitle: Tools/web_fetch: add an explicit trusted env-proxy path for proxy-only installs while keeping strict SSRF fetches on the pinned direct path, so trusted proxy routing does not weaken strict destination binding. (#50650) Thanks @kkav004.

changes.title: Tools/web_search: localize the shared search cache to module scope so same-process global symbol lookups can no longer inspect 或 mutate cached web-search responses. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Tools/web_search: localize the shared search cache to module scope so same-process global symbol lookups can no longer inspect or mutate cached web-search responses. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: TTS/Microsoft: auto-switch the default Edge voice to Chinese for CJK-dominant text without overriding explicitly selected Microsoft voices. (#52355) Thanks @extrasmall0.

changes.title: TTS: Restore 3.28 schema compatibility 和 fallback observability. (#57953) Thanks @joshavant.
changes.rawTitle: TTS: Restore 3.28 schema compatibility and fallback observability. (#57953) Thanks @joshavant.

changes.title: TUI/chat: keep optimistic outbound user messages visible 期间 active runs 通过 deferring local-run binding until the first 网关 chat event reveals the real run id, preventing premature history reloads 从 wiping pending local sends. (#54722) Thanks @seanturner001.
changes.rawTitle: TUI/chat: keep optimistic outbound user messages visible during active runs by deferring local-run binding until the first gateway chat event reveals the real run id, preventing premature history reloads from wiping pending local sends. (#54722) Thanks @seanturner001.

changes.rawTitle: TUI/model picker: keep searchable `/model` and `/models` input mode from hijacking `j`/`k` as navigation keys, and harden width bounds under `m`-filtered model lists so search no longer crashes on long rows. (#30156) Thanks @briannicholls.

changes.title: 语音 Call/media stream: cap inbound WebSocket frame size 之前 `start` validation so oversized pre-start frames are dropped 之前 JSON parsing. Thanks @Kazamayc 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Voice Call/media stream: cap inbound WebSocket frame size before `start` validation so oversized pre-start frames are dropped before JSON parsing. Thanks @Kazamayc and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 语音 call/Plivo: pin stored callback bases to the configured public Webhook URL so later call-control redirects stay 在 the intended origin even if Webhook transport metadata differs. Thanks @zsxsoft 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Voice call/Plivo: pin stored callback bases to the configured public webhook URL so later call-control redirects stay on the intended origin even if webhook transport metadata differs. Thanks @zsxsoft and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Web 界面/markdown: 停止 bare auto-links 从 swallowing adjacent CJK text while preserving valid mixed-script 路径 和 query characters 在 rendered links. (#48410) Thanks @jnuyao.
changes.rawTitle: Web UI/markdown: stop bare auto-links from swallowing adjacent CJK text while preserving valid mixed-script path and query characters in rendered links. (#48410) Thanks @jnuyao.

changes.title: Approvals/界面: keep the newest pending approval at the front 的 the Control 界面 queue so approving one request does not accidentally target an older expired id. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Approvals/UI: keep the newest pending approval at the front of the Control UI queue so approving one request does not accidentally target an older expired id. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 认证 profiles/OAuth认证: refresh runtime 认证 snapshots 当 saving rotated credentials so OAuth认证 providers do not 复用 consumed refresh tokens 之后 the first 令牌 rotation. 修复 #55389. Thanks @sam26880 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Auth profiles/OAuth: refresh runtime auth snapshots when saving rotated credentials so OAuth providers do not reuse consumed refresh tokens after the first token rotation. Fixes #55389. Thanks @sam26880 and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 浏览器/screenshot: use `fromSurface: false` 在 raw CDP screenshots to 避免 a Chromium compositor bug that drops cross-origin image textures (QR codes, CDN assets), 和 保留 pre-existing device emulation state across full-page viewport expansion. (#54358) Thanks @FMLS.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/screenshot: use `fromSurface: false` in raw CDP screenshots to avoid a Chromium compositor bug that drops cross-origin image textures (QR codes, CDN assets), and preserve pre-existing device emulation state across full-page viewport expansion. (#54358) Thanks @FMLS.

changes.title: ClawDock/docs: move the helper scripts to `scripts/clawdock`, publish ClawDock as a first-class docs page 在 the docs site, 和 document reinstalling local helper copies 从 the new raw GitHub 路径. (#23912) thanks @Olshansk.
changes.rawTitle: ClawDock/docs: move the helper scripts to `scripts/clawdock`, publish ClawDock as a first-class docs page on the docs site, and document reinstalling local helper copies from the new raw GitHub path. (#23912) thanks @Olshansk.

changes.title: Control 界面/网关: clear queued 浏览器 connect timeouts 在 client 停止 so aborted 或 replaced 网关 clients do not send delayed connect requests 之后 shutdown. (#57338) thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/gateway: clear queued browser connect timeouts on client stop so aborted or replaced gateway clients do not send delayed connect requests after shutdown. (#57338) thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Control 界面/网关: reconnect the 浏览器 client 当 网关 event sequence gaps are detected, so stale non-chat state recovers automatically 而不是 only telling the user to refresh. (#23912) thanks @Olshansk.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/gateway: reconnect the browser client when gateway event sequence gaps are detected, so stale non-chat state recovers automatically instead of only telling the user to refresh. (#23912) thanks @Olshansk.

changes.title: Exec approvals/channels: unify Discord 和 Telegram exec approval runtime handling, move approval buttons onto the shared interactive reply 模型, 和 修复 Telegram approval buttons 和 typed `/approve` commands so configured approvers can 解决 requests reliably 重新. (#57516) Thanks @scoootscooob.
changes.rawTitle: Exec approvals/channels: unify Discord and Telegram exec approval runtime handling, move approval buttons onto the shared interactive reply model, and fix Telegram approval buttons and typed `/approve` commands so configured approvers can resolve requests reliably again. (#57516) Thanks @scoootscooob.

changes.title: 网关/SQLite transient handling: keep unhandled `SQLITE_CANTOPEN`, `SQLITE_BUSY`, `SQLITE_LOCKED`, 和 `SQLITE_IOERR` failures non-fatal 在 the global rejection handler so macOS LaunchAgent restarts do not enter a 崩溃-throttle loop. (#57018)
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/SQLite transient handling: keep unhandled `SQLITE_CANTOPEN`, `SQLITE_BUSY`, `SQLITE_LOCKED`, and `SQLITE_IOERR` failures non-fatal in the global rejection handler so macOS LaunchAgent restarts do not enter a crash-throttle loop. (#57018)

changes.title: Hooks/插件/skills: block workspace `.env` overrides 为了 bundled root directories so workspace startup cannot redirect bundled trust roots away 从 the packaged defaults. Thanks @nexrin 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Hooks/plugins/skills: block workspace `.env` overrides for bundled root directories so workspace startup cannot redirect bundled trust roots away from the packaged defaults. Thanks @nexrin and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: LINE/webhooks: cap shared concurrent pre-verify Webhook body reads so excess requests are rejected 之前 entering the LINE body handler. Thanks @nexrin 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: LINE/webhooks: cap shared concurrent pre-verify webhook body reads so excess requests are rejected before entering the LINE body handler. Thanks @nexrin and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: 保留 explicit custom collection names 为了 shared paths outside the Agent workspace so `memory_search` stops appending `-<agentId>` to externally managed QMD collections. (#52539) Thanks @lobsrice 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: preserve explicit custom collection names for shared paths outside the agent workspace so `memory_search` stops appending `-<agentId>` to externally managed QMD collections. (#52539) Thanks @lobsrice and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/builtin: keep 内存-file indexing active 在 FTS-only mode (no embedding provider) so forced reindexes no longer swap 在 an empty index 和 wipe existing 内存 chunks. (#42714) Thanks @asamimei.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/builtin: keep memory-file indexing active in FTS-only mode (no embedding provider) so forced reindexes no longer swap in an empty index and wipe existing memory chunks. (#42714) Thanks @asamimei.

changes.title: Nostr/配置: redact `channels.nostr.privateKey` 在 配置 snapshots 和 Control 界面 配置 views, so Nostr signing keys no longer appear 在 plain text. Thanks @ccreater222.
changes.rawTitle: Nostr/config: redact `channels.nostr.privateKey` in config snapshots and Control UI config views, so Nostr signing keys no longer appear in plain text. Thanks @ccreater222.

changes.title: 插件 approvals: accept unique short approval-id prefixes 在 `插件.approval.解决`, matching exec approvals 和 restoring `/approve` fallback flows 在 chat approval surfaces. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugin approvals: accept unique short approval-id prefixes on `plugin.approval.resolve`, matching exec approvals and restoring `/approve` fallback flows on chat approval surfaces. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: SSH sandbox/upload: reject workspace symlinks that 解决 outside the uploaded tree 之前 syncing to the remote sandbox, so later Agent writes cannot be redirected through escaped links. Thanks @AntAISecurityLab 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: SSH sandbox/upload: reject workspace symlinks that resolve outside the uploaded tree before syncing to the remote sandbox, so later agent writes cannot be redirected through escaped links. Thanks @AntAISecurityLab and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Slack/interactive replies: 解决 Slack Block Kit reply delivery 从 both authored `channelData.Slack.blocks` payloads 和 directive-generated interactive replies, 和 keep Slack button styles mapped onto valid Block Kit button rendering so interactive replies 停止 dropping 在 Slack-specific delivery paths. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/interactive replies: resolve Slack Block Kit reply delivery from both authored `channelData.slack.blocks` payloads and directive-generated interactive replies, and keep Slack button styles mapped onto valid Block Kit button rendering so interactive replies stop dropping on Slack-specific delivery paths. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Subagents/announcements: 保留 the requester Agent id 为了 inline deterministic 工具 spawns so named Agent 不适用 channel bindings can still announce completions through the correct owner session. (#55437) Thanks @kAIborg24.
changes.rawTitle: Subagents/announcements: preserve the requester agent id for inline deterministic tool spawns so named agents without channel bindings can still announce completions through the correct owner session. (#55437) Thanks @kAIborg24.

changes.title: Telegram/Anthropic streaming: replace raw invalid stream-order provider errors 使用 a safe 重试 message so internal `message_start/message_stop` failures do not leak 进入 chats. (#55408) Thanks @imydal.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/Anthropic streaming: replace raw invalid stream-order provider errors with a safe retry message so internal `message_start/message_stop` failures do not leak into chats. (#55408) Thanks @imydal.

changes.title: Tlon/media: route inbound image downloads through the shared media store, cap each download at 6 MB, 和 停止 之后 8 images per message so large Tlon posts no longer balloon local media storage. Thanks @AntAISecurityLab 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Tlon/media: route inbound image downloads through the shared media store, cap each download at 6 MB, and stop after 8 images per message so large Tlon posts no longer balloon local media storage. Thanks @AntAISecurityLab and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/live switch: 停止 transient cron 和 subagent 模型 overrides 从 being misread as persisted live-session switches, so isolated runs no longer fail 使用 `LiveSessionModelSwitchError`. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/live switch: stop transient cron and subagent model overrides from being misread as persisted live-session switches, so isolated runs no longer fail with `LiveSessionModelSwitchError`. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/工具-call repair: recover malformed Kimi/OpenRouter 工具-call argument streams 当 provider preambles appear 之前 JSON payloads, 和 fail closed 在 non-工具 leading text so fragment strings do not leak 进入 filesystem 路径 arguments 期间 sub-Agent runs. (#56560) Thanks @Originalwhite.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/tool-call repair: recover malformed Kimi/OpenRouter tool-call argument streams when provider preambles appear before JSON payloads, and fail closed on non-tool leading text so fragment strings do not leak into filesystem path arguments during sub-agent runs. changes.title: 网关/startup: keep configured primary-模型 warmup 在 the static 模型 路径 so container boots do not snapshot-load provider runtime graphs just to validate a configured 模型. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: keep configured primary-model warmup on the static model path so container boots do not snapshot-load provider runtime graphs just to validate a configured model. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: OpenAI/Responses: omit disabled reasoning payloads across OpenAI, Codex, 和 Azure OpenAI request builders so GPT-5 endpoints no longer reject `reasoning.effort: "none"`. (#58208) Thanks @jalehman.
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI/Responses: omit disabled reasoning payloads across OpenAI, Codex, and Azure OpenAI request builders so GPT-5 endpoints no longer reject `reasoning.effort: "none"`. (#58208) Thanks @jalehman.

changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp/outbound: restore runtime send/action routing and outbound compatibility after the recent channel seam refactor so outbound sends, reactions, and related media actions keep reaching the active session.

changes.rawTitle: xAI/Responses: normalize image-bearing tool results for xAI responses payloads, including OpenResponses-style `input_image.source` parts, so image tool replays no longer 422 on the follow-up turn. (#58017) Thanks @neeravmakwana.

changes.rawTitle: Zalo/webhooks: scope replay dedupe to the authenticated target so one configured account can no longer cause same-id inbound events for another target to be dropped. Thanks @smaeljaish771 and @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/prompt build: preserve the highest-priority `systemPrompt` when merging `before_prompt_build` hook results instead of letting lower-priority hooks overwrite it. (#58375)

changes.title: Tlon/settings migration: 保留 explicit empty-array settings 期间 migration so restart-time reseeding no longer restores older file-配置 values. (#58370)
changes.rawTitle: Tlon/settings migration: preserve explicit empty-array settings during migration so restart-time reseeding no longer restores older file-config values. (#58370)

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/marketplace: harden marketplace archive installs by surfacing guarded download failures as structured install errors and deriving temp filenames from the final resolved URL. (#58267)

changes.rawTitle: UI/DOM safety: build the chat delete-confirm popover and Canvas Host fallback status line with DOM nodes instead of injected HTML strings. (#58269, #58266)

changes.rawTitle: Media/file handling: create image temp work directories under the shared OpenClaw temp root and stop widening allowed local media roots from reply or tool source paths, keeping local media access limited to configured and agent-scoped roots. (#58270, #57770)

changes.title: Telegram/安全: migrate legacy pairing `allowFrom` state to the `default` account only 和 gate group 语音-message preflight transcription 在 sender authorization so unauthorized senders cannot trigger paid transcription 之前 being dropped. (#58165, #57566)
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/security: migrate legacy pairing `allowFrom` state to the `default` account only and gate group voice-message preflight transcription on sender authorization so unauthorized senders cannot trigger paid transcription before being dropped. (#58165, #57566)

changes.title: Exec approvals: 停止 shell init-file flags 从 matching persisted script-路径 approvals, detect 命令-carrier inline eval 在 tools like `awk`, `find`, `xargs`, `make`, 和 `sed`, 和 treat the awk family as interpreter-like so 允许-always decisions no longer persist interpreter paths. (#58369, #57842, #57772)
changes.rawTitle: Exec approvals: stop shell init-file flags from matching persisted script-path approvals, detect command-carrier inline eval in tools like `awk`, `find`, `xargs`, `make`, and `sed`, and treat the awk family as interpreter-like so allow-always decisions no longer persist interpreter paths. (#58369, #57842, #57772)

changes.rawTitle: Voice call/Telnyx: canonicalize verified webhook signatures before deriving replay keys so equivalent Base64 and Base64URL encodings dedupe correctly. (#57829)

changes.title: 网关/HTTP trust boundaries: ignore self-declared bearer scopes, deny dangerous HTTP 工具-invoke paths 通过 default, require write scope 在 `/v1/embeddings`, 和 bind OpenAI-compatible `/v1/chat/completions` plus `/v1/responses` ingress as non-owner so external HTTP callers cannot self-upgrade access. (#57783, #57771, #57721, #57769, #57778)

changes.title: 网关/trusted 配置 和 bootstrap: clear self-declared scopes 为了 device-less `trusted-代理` WebSocket connects 和 trim the Control 界面 bootstrap payload to only the fields needed 之前 the normal handshake. (#57692, #57727)
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/trusted config and bootstrap: clear self-declared scopes for device-less `trusted-proxy` WebSocket connects and trim the Control UI bootstrap payload to only the fields needed before the normal handshake. (#57692, #57727)

changes.rawTitle: Skills and workspace safety: replace raw skill-file reads with a symlink-safe, root-confined loader and pin workspace-only `apply_patch` delete and directory-creation mutations to verified workspace roots so path rebind races fail closed. (#57519, #56016)

changes.title: Env 和 filesystem hardening: block credential 和 网关 认证 env vars 从 workspace `.env` files, always strip dangerous inherited host env vars such as `浏览器` 和 `GIT_EDITOR`, 和 keep sensitive host paths 和 OpenClaw state roots blocked even 当 external sandbox bind sources are allowed. (#57767, #57559, #56024)
changes.rawTitle: Env and filesystem hardening: block credential and gateway auth env vars from workspace `.env` files, always strip dangerous inherited host env vars such as `BROWSER` and `GIT_EDITOR`, and keep sensitive host paths and OpenClaw state roots blocked even when external sandbox bind sources are allowed. (#57767, #57559, #56024)

changes.title: OpenShell 和 ACP file boundaries: skip symlinks 和 保留 trusted host-only directories 期间 OpenShell mirror sync, 和 route ACP attachment reads through the shared attachment cache so local files outside allowed roots are no longer forwarded. (#57693, #57690)
changes.rawTitle: OpenShell and ACP file boundaries: skip symlinks and preserve trusted host-only directories during OpenShell mirror sync, and route ACP attachment reads through the shared attachment cache so local files outside allowed roots are no longer forwarded. (#57693, #57690)

changes.rawTitle: Channel/webhook authorization: skip Discord audio preflight transcription for unauthorized guild senders, add a shared pre-auth in-flight guard to Synology Chat webhooks, and validate Microsoft Teams bearer auth before JSON body parsing. (#57695, #57722, #57686)

changes.rawTitle: Infra/randomness: replace `Math.random()` in affected identifier and delay-jitter paths with shared secure-random helpers, including UI UUID generation. (#57744)

items.title: Nodes/exec: 移除 the duplicated `nodes.run` shell wrapper 从 the CLI 和 Agent `nodes` 工具 so node shell execution always goes through `exec host=node`, keeping node-specific capabilities 在 `nodes invoke` 和 the dedicated media/location/notify actions.
items.rawTitle: Nodes/exec: remove the duplicated `nodes.run` shell wrapper from the CLI and agent `nodes` tool so node shell execution always goes through `exec host=node`, keeping node-specific capabilities on `nodes invoke` and the dedicated media/location/notify actions.

items.title: Skills/install 和 插件/install: built-在 dangerous-code `critical` findings 和 install-time scan failures 现在 fail closed 通过 default, so 插件 installs 和 网关-backed skill dependency installs that previously succeeded may 现在 require an explicit dangerous override such as `--dangerously-force-unsafe-install` to proceed.
items.rawTitle: Skills/install and Plugins/install: built-in dangerous-code `critical` findings and install-time scan failures now fail closed by default, so plugin installs and gateway-backed skill dependency installs that previously succeeded may now require an explicit dangerous override such as `--dangerously-force-unsafe-install` to proceed.

items.title: 网关/认证: `trusted-代理` 现在 rejects mixed shared-令牌 configs, 和 local-direct fallback requires the configured 令牌 而不是 implicitly authenticating same-host callers. Thanks @zhangning-Agent, @jacobtomlinson, 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/auth: `trusted-proxy` now rejects mixed shared-token configs, and local-direct fallback requires the configured token instead of implicitly authenticating same-host callers. Thanks @zhangning-agent, @jacobtomlinson, and @vincentkoc.

items.title: LINE/outbound media: 添加 LINE image, video, 和 audio outbound sends 在 the LINE-specific delivery 路径, including explicit preview/tracking handling 为了 videos while keeping generic media sends 在 the existing image-only route. (#45826) Thanks @masatohoshino.
items.rawTitle: LINE/outbound media: add LINE image, video, and audio outbound sends on the LINE-specific delivery path, including explicit preview/tracking handling for videos while keeping generic media sends on the existing image-only route. (#45826) Thanks @masatohoshino.

items.title: ACP/安全: replace ACP's dangerous-工具 name override 使用 semantic approval classes, so only narrow readonly reads/searches can auto-approve while indirect exec-capable 和 control-plane tools always require explicit prompt approval. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: ACP/security: replace ACP's dangerous-tool name override with semantic approval classes, so only narrow readonly reads/searches can auto-approve while indirect exec-capable and control-plane tools always require explicit prompt approval. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: ACP/sessions_spawn: register ACP child runs 为了 completion tracking 和 lifecycle cleanup, 和 make registration-failure cleanup explicitly best-effort so callers do not assume an already-started ACP turn was fully aborted. (#40885) Thanks @xaeon2026 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: ACP/sessions_spawn: register ACP child runs for completion tracking and lifecycle cleanup, and make registration-failure cleanup explicitly best-effort so callers do not assume an already-started ACP turn was fully aborted. (#40885) Thanks @xaeon2026 and @vincentkoc.

items.title: Agent/Anthropic failover: treat Anthropic `api_error` payloads 使用 `An unexpected 错误 occurred while processing the response` as transient so 重试/fallback can engage 而不是 surfacing a terminal failure. (#57441) Thanks @zijiess 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Agents/Anthropic failover: treat Anthropic `api_error` payloads with `An unexpected error occurred while processing the response` as transient so retry/fallback can engage instead of surfacing a terminal failure. (#57441) Thanks @zijiess and @vincentkoc.

items.title: Agent/sandbox: honor `tools.sandbox.tools.alsoAllow`, let explicit sandbox re-allows 移除 matching built-在 default-deny tools, 和 keep sandbox explain/错误 guidance aligned 使用 the effective sandbox 工具 policy. (#54492) Thanks @ngutman.
items.rawTitle: Agents/sandbox: honor `tools.sandbox.tools.alsoAllow`, let explicit sandbox re-allows remove matching built-in default-deny tools, and keep sandbox explain/error guidance aligned with the effective sandbox tool policy. (#54492) Thanks @ngutman.

items.rawTitle: Anthropic/service tiers: support explicit `serviceTier` model params for direct Anthropic requests and let them override `/fast` defaults when both are set. (#45453) Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.rawTitle: Exec/node: stop gateway-side workdir fallback from rewriting explicit `host=node` cwd values to the gateway filesystem, so remote node exec approval and runs keep using the intended node-local directory. (#50961) Thanks @openperf.

items.rawTitle: Exec/runtime: default implicit exec to `host=auto`, resolve that target to sandbox only when a sandbox runtime exists, keep explicit `host=sandbox` fail-closed without sandbox, and show `/exec` effective host state in runtime status/docs.

Thanks @mbelinky 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Background tasks: turn tasks into a real shared background-run control plane instead of ACP-only bookkeeping by unifying ACP, subagent, cron, and background CLI execution under one SQLite-backed ledger, routing detached lifecycle updates through the executor seam, adding audit/maintenance/status visibility, tightening auto-cleanup and lost-run recovery, improving task awareness in internal status/tool surfaces, and clarifying the split between heartbeat/main-session automation and detached scheduled runs. items.title: 内存/QMD: treat null-byte collection corruption the same 当 QMD surfaces it as `ENOENT`, so managed-collection repair still rebuilds 和 retries 而不是 leaving QMD stuck 在 a broken 路径. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: treat null-byte collection corruption the same when QMD surfaces it as `ENOENT`, so managed-collection repair still rebuilds and retries instead of leaving QMD stuck on a broken path. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 内存/QMD: weight CJK-heavy text 正确地 当 estimating chunk sizes, 保留 surrogate-pair characters 期间 fine splits, 和 keep long Latin lines 在 the old chunk boundaries so 内存 indexing produces better-sized chunks 为了 CJK notes. (#40271) Thanks @AaronLuo00.
items.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: weight CJK-heavy text correctly when estimating chunk sizes, preserve surrogate-pair characters during fine splits, and keep long Latin lines on the old chunk boundaries so memory indexing produces better-sized chunks for CJK notes. (#40271) Thanks @AaronLuo00.

items.title: 内存/session indexer: include `.jsonl.reset.*` 和 `.jsonl.deleted.*` transcripts 在 the 内存 host session scan while still excluding `.jsonl.bak.*` compaction backups 和 lock files, so 内存 search sees archived session history 不适用 duplicating stale snapshots. Thanks @hclsys 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Memory/session indexer: include `.jsonl.reset.*` and `.jsonl.deleted.*` transcripts in the memory host session scan while still excluding `.jsonl.bak.*` compaction backups and lock files, so memory search sees archived session history without duplicating stale snapshots. Thanks @hclsys and @vincentkoc.

items.title: Tools/web_search: localize the shared search cache to module scope so same-process global symbol lookups can no longer inspect 或 mutate cached web-search responses. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Tools/web_search: localize the shared search cache to module scope so same-process global symbol lookups can no longer inspect or mutate cached web-search responses. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 内存/builtin: keep 内存-file indexing active 在 FTS-only mode (no embedding provider) so forced reindexes no longer swap 在 an empty index 和 wipe existing 内存 chunks. (#42714) Thanks @asamimei.
items.rawTitle: Memory/builtin: keep memory-file indexing active in FTS-only mode (no embedding provider) so forced reindexes no longer swap in an empty index and wipe existing memory chunks. (#42714) Thanks @asamimei.

items.title: OpenShell 和 ACP file boundaries: skip symlinks 和 保留 trusted host-only directories 期间 OpenShell mirror sync, 和 route ACP attachment reads through the shared attachment cache so local files outside allowed roots are no longer forwarded. (#57693, #57690)
items.rawTitle: OpenShell and ACP file boundaries: skip symlinks and preserve trusted host-only directories during OpenShell mirror sync, and route ACP attachment reads through the shared attachment cache so local files outside allowed roots are no longer forwarded. (#57693, #57690)
